name: Rural Americans United
subject: Our most controversial post yet: A Line in the Sand for Rural Washington
body:
From the Methow to the Yakima Valley, people came together to protest harmful Medicaid cuts that target the most vulnerable.
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* Fighting Fascism's Grip on Healthcare
* Progressive Strategies NW Data: Long Term Health
* Expanding Our Reaching

---
| |
---
| On Tuesday November 19, 2025, I joined a wonderful group of people who represent our communities in many different ways. Methow Rising, Okanogan Action Coalition, Methow People for Democracy, CW Resistance, Yakima Valley Healthcare Defense Partnership, and 350 Yakima Climate Action were all present, along with Maria Beltran, the former Legislative District fourteen Democratic candidate for the State Senate and current Democratic candidate for Congressional District 4, John Duresky. Together, we stood in protest against cuts to Medicaid and ACA subsidies outside Congressional District four's Representative Do Nothing Dan Newhouse's office in downtown Yakima.
Do Nothing Dan Newhouse is a perfect example of a Republican on the ropes. He is incompetent, ineffectual, spineless, and obsequious, and despite these character traits of his, he has long been dismissed as merely benign, just a neutered mutt. His slow walking of conservation, his soft pedaling on immigration, his edging out of small farmers while supporting corporate farming, his passive aggressive leadership in wage suppression, his stalling of critical water projects, and much more have always been interpreted as "he is not that bad."
---
| | [](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvf2_nRpCKf83FBmE_XWFemWnBn9pTZ2I1WnV8e1F7zm0EIn5s2H-iqtC8C5U5mrTEbk1S4YCXTzkOLIkt04xOSWiPkaPH_fCHesV6tKnNuw_6erNkr0nXrnofd5BzmymXVbm54g8hdoAUBtubEg-Ay6ByjJbVRxucTEFNVsu_yseBW4efeBlg==&c=JVHI9lVOEfPiK__PejhQFivMCpuP9T8AGra9UZ_Oat8To9pSTIDZMg==&ch=D4t06brosLaac_ykJ-Y_ygKIjgHK1I2kfDUHx4IR6iStgrIiZFjOkg==)
---
| Unfortunately for Do Nothing Dan, he represents a high contrast district. Congressional District 4 is a place where the average household income is half the state average, where the majority of people depend on Medicaid, SNAP, and other assistance programs, where more than half of the population are second generation or newer American citizens and many remain undocumented, where two sovereign nations, the Yakama and the Colville, continue to endure hardship, where the fentanyl crisis is widespread, and where homelessness and food insecurity are epidemic. Yet he continues to support completely an administration that has placed these populations, our communities, in its cross hairs as the most undesirable of people whose rights, dignity, and in many cases very presence in this country are being stripped. Dan's almost silent shuffle through his obligations to the people of Congressional District 4 now sounds like thunder with every egregious vote he casts. He is literally attacking and harming the people he swore to represent. There is nothing that forty seven has done that is good, but we can say that his wrongdoing has shone a bright light upon his weak sycophants, and there is no longer anywhere for them to hide.
---
| |
---
| Looking only at Medicaid cuts, there are four provisions that we must hold Dan and others like him accountable for because these changes will devastate rural areas.

1. Mandating that adults who are eligible for Medicaid through the ACA expansion meet work and reporting requirements. This is estimated to cut three hundred twenty six billion dollars. People in rural Washington already face limited job opportunities, unreliable transportation, and lower wages. By imposing work mandates on adults in rural areas, this provision condemns many to losing their healthcare based on circumstances entirely beyond their control.
2. Establishing a moratorium on new or increased provider taxes and reducing existing provider taxes in expansion states. This is estimated to cut one hundred ninety one billion dollars. States have few ways to generate their share of Medicaid funding. Provider taxes are one of the main tools they use. Limiting or reducing these taxes directly reduces the number of federal Medicaid dollars a state can draw down. This is not a legitimate cost saving measure. It is a calculated mechanism to deny Medicaid funding at the state level.
3. Revising the payment limit for state directed payments. This is estimated to cut one hundred forty nine billion dollars. This is likely the most destructive provision. Rural hospitals and nursing homes operate with lower reimbursements, higher costs, and fragile budgets. States often use directed payments to channel needed funds to rural programs. This provision would prevent states from directing money where it is needed most. The result will be closures of rural nursing homes, hospitals, and community health providers.
4. Increasing the frequency of eligibility redeterminations for the ACA expansion group. This is estimated to cut sixty three billion dollars. This provision is designed to remove eligible people from Medicaid by making the process burdensome and by expecting that people will be unable to comply or that the system will fail them. Either way, they are removed from coverage.

Do Nothing Dan may have been able to justify some of his actions if these were truly cost saving measures. But they are not. They are cruel parlor tricks designed to deny benefits to people who need them desperately, and that is indefensible. It is pure cowardice. We have long known that MAGA cannot formulate real policy, and although there was a chance they might reduce costs, it is clear the only thing they are capable of is running a con. Cruel and incompetent.

---
| |
---
The data and narrative below is provided by Progressive Strategies Northwest
Voter Turnout: Long Term Care
In Washington's 2025 election, Washington State voters authorized the state's Long-Term Care tax to be invested in the stock market by a margin of about 16 points (58% to 42%). The measure -- supported by many labor unions and progressive organizations -- did especially well in King County and among Democratic voters. However, like many ballot measures, it had interesting cross-coalitional support. The measure did well in areas with higher-income and older voters, but struggled in some tax-averse, working-class communities.
The most supportive rural areas tended to be more progressive, and higher in income and education rate, with retirement areas somewhat over-represented. Although just beyond the top performance list, many Hispanic and Native American communities (here represented by Nespelem) ranked highly.
---
| |
---
The lowest-performing rural communities tended to be highly conservative, with mostly white electorates. Most are in Eastern Washington, although portions of increasingly conservative, working-class Grays Harbor County also appear on the list.
---
|
---
| |
---
## Expanding Our Reach and Strengthening Our Voice

We strive for constant growth because standing still is not an option. Rural Americans United is currently in discussions with Help Save America and Prosperity Eastern Washington, a pro democracy group working in Congressional District five. Their focus is placing pro democracy messages on billboards in rural communities.
This direction aligns closely with the work Rural Americans United has been pursuing for years. We have been delivering pro democracy messages to rural communities across Washington State through radio, direct mail, digital outreach, and community partnerships. If we are to fulfill our vision and cultivate a rural America where justice, inclusion, and informed voices prevail, we must ensure that every child born in this country is protected by the strength and resolve of the people.
We will continue to fight fascism, defend our democratic values, and drown out the false and hateful narratives of MAGA. Rural communities deserve truth, dignity, and representation, and we will not back down in this fight.

---
---
| |
---

---

---
Rural Americans United

name: Haley
subject: I'm humbly asking one more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got my note

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1416%2E49239%2EOq-Qjt)
null, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 40 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and**I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking one more time:[Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9000?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1416%2E49239%2EOq-Qjt)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9000?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1416%2E49239%2EOq-Qjt)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.

Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: What I'm hearing from folks like you
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9001?t=4&akid=1416%2E49239%2EOq-Qjt)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save over 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role in passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now so I can continue fighting for Michigan's working families in the U.S. Senate.
But with polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign today? My team set an ambitious goal to get 10,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 40% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9000?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1416%2E49239%2EOq-Qjt)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9000?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1416%2E49239%2EOq-Qjt)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9000?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1416%2E49239%2EOq-Qjt) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9001?t=8&akid=1416%2E49239%2EOq-Qjt)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Democrats running in must-win races across the country are already getting pummeled with attacks from billionaire-backed GOP groups.
#
We’ve got some bad news, Peter: **Democrats running in must-win races across the country are already getting pummeled with well-funded GOP attacks.**
Billionaire-backed groups are pouring millions of dollars into these races — and we’re still about a year away from the 2026 elections! **[Will you help us fight back now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98264?refcode=em20251123-9758&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9758%2E614464%2EjxW7jr)**

We can’t afford to fall behind this early. The simple truth is that if we don’t start organizing and building our war chest now, we could risk letting MAGA Republicans define the narrative and keep their control over the Senate AND the House.
Over the coming weeks + months, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us prepare for the fight ahead. **We need the resources to help Democrats in must-win races introduce themselves to voters while also standing up to the inevitable onslaught of GOP attacks.[Will you rush a donation of any amount today to help us do it?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98264?refcode=em20251123-9758&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9758%2E614464%2EjxW7jr)**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Before the week starts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1966%2E791427%2E3Mvr2s)
Friend — Thanksgiving is coming up this week!
I know everyone is looking forward to getting together with friends and family this week and giving thanks for the happy parts of life.
That said, holidays are a bit of a struggle for our campaign, because to be honest, most folks don’t want to spend their holiday reading fundraising emails like these. And we really don’t want to bother you, either.
The problem is that on November 30th, three days after Thanksgiving, we are up against a midnight fundraising deadline. Any slowdown in our fundraising means we miss our goal.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in today and help us get through the next week without falling behind.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov25.AgDe-P&refcode=em251123-1-180&t=2&akid=1966%2E791427%2E3Mvr2s)
A $10 donation from just 5% of the folks reading this email right now would be enough to help us hit our goals a week early and continue to invest in a winning grassroots campaign that proudly fights for our progressive ideals.
And as an added promise from me, if you chip in $10 or higher today, we won’t reach out again until after the deadline is over.
**[So what do you say? Can you help us get ahead so we can stay on the path to victory? Make a contribution here:**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov25.AgDe-P&refcode=em251123-1-180&t=3&akid=1966%2E791427%2E3Mvr2s)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[CHIP IN $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-nov25.pfG4Bl&amount=%3D10&refcode=em251123-1-180&t=4&akid=1966%2E791427%2E3Mvr2s)**
---
****
| **[CHIP IN MORE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-nov25.pfG4Bl&refcode=em251123-1-180&t=5&akid=1966%2E791427%2E3Mvr2s)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for anything you can contribute today, and for being a part of this incredible team.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=1966%2E791427%2E3Mvr2s)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=1966%2E791427%2E3Mvr2s)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=8&akid=1966%2E791427%2E3Mvr2s)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=1966_791427_3Mvr2s&akid=1966%2E791427%2E3Mvr2s)**.

Washington D.C., 20033

clean_body: Peter - We can't afford to lose your support! I've come to truly appreciate your support. I know everything you've given to get us to where we are today. But, I wanted to inform you that your is up for renewal. I'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to renew today. appreciate your support. Just know I'm only asking because you are someone I truly value. In the end, this membership is one of the most important things you can do for our movement. I look forward to hearing back from you. God bless, Speaker Mike Johnson| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

I'm **Pastor Lucas Miles** , and I have the honor of serving as the Senior Director of **TPUSA Faith** -- the church outreach arm of **Turning Point USA.** Our mission is simple but urgent: To build a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families in Christ.We train pastors.We unite congregations.We reach the next generation on college campuses.And we remind America that there is still truth worth standing for.You might be seeing the darkness in our culture -- the confusion, the moral drift, the pressure on Christians to stay silent.But here's the good news: **the Church is waking up.** All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down."_This is what **Charlie prayed for.** This is what I've dedicated my life to help lead.And now, I want to invite _you_ to be part of it.More pastors are asking for guidance.More churches are joining every week. More young people are hungry for answers -- for discipleship, for identity, for truth.And we must be ready to meet them.This is our moment, Friend.A once-in-a-generation opportunity to strengthen the Church -- not just for today, but for the decades to come. If you believe America needs a stronger Church -- one that speaks truth in love and refuses to bow to "Woke" ideology -- then I'd be honored to have you stand with us.**[Your gift today will help us:](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=a2721e8442814ea4a364e9622824cc66&_e=_muTGGPXng2WG2zWD2Og-yJQsDn3TPIBTDpV9S95p56jXDk_unl5QDZ3LUI0h3UmtQi4wEFdgwYj18Yg3yqXWFfDdBcZZwiqtnaUuIrZXXyKijPHmBZr4b4OJ_t1KEr3ht1W7Ds8mnDfTijvrkag1y4sKf02DJ-E7avo-I9mTY2VikMptsezy8g9a5qYJ5O2LTeyO-nlI1_jI1ZaJpyCyGQ-_JGk1m1PSygv4T__2J3bP8odBCmc5cOfLYfum1bcf4V1P-By8IrSVKOwg24YkhbacbO8b0-d7wXBFIrjOsEvSuzovByEBOe4KnzraIVDrIwqxB8LQAqgDOV8pd0C5YForXT0evius6q3Nd_xGhuGe92k3u2MOBa6oT3LrMM9djx7zSfOPM3_Jju34oHCZ6c1RNv-lHGiTtELLPaFm05MoQF-kimvOqGCZg8m4MHh4heEyDJoPJOhxk_9rB9gHIWv04nMfo0Oy4iOZZhv-5kQNYSB-hk-q7izAemISKBtesTfTXZoZiva9z--ala7aUIWkiZCZStq94FMb46PWJ3VjY8VJHuUPwl9r_lBitY3IgHnNCSko0kdOKLbCJ8fDZiKU_7sBdld407S-b6Cdh51qpNyjvfwRMmXVJeGXDFb7iHCyYtbLJmF33nPxNq9LrLZytiVATvFfJsvuHleprCA6_AvovlWFWadZz3nYoSk_RYpywSLOPz6cdoZa0RPDPfanqD7EHKiKVHljU4Pi5nBw5emJwBl7zumJF4eZdyVzJiKI-YF3sGAjUIKxnRsmQ%3D%3D)**

He wanted to see a generation return to God, and a Church unafraid to preach the truth -- no matter the cost.And today, that vision is becoming reality.📈 Our church network has doubled , now connecting with more than 8,000 congregations across America. 💥 Our online reach has surged by 1,000% , spreading the message of biblical truth and courage farther than ever before.🙌 And over 200,000 new people -- pastors, parents, and America- loving young believers -- have joined this movement of faith and conviction. That's not just growth.That's revival. And I'm humbled to witness it. God is at work. And we need your support. I'm Pastor Lucas Miles , and I have the honor of serving as the Senior Director of TPUSA Faith -- the church outreach arm of Turning Point USA. Our mission is simple but urgent: To build a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families in Christ.We train pastors.We unite congregations.We reach the next generation on college campuses.And we remind America that there is still truth worth standing for.You might be seeing the darkness in our culture -- the confusion, the moral drift, the pressure on Christians to stay silent.But here's the good news: the Church is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down."This is what Charlie prayed for. This is what I've dedicated my life to help lead.And now, I want to invite you to be part of it.More pastors are asking for guidance.More churches are joining every week. More young people are hungry for answers -- for discipleship, for identity, for truth.And we must be ready to meet them.This is our moment, Friend.A once-in-a-generation opportunity to strengthen the Church -- not just for today, but for the decades to come. If you believe America needs a stronger Church -- one that speaks truth in love and refuses to bow to "Woke" ideology -- then I'd be honored to have you stand with us. Equip pastors to lead boldly and biblically. Expand the network from 8,000 to 10,000+ congregations. Reach more young people with the Gospel and the truth about liberty. Keep the light of truth shining in every corner of this nation. Charlie 's legacy continues -- And right now, that looks like revival.It looks like churches filling with life.It looks like believers standing together for God's truth.America needs strong churches -- and strong churches need friends like you. Will you take your stand today?Pressing forward, Pastor Lucas Miles Senior Director, TPUSA Faith P.S. Since September 10 , more than 4,000 new churches have joined the TPUSA Faith network. Each one represents a pastor choosing courage over comfort -- and believers hungry for truth.Your first gift today will help equip them with resources, training, and connection. $25 helps resource a pastor stepping into this movement. $50 helps reach young people returning to church. $100+ strengthens the growing network of churches uniting for revival.This is a once-in-a-generation moment.Charlie 's vision is alive.Let's build a stronger Church -- together. 4940 East Beverly RoadPhoenix, Arizona 85044

name: The Democratic Party
subject: It’s go time
body:
---
Derek, **This year showed that when Democrats are willing to buckle down, do the work, and invest in every single state, we can win big and overperform _everywhere._** And if we want a shot at winning even bigger in 2026 — flipping both the House and the Senate — to fight back against Trump and Republicans’ continual abuse of power, _we have to get to work now._ With the help of our team of grassroots supporters this year, we were able to:
* Invest in every single state Democratic party — red, blue, and everywhere in between —- to ensure that local Democrats had the resources they needed to reach their constituents.
* Hold town halls in all 50 states, meeting voters where Republicans weren’t willing to.
* Organize across the country to ensure that voters turned out for Democrats up and down the ballot.

**We proved that to win anywhere, we have to organize everywhere. But our work doesn’t stop here.** Derek, we know that around this time of year, elections tend to start escaping folks’ minds as they leave Election Day in the rearview. But here’s the truth: Our work doesn’t slow down. At the DNC, we’re already looking ahead to 2026, and we know that to win big again in November, we need to start collecting resources now to start investing and organizing all over the country. [**If work like this is important to you, we’re asking you to chip in $7 or whatever you can to help us lay the groundwork to elect Democrats nationwide next year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251123_5372_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5372_22930333_ETNrrk&akid=5372%2E22930333%2EETNrrk) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251123_5372_fr&refcode2=5372_22930333_ETNrrk&akid=5372%2E22930333%2EETNrrk)**

name: Team Emmer
subject: Karoline Leavitt needs you now.
body:
They can't handle the truth, Peter.
Karoline Leavitt, President Donald J. Trump's Press Secretary, is under fire from the Radical Left. They're trying to silence her because she's been exposing their lies and holding them accountable.
But Karoline won't back down. She's a true leader who's standing up for what's right, even in the face of intense criticism. She's fighting for the values we hold dear: God, Family, and Country.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: You can't seperate the postal service and voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
WaPo - Opinion: A frantic warning from 100 leading experts: Our democracy is in grave danger [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112325_2&amount=25]
We’ll keep this short, Team: those experts are right.
The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy.
Now Trump, DOGE, and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's.
“ Our entire democracy is now at risk ,” they wrote. “ History will judge what we do at this moment. ”
With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP.
Team, none of this happens without all of us doing our fair share. Step up to fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today to try and stop the destruction of our government, save our democracy, and protect the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112325_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112325_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112325_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112325_2&amount=50]

Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112325_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112325_2&amount=20]

name: Team Elissa Slotkin
subject: Elissa Slotkin responds to President Trump’s death threats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
President Trump's threats have real world consequences

Peter -
We're writing to share a short clip from Elissa Slotkin on Chris Hayes' show a few days ago, discussing President Trump's threats yesterday to arrest, prosecute, and hang her.
But before we do we're asking all supporters if they are able to make a small but meaningful donation to stand with Elissa and Abigail Spanberger today.
President Trump's threats have real world consequences. Immediately after his tweetstorm, Elissa received a tidal wave of death threats, and she is now under 24-hour security protection.
But, to Elissa, this story isn't about her -- it's about all of us. It's about America. President Trump wants to use fear as a weapon to silence those who disagree with him. But we know that's contrary to what's made America an exceptional nation. And nothing will stop Elissa from standing up and speaking out to protect the country we all love.
[_**So, your split contribution to Abigail Spanberger and Elissa Slotkin will help Elissa support candidates in Michigan and across America who will also stand up for our country, for our Constitution, and our way of life.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119854348/584479729/1596797170?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-11-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjZlOGZlYTItZDFjOC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T_gktKT-j3aj3fzQNeg3ooR8Iik3tqWbbAkAPrxUoNE=)

clean_body: President Trump's threats have real world consequences Peter - We're writing to share a short clip from Elissa Slotkin on Chris Hayes' show a few days ago, discussing President Trump's threats yesterday to arrest, prosecute, and hang her. But before we do we're asking all supporters if they are able to make a small but meaningful donation to stand with Elissa and Abigail Spanberger today. President Trump's threats have real world consequences. Immediately after his tweetstorm, Elissa received a tidal wave of death threats, and she is now under 24-hour security protection. But, to Elissa, this story isn't about her -- it's about all of us. It's about America. President Trump wants to use fear as a weapon to silence those who disagree with him. But we know that's contrary to what's made America an exceptional nation. And nothing will stop Elissa from standing up and speaking out to protect the country we all love. = = = = = = = Now... A few days ago, Elissa went on Chris Hayes to talk about President Trump's threats against her. She knows America is better than this, and we think you'll be interested in watching this clip. When you're done, please share it with your friends. The United States of America gave Elissa everything she has. She's not going to shut up just because Donald Trump is threatened by her. Thanks for standing with Elissa over the years. We wouldn't be here without it. name: GOTV PAC
subject: Have you ever heard of the “six year itch?”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Did you see the article in The Washington Post this weekend about the "six-year itch?"
Historically, the sixth year of a presidency triggers a wave against the president's party, and Trump's second term is following the usual rules, with the cracks in his coalition widening fast.
For the first time since he returned to the White House, independents are abandoning him, and his approval rating with them has dropped below 30 percent. Races once written off as safe Republican seats are tightening because voters fed up with prices, health costs, and endless chaos are shifting away from MAGA candidates.
That creates real openings -- but only if Democrats turn out, and that’s exactly our mission.
Will you chip in $10 or $20 to power the turnout programs that turn these trends into wins? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11232025]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11232025]
– GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

clean_body: Paid for by her own administration! | Fellow Patriot, After back to back polls showed us LEADING the governor’s race, Kathy Hochul has been labeled the most vulnerable governor in America. Now, grassroots Americans like YOU have the chance to deal the FINAL BLOW to her increasingly desperate reelection campaign. You see, the State of New York unlocks matching funds at a rate of 6-to-1 once a candidate hits the fundraising benchmarks written into state law. This REAL 600% MATCH was Communist Zohran Mamdani’s secret weapon – and he took full advantage of it by raising over $11 MILLION in matching funds! That cash proved vital to his stunning victory in New York City. But with your help, we can turn Mamdani’s secret weapon against his puppet governor Kathy Hochul by unlocking the LEGAL MAXIMUM amount of matching funds to FIRE her! Hochul and her allies know her only hope of winning reelection is to BUY the governor’s race, so when we unlock this REAL 600% MATCH, they’re going to see it as a devastating setback. Just think about it, Fellow Patriot... Kathy Hochul will wake up one morning to discover that her own administration has to pay out a REAL 600% MATCH on thousands of grassroots contributions to FIRE her from office! She’s going to be furious! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: I'm running for Congress!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111725_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111725_1]
It's official...
I'm running to represent NY-12 in Congress! This is the district where I was born and raised, and the place that five generations of my family have called home.
Hi Peter, I'm Jack Schlossberg, and my grandfather, President Kennedy, is my hero.
In high school, I spent hours watching his speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. And that's exactly why I'm running for Congress.
This isn't going to be your average campaign — we’re at the forefront of a movement backed by real people who are ready for a new generation of leadership. I won't be bought or intimidated. Instead, I'll be relying on folks like you. So, if you're willing to be one of the first donors to my campaign, will you split a donation between myself and Real Texas PAC right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111725_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111725_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111725_1&amount=25]
I've always been passionate about politics — you can probably gather as much if you've seen any of my social media posts :) I pride myself on my hot (correct!) takes. But public service has always been my driving force. I come from a long legacy of public service, from my great-great-grandparents to my mother, Caroline Kennedy.
I have big shoes to fill. I've known it all my life. But this is even bigger than living up to my family name. This is about serving the people of New York — the city that shaped me into the person I am today.
Right now, our country is in crisis. Donald Trump and his buddies (my cousin RFK Jr. — to name just one) are tanking the economy, attacking free speech, and sowing distrust in decades of scientific research.
We need to revive empathy and effort. I want to be excited and feel hopeful about our future, and I want my fellow New Yorkers to feel the same way. I believe in a politics that works for the people it was intended to serve, and I'm ready to fight for it.
And Peter, I happen to think caring is cool.
None of this will be easy. But in the words of my grandfather, I'm doing this "Not because it is easy but because it is hard."
Together, we can build a new Congress and a New York City that works for everyone. Will you join our movement today by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Real Texas PAC ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111725_1]
Talk soon,
Jack
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-adelita?refcode=111725_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-adelita?refcode=111725_1]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

Friend,

# **I want to try and get to Heaven.**

I’m blessed to be alive, but there are times I think about being on that stage in Butler, hearing a loud crack in the distance, feeling the hand of God tilt my head at the very last millisecond, and that bullet pierce through my skin.
He didn’t save me for a participation trophy.
He saved me because I have a date with Heaven, just not yet... and the only way I earn my place there is by finishing the mission He spared me for: saving America.

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
The same people who spent nine years trying to jail me, bankrupt me, and bury me are awake right now too, plotting how to sabotage mass deportations, block the biggest tax cuts ever, and keep their endless wars going.
They’re terrified, and terrified people are dangerous.
**_[That’s why I just activated an EMERGENCY: 12-HOUR “NEVER SURRENDER” FUNDRAISING BLITZ.>>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
Goal: 75,000 contributions before sunrise. If we come up short, who knows what will happen.
[JOIN THE FIGHT](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Please make an immediate gift—$47 for the 47th President, $100, $250, or even just $17—so we can finish what God started on that field in Pennsylvania.
**_[This private link EXPIRES at sunrise → RUSH YOUR GIFT BEFORE DAWN → STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP. >>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
I’ll never surrender.
May God bless you,
Donald J. Trump **_[]()_**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 11/23/2025
body:
A statewide reporting failure, 3,674 campaign-finance violations, and an election scandal caught on camera — all ignored by Colorado media.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**November 23, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Hey friends — Team RMV here.
Colorado’s political establishment — and much of the statewide media — paid little attention to three major stories this week that raise serious questions about election integrity, accountability, and public trust. But _you_ saw them. _We_ reported them. And together, we’re making sure the truth can’t be buried.

Today, we want to walk you through the **three biggest stories in Colorado this week** — the ones Rocky Mountain Voice had the courage to publish.

**1.[A statewide election-reporting failure — and the state tried to hide it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** El Paso County’s canvass didn’t just catch a typo — it blew open a systemic error in the Secretary of State’s Election Night Reporting system that inflated ballot totals by the thousands.
RMV’s investigation revealed: ➡️ 7,234 excess ballots reported by the SOS in the District 5 Commissioner race
➡️ 1,495 excess ballots in the Fountain mayor race ➡️ 2,768 excess ballots in the Cheyenne Mountain D12 race
Clerks told RMV the SOS has known about this defect for _nearly four years_ , yet never fixed it. And when clerks began comparing numbers this month, the state quietly **removed the public reporting files** with no announcement, no correction, and no explanation. This is the biggest election-reporting failure Colorado has faced in years — and somehow, every other media outlet looked away.
**2.[A campaign-finance firestorm: 3,674 alleged violations by Weiser, Bennet, and Griswold](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** While Democrats lecture the rest of the country about “defending democracy,” RMV uncovered a very different reality inside their own campaigns.
This past week: ➡️ 1,988 violations were filed against AG Phil Weiser ➡️ 1,194 violations against Sen. Michael Bennet ➡️ 492 violations against Jena Griswold — already upheld by the Attorney General’s office
That’s **3,674 alleged violations from three of the state’s top Democratic figures** — including missing donor names, addresses, employer information, and systematic failures to meet disclosure laws. Watchdog Ethan Augreen put it plainly: _“This is a statewide pattern of noncompliance.”_ Yet again, not a single newsroom outside RMV has touched it.
**3.[“Clear on camera, dismissed on paper”: The election case the DA refused to touch](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ([Part 1](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) / [Part 2](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.))** In Teller County, RMV broke a story that would be national news anywhere else. Fire Chief Erik Holt discovered potential election-law violations on security footage — violations DA investigators themselves described as “clear” on video.
The evidence included: ➡️ A watcher recording the voting area on a laptop ➡️ Watchers clicking counters as voters entered ➡️ Watchers inside the 100-foot boundary ➡️ Audio of a watcher saying, “as long as you didn’t vote for Thompson or Snare”
Investigators measured distances, isolated audio, interviewed witnesses, and built a complete case. Then the DA’s office — the same office that did prosecute a different election case weeks later — **refused to file charges.**
RMV’s companion report shows [what unfolded during the uncertified transition](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.): The incoming board acted before being sworn in, froze district bank accounts, pressured Holt for passwords and internal access, and fired Holt the day after he warned investigators he was being retaliated against.
This is one of the most important whistleblower cases in the state — and still, silence from the press.
**Why this matters:** These aren’t small stories. These aren’t clerical errors. These are systemic failures — in reporting, in compliance, in prosecution, and in transparency.
Colorado voters deserve to know the truth. And thanks to you — reading, sharing, and demanding better — the truth is getting out.
2026 is coming fast. RMV will keep doing what the rest won’t: digging, documenting, and defending the integrity of this state.
Stay sharp, stay bold, and stay in the fight.
— Team RMV
---
| | |
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Campaign-finance storm erupts as Weiser, Bennet and Griswold face 3,674 alleged violations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) VIA [COLORADO BASED NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado’s 2026 election landscape was shaken today as two major new campaign-finance complaints were filed against gubernatorial candidates Philip Weiser and Michael Bennet, bringing the statewide total to 3,674 alleged violations by three of the Colorado Democratic Party’s most prominent candidates.
**[The numbers didn’t match: El Paso’s canvass exposes a statewide reporting failure the state never explained](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado voters expected a routine post–Election Day canvass after the November 4 coordinated election. Instead, El Paso County became ground zero for the latest crisis involving Secretary of State Jena Griswold’s office after a canvass board member noticed that the numbers on the state’s website didn’t match the county’s certified reports.
__
**[TPUSA approval sparks chaos at Fort Lewis College: Assault reported after professor emeritus erupts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Fort Lewis College in Durango erupted into chaos on November 7th after the Associated Students of Fort Lewis College (ASFLC) reversed an earlier decision and voted to approve a Turning Point USA (TPUSA) chapter on campus. What began as a routine appeal meeting ended with a reported assault, shouting, and a professor emeritus’s profanity-filled outburst—all recorded on video that has since gone viral.

|
---
**STATE**
**[Griswold Leads Democratic Secretaries of State Pressing DOJ and DHS Over Federal Use of Voter Data](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold is leading a group of Democratic election officials challenging the Trump administration over how federal agencies are using requested voter roll data. Their concerns are detailed in a four-page letter to Attorney General Pam Bondi and Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem.
__
**[Colorado Accused of Abandoning Constitution in Handling of Tina Peters Case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ILLINOIS REVIEW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Colorado officials want the public to believe that keeping former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters in prison is justice. But when a woman’s health is collapsing, when she is rapidly declining, and when her continued confinement now poses a direct threat to her life, the law tells a very different story._

**[Colorado’s auto theft reckoning: A crisis we built, a crisis we can fix](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Colorado didn’t become the nation’s auto theft capital by accident. It got there through a decade of choices that treated working families’ cars like disposable assets. Lawmakers downgraded the theft of “low-value” vehicles to a low-level offense and sold it as reform. They never explained the part where families would carry the cost.
_
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[The Press Has Become the Enemy of Truth and The Epstein Pattern Proves It](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _There was a time in this country when journalism meant something. It meant moral courage. It meant truth telling. It meant pulling corruption into the light even if it scorched the powerful. That era is gone. The modern press no longer defends truth. It orchestrates narratives. It does not expose the darkness. It manages it._

**[Trump said release the Epstein files—now Congress agrees](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Congress finally did what Washington avoided for years. The House went 423 to 1 and the Senate—unanimously. Washington doesn’t move like that unless people feel something shifting under their feet. Whatever held this shut is starting to give way._

**[Video From Six Democrat Lawmakers Warns Troops Against Unlawful Commands](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Six Democratic lawmakers on Tuesday urged United States military service members to “refuse illegal orders,” in a video that appeared to criticize the Trump administration’s crime and illegal immigration crackdowns. __
_**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Colorado detransitioner’s story anchors Protect Kids Colorado event on safeguarding vulnerable children](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY ANTOINETTE DE LA CRUZ, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _My name is Antoinette. I am a detransitioner. And I want to save Colorado’s children from enduring the anguish I’ve been through. I began exploring transitioning into a man during my late teenage years and spent nearly 20 years trying to turn myself into a man before I realized my mistake._
**[CU Denver Puts Its Pro-Hamas Hate on Full Display](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY AHNAF KALAM, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Every so often, a university event accidentally tells the truth about the institution hosting it. The recent panel on November 19, “Gaza: Two Years On” at the University of Colorado Denver – my alma mater – was one such moment: a rare occasion when the carefully maintained façade of academic neutrality collapsed, revealing the fetid ideological machinery underneath._
**[Clear on camera, dismissed on paper](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A fire chief knows what a five-alarm emergency looks like. When something is burning, he responds. He doesn’t wait for someone else to handle it. That was the mindset Erik Holt carried in 2023 when the security cameras inside his fire station began showing behavior that made him stop, rewind the footage, and stare.

**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[A Miracle in Our Midst: Celebrating Pastor John Water’s Successful Liver Transplant](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Every now and then, a moment arrives that stops us in our tracks and reminds us of the sheer goodness and mercy woven into the fabric of life. This is one of those moments. Just two days ago, our Lead Pastor at Elevating Life Church in Fort Morgan, CO, Pastor John Waters, received a donor liver and came through surgery with flying colors._ __
**[Colorado’s Land Board swaps agriculture for a revenue experiment](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _“The Colorado State Board of Land Commissioners (State Land Board) has approved the acquisition of the approximately 800-acre Lake Fork Ranch, located just west of Leadville in Lake County.” Governor Polis, DNR Director Dan Gibbs, and State Land Board Director Nicole Rosmarino all gushed about the new acquisition._ __

**[Colorado’s “Reform Paradox”: Falling Recidivism, Rising Violence, and the Real-World Cost of Dangerous Releases](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The Common Sense Institute’s October report shows Colorado’s three-year recidivism rate falling from about 52 percent in 2019 to near 31 percent in 2022. On paper that looks like improvement. In practice, the number tells only a small piece of the story._ __

**[Preparing for Battle — The Full Armor of God](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _When Peter wrote these words, he wasn’t describing a paranoid state of mind—he was describing a prepared one. Being alert and sober-minded means living fully awake—alert in God’s love and clear-minded in Christ’s truth._
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---

|

clean_body: A statewide reporting failure, 3,674 campaign-finance violations, and an election scandal caught on camera — all ignored by Colorado media. | | | | November 23, 2025 SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST | | Hey friends — Team RMV here. Colorado’s political establishment — and much of the statewide media — paid little attention to three major stories this week that raise serious questions about election integrity, accountability, and public trust. But you saw them. We reported them. And together, we’re making sure the truth can’t be buried. Today, we want to walk you through the three biggest stories in Colorado this week — the ones Rocky Mountain Voice had the courage to publish. 1. El Paso County’s canvass didn’t just catch a typo — it blew open a systemic error in the Secretary of State’s Election Night Reporting system that inflated ballot totals by the thousands. RMV’s investigation revealed: ➡️ 7,234 excess ballots reported by the SOS in the District 5 Commissioner race ➡️ 1,495 excess ballots in the Fountain mayor race ➡️ 2,768 excess ballots in the Cheyenne Mountain D12 race Clerks told RMV the SOS has known about this defect for nearly four years , yet never fixed it. And when clerks began comparing numbers this month, the state quietly removed the public reporting files with no announcement, no correction, and no explanation. This is the biggest election-reporting failure Colorado has faced in years — and somehow, every other media outlet looked away. 2. While Democrats lecture the rest of the country about “defending democracy,” RMV uncovered a very different reality inside their own campaigns. This past week: ➡️ 1,988 violations were filed against AG Phil Weiser ➡️ 1,194 violations against Sen. Michael Bennet ➡️ 492 violations against Jena Griswold — already upheld by the Attorney General’s office That’s 3,674 alleged violations from three of the state’s top Democratic figures — including missing donor names, addresses, employer information, and systematic failures to meet disclosure laws. Watchdog Ethan Augreen put it plainly: “This is a statewide pattern of noncompliance.” Yet again, not a single newsroom outside RMV has touched it. 3. ( / ) In Teller County, RMV broke a story that would be national news anywhere else. Fire Chief Erik Holt discovered potential election-law violations on security footage — violations DA investigators themselves described as “clear” on video. The evidence included: ➡️ A watcher recording the voting area on a laptop ➡️ Watchers clicking counters as voters entered ➡️ Watchers inside the 100-foot boundary ➡️ Audio of a watcher saying, “as long as you didn’t vote for Thompson or Snare” Investigators measured distances, isolated audio, interviewed witnesses, and built a complete case. Then the DA’s office — the same office that did prosecute a different election case weeks later — refused to file charges. RMV’s companion report shows : The incoming board acted before being sworn in, froze district bank accounts, pressured Holt for passwords and internal access, and fired Holt the day after he warned investigators he was being retaliated against. This is one of the most important whistleblower cases in the state — and still, silence from the press. Why this matters: These aren’t small stories. These aren’t clerical errors. These are systemic failures — in reporting, in compliance, in prosecution, and in transparency. Colorado voters deserve to know the truth. And thanks to you — reading, sharing, and demanding better — the truth is getting out. 2026 is coming fast. RMV will keep doing what the rest won’t: digging, documenting, and defending the integrity of this state. **_But they’ve stooped to a new low._**

name: Sounding the Alarm @ VPP
subject: Re: Your local Post Office.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Trump wants to DISMANTLE USPS!?!
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251123_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21978%2E878179%2EyqfXb-) **Millions of Americans rely on the USPS for bills, Social Security checks, medication, mail-in ballots, and more — _but Trump doesn’t care._**

We can’t let him PRIVATIZE and DESTROY it — but we NEED your help!

[**As a top grassroots Democrat, will you sign our petition to stand with the USPS? We need 150 signatures from your state today! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251123_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21978%2E878179%2EyqfXb-) | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH YOUR LOCAL USPS OFFICE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20251123_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21978%2E878179%2EyqfXb-)
---
**FACT #1:** Donald Trump has been foaming at the mouth to PRIVATIZE and DESTROY the U.S. Postal Service as we know it!

**FACT #2:** The USPS recently confirmed that more than 10,000+ postal workers will be laid off — _**your local post office could be next!**_

**FACT #3:** This is Trump’s latest attack on YOUR right to vote — he’s going after the USPS and mail-in ballots because he wants to RIG the 2026 election!

# [Maybe Trump did deserve the Nobel Peace Prize](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=179779362&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Nzc5MzYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM5NTUxMTcsImV4cCI6MTc2NjU0NzExNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MvELLy0GJg8DIayPiZP8lFZd2UiKa7NjqDrmYUpuavk)
### My reasoning might surprise both his supporters and his critics
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Nov 24
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=179779362&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Nzc5MzYyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2Mzk1NTExNywiZXhwIjoxNzY2NTQ3MTE3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.rDyG17ZWuYP8zUwPQ0LuXVXgV050NcSMiXUj2Tpi9Gc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=179779362&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Nzc5MzYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM5NTUxMTcsImV4cCI6MTc2NjU0NzExNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MvELLy0GJg8DIayPiZP8lFZd2UiKa7NjqDrmYUpuavk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/maybe-trump-did-deserve-the-nobel?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

I recently caught up with a dear friend & ex-girlfriend who now lives in Canada, where she works to develop climate resiliency projects as a water engineer. Among other things, we discussed current events, international diplomacy, the climate crisis that has largely defined her work, and the continuing [constitutional crisis](https://substack.com/redirect/5f19e124-bf7b-42ea-bbc0-51bf347ce2ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the United States, where she grew up.
When I shared with her my most recent thinking, she suggested that one thesis might be funny enough to justify a stand up routine. I share an appreciation for its irony, while intending the analysis sincerely.
Where is the line between observations of ironic reality and outright comedy?
You be the judge.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform --and inspire--your friends by sharing this post._
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=179779362&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Nzc5MzYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM5NTUxMTcsImV4cCI6MTc2NjU0NzExNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MvELLy0GJg8DIayPiZP8lFZd2UiKa7NjqDrmYUpuavk)
### **Hurtling into an abyss**
This weekend, a beleaguered global climate summit [concluded](https://substack.com/redirect/c3d4abbe-e866-4f34-b88e-20e2a0beea21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after high drama almost brought it to a premature end. More than 190 countries participated, while the U.S. conspicuously abstained due to President Trump's conviction that science is a hoax.
On the one hand, Cop30--the 30th United Nations Climate Change Conference--reflected seemingly important progress.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e4c6e2c6-f124-45df-ab29-9da15cac2ea0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For example, this "Conference of the Parties" to the U.N. Convention on Climate Change was hosted for the first time in Brazil, where substantial [deforestation](https://substack.com/redirect/78d12b3f-170a-4fd8-b841-1181ff31a419?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the Amazon has accelerated changes to the Earth's atmosphere that could (likely?) prove catastrophic to humanity in the not-so-distant future. But while Brazil is the site of activity that continues to crucially exacerbate the global climate calamity, the site of the discussion appeared more ironic than symbolic in the wake of the convening's results.
### **Solidarity, but not enough to meet the need**
Several agreements emerged from Cop30, including a critical new agreement related to adaptation finance, through which wealthy countries most responsible for the climate catastrophe pledged to pay more to poorer countries bearing the brunt of its impacts.
Less than two weeks before Cop30 began, Jamaica was pummeled by Hurricane Melissa, a [once-rare](https://substack.com/redirect/773ee17f-8256-41d4-9264-6cf27523361e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Category 5 storm that brought [winds up to 185mph](https://substack.com/redirect/8d9fdd85-dd24-4c10-83db-85671973076f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and 30 inches of rain. At least 32 Jamaicans died in the storm, before a [deadly outbreak of leptospirosis](https://substack.com/redirect/2c5cf95e-44a2-4fdd-be32-47e637660215?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a bacterial disease incubated by stagnant water that has killed at least half a dozen more.
The challenges confronted by Caribbean countries recovering from hurricanes illustrate the troubling human impacts of climate chaos. Natural disasters amplified by climate change have wrought [tremendous devastation](https://substack.com/redirect/1778f001-fa6f-4c7f-a2ea-e12bde83b353?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across the region--with more on the horizon, and no end in sight.
Even Puerto Rico, a territory of the United States, [continues](https://substack.com/redirect/389e4c75-5e3a-40cc-a84a-1ef1b4b3c2c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to recover nearly a decade after Hurricane Maria, which killed thousands and prompted $34 billion in recovery assistance from Washington. Most parts of the Caribbean, of course, have not enjoyed anything remotely resembling such support.
These challenges confronting the Caribbean help explain why a compromise reached on Saturday was so significant. It aims to increase the financing available to poor nations confronting the impacts of global warming, while remaining vastly inadequate relative to the expanding need.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..0rELkw1U27mYa0WtC4teII1SvDvEV6UO0_su9pvwkyI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=179779362)
For instance, at COP29 last year, wealthy countries [agreed](https://substack.com/redirect/f8c46b9b-6367-4e01-baaa-d6a09ffebffa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to provide $300 billion to the Global South by 2035. But that amount aims to cover not only climate adaptation, but also mitigation, and loss and damage funding--and is envisioned as a target for wealthy countries to reach in a decade, while poor countries are already (in some cases, literally) underwater.
According to a representative who attended Cop30:
> The needs for adaptation are huge and growing--about $210 billion to $360 billion a year is estimated.
> You can get private sector money for things that make a profit, like clean energy; the banks will give you money for that because they make the investment back. No private sector company will invest in the things we need for adaptation, like ways to store water from the rains, or helping farmers to grow different crops.
> Developed countries don't want to give us the money, but they are supposed to. Under the Paris agreement, they agreed in article 9.1 to pay us. We know that we did not create this crisis--they did--but we are the ones who are suffering.
### **Ignoring the death trap of fossil fuel dependence**
Over 80 countries advocated at Cop30 for an agreement that would help support a [global transition away from fossil fuels](https://substack.com/redirect/b87bf227-3f61-4b7b-b949-136c2184f9b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but they were blocked by an equal number of others: the U.S., which refused to even attend; China, which attended but declined to take a leadership role given the absence of the U.S.; and petrostates including Saudi Arabia and Russia, which economically depend on fossil fuel exports and have widely been spared by natural disasters fueled by the climate crisis.
As a result, the agreements emerging from Cop30 omitted any reference to the fossil fuels driving climate chaos.
A member of the European parliament's delegation to Cop30 named Bas Eickhout [explained](https://substack.com/redirect/e52e85a4-3984-4d1c-8fe7-aacbe4108c6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the dynamic in simple terms:
> [N]o deal is better than a bad deal. Failure to reach an agreement on a roadmap to transition away from fossil fuels would not only be a big win for petrostates, but also for Trump and his hard-right allies. No one can seriously expect us to win the fight on the climate crisis if we don't deal with the elephant in the room: phasing out fossil fuels.
Latin American countries including Colombia, Panama and Uruguay also objected to the process, which Colombia's negotiator characterized as "[a] consensus imposed under climate denialism...a [failed agreement](https://substack.com/redirect/e50f05a2-26e2-4765-8891-b126ea52f171?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
Colombia joined the Netherlands in announcing plans to host a separate conference next year focused on the transition away from fossil fuels. Maina Talia, the environment minister of Tuvalu (an island nation in the South Pacific) [said](https://substack.com/redirect/e52e85a4-3984-4d1c-8fe7-aacbe4108c6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "We have taken this step because, simply, we cannot wait any longer. The Pacific came to Cop30 demanding a survival roadmap away from fossil fuels. Yet this text does not even name the threat to our existence. This process is failing us so we will not wait."
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=179779362&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Nzc5MzYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM5NTUxMTcsImV4cCI6MTc2NjU0NzExNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MvELLy0GJg8DIayPiZP8lFZd2UiKa7NjqDrmYUpuavk)
### **A saving grace?**
During the COVID-19 pandemic, global trade briefly ground to a halt, leading to a [measurable reduction](https://substack.com/redirect/ab3464cf-694d-440b-843b-51f2b5c38a4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in greenhouse gas emissions. For instance, one study estimated that, in April 2020, daily carbon dioxide emissions declined 17% from the preceding baseline.
This relationship between economic recession and reductions in greenhouse gas emissions is consistent. Another study [established](https://substack.com/redirect/0c59ed99-2adf-468b-bca7-71bc9ca47546?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that greenhouse gas emissions fell by 1.3% during the global depression following the 2008 financial crisis, but then increased by nearly 6% in 2010, bringing CO2 emission rates back to their preceding level.
These studies suggest that the most meaningful acts promoting climate justice are those that undermine industrial economies, erode capitalism, and build sustainable alternatives. As long as I'm on that subject, I urge every American to participate in a [consumer boycott](https://substack.com/redirect/aa02c36d-9fc7-438f-8240-50a01f22928e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this holiday season and beyond.
Meanwhile, as it happens, nothing in the past half century has done as much to devastate the global economy as the policies of the Trump administration. As part of an ongoing series, I've [written](https://substack.com/redirect/488f1026-8f7c-423d-86d9-4dfa46c74ca5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [three](https://substack.com/redirect/a16116ee-6b88-4512-8add-3b675eed5fe2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [posts](https://substack.com/redirect/0b1c2b67-fb05-433c-8ae3-d9ad4b8123c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this year exploring Trump's impact on the American economy. From ham-fisted tariffs to labor shortages driven by lawless immigration enforcement, Trump has done more to stop greenhouse gasses--by undermining the American economy--than any president in history.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=179779362&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Nzc5MzYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM5NTUxMTcsImV4cCI6MTc2NjU0NzExNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MvELLy0GJg8DIayPiZP8lFZd2UiKa7NjqDrmYUpuavk)
### **Abundant ironies**
Of course, the president is a relentless capitalist. His focus on wealth is so extreme that it appears to frequently eclipse his presidency, or alternatively [explain](https://substack.com/redirect/d4e145b5-2b3a-4dbc-8742-25b3ca4542ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it.
But while the figure of the president might be no less committed to capitalism than [his supposed antagonists](https://substack.com/redirect/59effa86-74bd-45c3-a852-754b2d090ffc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who have [enabled](https://substack.com/redirect/e60aceab-3584-4087-9343-2ccd2a6dd11d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) him for years, his policy legacy appears to be at odds with his personal aims.
Despite being a wealthy president who identifies primarily as a capitalist, Trump has done as much to diminish greenhouse emissions as any political figure in the world.
It is certainly ironic that someone widely described--even [by himself](https://substack.com/redirect/dbace209-ac5d-47f3-872f-7e34f707892c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--as a fascist would prove so inadvertently helpful in the global struggle for climate justice. But, given the scale of his (even unwitting) contribution, few figures seem to have done as much to deserve the Nobel prize committee's recognition.
