Find out how Ukraine conducted the most daring operation against the Russian war machine.

The name of the mission is already known. The consequences are irreversible.

[Watch the whole showdown - click now.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=efdc609911594ca0aa62f75ab2cab5c1&_e=xPwTXfriDB4uk4WXb_LWje_K6oTZGhYw9Oy2FHYn5aEL7hZWcYUkr68QqPgGyuTW9XEt5Old9Ew01ohVWmKBQFFO54Ihat_j3ears7rOf7GtkPorWfloNFQcbgBNhnGt37urCa_g4EM_tYfnVTp7OzEkCdlCOj7OdIVJrTYmNKNfuwEjmZLR0VSHhhRhO7hgINADDFfLVie4xh_-vtgEachwgQlLJaw_9C3AkM1nWiwvmhIC4oO-KH6yDWJ5j2ZTAi5J5kYPIU1Lg6QXUJZ1qWxHH4qbGm-PN-aEYug4OLxXXAQODGr_XqvOP52aZCuRQSh78AuwrCXt7x5trBpvJKkZXwRmo4OuaiszALv1rn1gsvn218jO4mIoVJsPaPvQQIXODKb1VvZELNvJSYG1_Qfd0MJJQhF0MolyIwutqMwh1zuq-toDYen3s7TySQJx5HbXFcsead0E6dDO7f7OXj7go6mywj61tRnLFNz0nFd5LLGA6vy1CuPqdAYhwyQsvDVzvEREf_tP7VbhXPkuy1nUkC3GYJrt9EuWpjTPK_fTILvCZSZ9tff01gAZqpIzW0_kl2n4eRWE0kKLJWrZvQ%3D%3D)

**Simmy Adelman, Editor**
_Behind the Markets_
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Hi Peter,

My name is Diana Bula, and, as the newest Her Bold Move team member, I am writing to introduce myself! I’m thrilled to announce that I will officially be serving as Political Manager at this incredible organization – and I couldn’t be more honored or excited.

Women and girls everywhere deserve to see themselves reflected on the ballot and in positions of power. **Joining Her Bold Move enables me to contribute to the effort to ensure women’s voices are heard and protected.**

Here’s a little about me:

I am a Latina immigrant who believes that every woman deserves unrestricted access to reproductive health care. I grew up in Texas, which has given me a firsthand perspective into how difficult it has been for women, especially those in my community, to access basic, fundamental reproductive healthcare.

**As I set my vision for Her Bold Move’s endorsement roster, I want us to make sure we’re uplifting women who often go overlooked. These are the changemakers who step up not because it’s easy, but because their communities deserve a voice.**

I will be searching for trailblazers from communities that have long been underrepresented; women stepping into races where support is scarce but the need for leadership is greatest. Her Bold Move candidates have been shattering ceilings, making history, and becoming the first to hold positions where women, and particularly women of color, have never been represented before.

**These are the kinds of candidates who don’t just want to win an election; they want to change the world. And together, Her Bold Move will help them do just that.**

clean_body: I am so excited to join Her Bold Move!| | | | | = Hi Peter, My name is Diana Bula, and, as the newest Her Bold Move team member, I am writing to introduce myself! I’m thrilled to announce that I will officially be serving as Political Manager at this incredible organization – and I couldn’t be more honored or excited. Women and girls everywhere deserve to see themselves reflected on the ballot and in positions of power. Joining Her Bold Move enables me to contribute to the effort to ensure women’s voices are heard and protected. Here’s a little about me: I am a Latina immigrant who believes that every woman deserves unrestricted access to reproductive health care. I grew up in Texas, which has given me a firsthand perspective into how difficult it has been for women, especially those in my community, to access basic, fundamental reproductive healthcare. As I set my vision for Her Bold Move’s endorsement roster, I want us to make sure we’re uplifting women who often go overlooked. These are the changemakers who step up not because it’s easy, but because their communities deserve a voice. I will be searching for trailblazers from communities that have long been underrepresented; women stepping into races where support is scarce but the need for leadership is greatest. Her Bold Move candidates have been shattering ceilings, making history, and becoming the first to hold positions where women, and particularly women of color, have never been represented before. These are the kinds of candidates who don’t just want to win an election; they want to change the world. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I am officially running for governor of New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.

You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z96iphaatmeokmj1f014bion00gd1dllf3s86b08_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1i6cpb1c9h2bs)
---
**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq1t1gla1d94gdmo48n30973mhp66stkc3mj59fo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1i6cpb1c9h2bs)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn’t just another election, Friend.
---
**_It’s the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ – _and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,_600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6a3sfvktf3os32v7chspnaiqj83bfmf73m6u8u0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1i6cpb1c9h2bs)
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zai04qd7c6tav3rpgm5crrn2t3sjtaldg5i0gg08_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1i6cpb1c9h2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z54sktshiefhi8oqmoc26s7c0dkfm89c883flk3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1c1i6cpb1c9h2bs)
---
Rep. Elise Stefanik
Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership

clean_body: | | | Peter, this is Republican Jason Cullen. I need you to read this message word-for-word. It’ll be quick. This is an emergency and we’re racing against the clock. THOUSANDS of Cuomo-supporting Democrats are FLEEING New York City and POURING into my battleground district. And here’s the worst part: No – they are DOUBLING DOWN on the failed, Democrat leadership that opened up our border, rigged our elections, and gave rise to communists like Zohran in the first place. This could spell DISASTER for House Republicans in 2026. This could spell DISASTER for AMERICA! If we fail to win this seat, Hakeem Jeffries will weaponize the Speaker’s Gavel to HAMMER DOWN on President Trump and punish Americans like YOU who voted for him. We’re talking: > IMPEACHMENTS > OPEN BORDERS> RIGGED ELECTIONS > VIOLENT CRIME You name it! The future of our country rides on this race. “Moderate” Cuomo-Democrats are flying into my district in DROVES. I refuse to surrender. I refuse to close the curtains on my campaign. The time to build our grassroots army is NOW. Will you help me HOLD THE LINE forRepublicans? DEADLINE TO RESPOND: 11:59PM TONIGHT! Paid for by Jason Cullen for Congress PO Box186, Manalapan, NJ, 07726 | |

name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: Respond to our Trump Satisfaction Survey before the clock strikes midnight >>
body:
Please respond before 11:59 PM!

| | | | Peter, we're so sorry to reach out like this, but your submission has been flagged as **[MISSING]** from our database! Senate Republicans released our brand-new [TRUMP SATISFACTION SURVEY](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyNF9ESC04WC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTk0MDMtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjRfREgtOFguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzU5NDAzLTEwNDMifQ/tT3Pj6Dlpwa3xENzRw-0RA) with the goal to have 100 completed submissions.
**So far, only 99 have responded... _which means we’re just waiting on YOU!_**
[ Peter, all responses will be immediately flagged for President Trump’s team, so it’s important that you help us complete our survey before midnight.
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyNF9ESC04WC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTk0MDMtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjRfREgtOFguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzU5NDAzLTEwNDMifQ/96gibCRUbpO744ec-wPC9Q)**Trump Satisfaction Survey**
**Registered to:** Peter**Due:** 11:59 PM (ET)1.) Do you approve of the ICE deportations of illegal aliens?2.) Do you approve of banning men from women’s sports?3.) Do you approve of tapping into American energy resources?4.) Do you approve of using our military to address the border crisis?5.) Do you approve of ending taxes on tips?_*** Optional Question: Are there any questions, comments, or concerns you’d like to share with your Republican Senate Majority? ***_[ TAKE THE SURVEY →
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyNF9ESC04WC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTk0MDMtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjRfREgtOFguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzU5NDAzLTEwNDMifQ/ak7vfEcGKXCuHNPakpUung)MAGA Republicans and our entire team look forward to hearing from you. Please don’t delay and risk our survey going incomplete!

Thank you,
_
Team Marsha Blackburn_[ TAKE THE SURVEY →

name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: Trump is already talking….
body:
Peter, I just got the most glowing endorsement...
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=112425_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=112425_1]
Jack Schlossberg here, letting you know that our campaign in New York's 12th District has reached the attention of the White House.
Here's how I see it: If we're making MAGA mad, we're doing something right.
Before we unpack this, if you want to get in on our 'ridiculous' campaign, these first 48 hours are what set the tone for the race, so chip in if you can! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=112425_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112425_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112425_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112425_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112425_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112425_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=112425_1&amount=25]
Earlier this week on MSNBC, I said that this admin is the most corrupt in our history – and I meant it. The disinformation that my cousin RFK Jr. is spreading is having real, deadly consequences. It doesn't take a genius to see he isn't making anybody healthier or safer.
No matter how much Karoline Leavitt wants people to believe that my cousin is "doing a phenomenal job bringing transparency and the gold standard of science back to our healthcare system," it doesn't make it true.
We need leaders who can face this fight head-on and call out corruption and lies when we see them.
I am ready to use my voice to stand up for truth, progress, and all of us. And I need you to have my back.
If the attacks are already coming from the top, it means we're on the right track. But we have our work cut out for us... Can I count on you to chip in? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=112425_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:

We're building a movement powered by people who know we deserve better, and I'm so glad to have you on the team. Let's keep it up !!
–Jack

[] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Earlier this week on MSNBC, I said that this admin is the most corrupt in our history – and I meant it. The disinformation that my cousin RFK Jr. is spreading is having real, deadly consequences. It doesn't take a genius to see he isn't making anybody healthier or safer. No matter how much Karoline Leavitt wants people to believe that my cousin is "doing a phenomenal job bringing transparency and the gold standard of science back to our healthcare system," it doesn't make it true. We need leaders who can face this fight head-on and call out corruption and lies when we see them. I am ready to use my voice to stand up for truth, progress, and all of us. And I need you to have my back. If the attacks are already coming from the top, it means we're on the right track. But we have our work cut out for us... Can I count on you to chip in? An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. | | , I recently sat down in Dallas with Jason Whitely of WFAA to talk about my campaign and I’m excited to share it with you. **Watch here:** [**Joe Jaworski on WFAA**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=1346be4b05&e=5d8d80652b) **[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=c1e62fac1c&e=5d8d80652b)** Texas will elect a new Attorney General in 2026, and this midterm environment strongly favors Democrats. My primary is competitive, and I intend to compete for every vote in every county. **Texas needs a fighter in this office** —someone who will defend the law, protect Texans’ freedoms, and restore integrity to a job that has been abused for far too long. As I said in the interview:
> _“We can’t survive another term of Greg Abbott or Ken Paxton’s successor. And I think what we need right now are people who are about economics, education, freedom of speech, and the Republican party is not that.”_
Please take a few minutes to watch and share the interview with your friends. **Every conversation helps us grow this movement.** And remember to mark your calendars. Early voting begins **February 17** , and the **Democratic Primary is March 3.** [**If you’re ready to help us fight for fairness and accountability, chip in today to keep this campaign moving forward.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=39b577d5d9&e=5d8d80652b) Onward,
**Joe Jaworski**

**

Peter, I had a feeling my social media presence would ruffle some feathers... but there's a method here. **And I had the honor of talking about it on MSNBC the other night.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119882927/584553724/-2024098675?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112425_SCHLOSSBERGSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGU3MmVjYy00OGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16LF2qzCz1CGpwKUyHe2WBleQxLhn_m473toBvLXqT4=) In today's media landscape, you have to cut through the noise to make an impact... You know I can have fun online, but **I'm serious about New Yorkers having leadership they can count on.** America is at a dangerous crossroads right now, and it's not the time to sit back and stay quiet to keep people comfortable. It's time to call out what's going on and actually do something to change our course. [NY-12 needs a congressperson who will meet this moment. Peter, I will be that leader. If you're with me, can I count on you to split a donation between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119882929/584553731/-2024098675?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112425_SCHLOSSBERGSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGU3MmVjYy00OGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16LF2qzCz1CGpwKUyHe2WBleQxLhn_m473toBvLXqT4=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119882931/584553734/-2024098675?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112425_SCHLOSSBERGSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGU3MmVjYy00OGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16LF2qzCz1CGpwKUyHe2WBleQxLhn_m473toBvLXqT4=)**

**If we continue on Trump's path, we face a country devoid of what makes us who we are: the land of opportunity, prosperity, and freedom.**
I've used my platform to take on the Trump administration, time and time again. I'm not afraid to call out injustice when I see it. And Peter, I'm not just here to stir the pot. **_I'm uniquely positioned to stand up for you and have a real impact._**
In order to get to Congress, we need to build a winning team of grassroots supporters like YOU.
I promise it's not about how much you give, it’s about having you on our side!! [Split a donation between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign to show your support! Even just $5 today makes an impact on the size and the strength of our movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119882933/584553737/-2024098675?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112425_SCHLOSSBERGSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGU3MmVjYy00OGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16LF2qzCz1CGpwKUyHe2WBleQxLhn_m473toBvLXqT4=)

We asked young New York Zohran Mamdani supporters why they support his most radical policies like keeping NYC a sanctuary city and keeping ICE agents out, freezing rents, and raising taxes even higher!
And it got pretty heated...
**[Watch what happened right here:](https://substack.com/redirect/d178d5df-a6aa-427c-9d14-be0a93095cea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d178d5df-a6aa-427c-9d14-be0a93095cea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d178d5df-a6aa-427c-9d14-be0a93095cea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Home Title Lock](https://substack.com/redirect/7a57e57f-5f6a-455b-a4c3-5afcf5fda965?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Protect Your Home from Title Theft and Fraud](https://substack.com/redirect/7a57e57f-5f6a-455b-a4c3-5afcf5fda965?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7a57e57f-5f6a-455b-a4c3-5afcf5fda965?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The FBI warns of **a rise in title fraud,** a crime where scammers use forged documents to steal a homeowner's ownership on records, often leaving victims unaware until it is too late.
**Criminals file fraudulent deeds, manipulate public records, and may even impersonate owners to gain control of a home.** If the stolen property is mortgaged or sold, it can create serious financial and legal consequences, including displacement, loss of property, emotional distress, and lengthy battles to reclaim it.
**Title fraud can affect anyone,** regardless of location, property type, or ownership duration. To protect your home and preventing irreversible damage, Homeowners are urged to monitor their records, check local filings, and watch for unexpected correspondence.
**[Beyond monitoring, Home Title Lock provides a comprehensive solution.](https://substack.com/redirect/000b350e-92ce-4256-bf66-ae654782b80b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Subscribers receive 24/7 monitoring of their title records, urgent alerts of any activity, access to a dedicated team of legal experts who act on their behalf, and full restoration services for properties that fall victim to fraud.
Backed by up to $1 million in restoration protection, Home Title Lock offers homeowners more than just awareness--they gain active protection, legal support, and the resources needed to reclaim and secure their property if title fraud occurs.
[Protect your home today](https://substack.com/redirect/000b350e-92ce-4256-bf66-ae654782b80b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Mamdani vows to maintain NYC sanctuary city status following friendly meeting with Trump**
New York City Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani **[confirmed Sunday during a Bronx church speech](https://substack.com/redirect/a021c0ef-7d16-4d03-8c7f-9b4b9b93df9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that he will keep the city's sanctuary city policies, telling parishioners he told President Trump directly that "New Yorkers want to follow the laws of our city" which allow city government contact with federal authorities for around 170 serious crimes, but his concern is immigrants "being arrested, detained, deported for the crime of making a regular court appearance."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/28016414-ad91-4204-b134-f4ba27de0b8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Declines to speculate on Trump 's reaction to policies:** When pressed by reporters outside the church, Mamdani declined to speculate how Trump would react to his immigration policies, saying "I'll let the president speak for himself, but I did make very clear that our focus comes back to public safety" while acknowledging "there may be disagreements between the president and myself, and there will continue to be."
* **Comments follow surprisingly friendly White House meeting:** Mamdani's statements came days after he and Trump appeared to forge a new relationship during a Friday Oval Office meeting where they found common ground on affordability issues and improving New York conditions, with Trump admitting "the two had more in common than he thought" and saying "I expect to be helping him, not hurting him -- a big help."

* * *
# **Psychotherapist receives death threats after saying "Trump derangement syndrome" is real**
Manhattan-based psychotherapist Jonathan Alpert claims he received dozens of hate messages including death threats after appearing on Fox News to discuss his Wall Street Journal op-ed about **[patients experiencing"Trump derangement syndrome," ](https://substack.com/redirect/20dd475b-a020-4c8e-bcc5-f51ce0c49039?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**with messages calling him a "racist fascist," "pedophile protector," and wishing he would be "slaughtered."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/20dd475b-a020-4c8e-bcc5-f51ce0c49039?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Alpert describes TDS as emotional pattern, not medical diagnosis:** The author of "Therapy Nation" estimates three-quarters of his patients display symptoms of what he calls "TDS," emphasizing it's not a medical diagnosis but rather "an emotional pattern" that occurs "when someone's political feelings become so intense and consuming that they start to interfere with their daily life," affecting people across the political spectrum regardless of whether they support or oppose Trump.
* **Therapy language escalating political disagreements:** Alpert observed that "people aren't separating disagreement from threat anymore," with the spread of therapy language into mainstream culture worsening the problem, as people say "I'm triggered" or "I feel unsafe" instead of "I disagree," which "escalate everything" and "frame the other person as dangerous rather than different."
* **Backlash highlights contradiction in tolerance:** Alpert noted the "intense" backlash came particularly from people in the mental health field, stating "many of the people who speak the most about empathy, tolerance and inclusion reacted with the least of it," though he also received support messages from people who recognize the pattern, while some mental health professionals caution against labeling political emotions as pathology.

* * *
# **DOGE disbanded with eight months remaining on mandate**
The Trump administration's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has dissolved, with Office of Personnel Management Director Scott Kupor confirming to Reuters that **[DOGE"doesn't exist" as a "centralized entity,"](https://substack.com/redirect/318e5b1b-2b1a-4482-876e-25e6f99c6eba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** despite Trump initially stating the work would "conclude no later than July 4, 2026" when he announced its creation on November 12.
* **Musk left after 130-day limit, following Trump feud:** Elon Musk, who led DOGE after Vivek Ramaswamy departed on inauguration day to focus on his Ohio gubernatorial run, left the Trump administration at the end of May as required by the 130-day service limit for special government employees, following a falling out with Trump over the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, though he recently reappeared at a White House dinner for Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman.
* **Functions transferred to other agencies, hiring freeze ended:** The Office of Personnel Management has taken over many of DOGE's functions, with prominent DOGE employees now working at other agencies including the National Design Studio, HHS, and State Department, while the government-wide hiring freeze--another DOGE hallmark--is over, with Kupor stating "there is no target around reductions" anymore, though DOGE claimed to have slashed "tens of billions of dollars" without providing detailed public accounting.

* * *

subject: I don’t advertise. I deliver.

Fellow Conservative,

The SEAL creed begins: _**“I do not advertise the nature of my work, nor seek recognition for my actions.”**_

I’ve lived that line since the day I was pinned with my trident after graduating from BUDS.

Three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman.

**Six more deployments as a SEAL officer—Middle East, Pacific, and Africa. 70+ countries.**

Places that don’t make the evening news.

I never needed a megaphone.

I needed a plan, a team, and the discipline to execute when lives were at stake.

Minnesota needs the same quiet professionalism in the Senate. That’s why I’ve tossed my hat in the ring,_**in hopes of becoming the Republican nominee in what is shaping up to be Minnesota’s closest Senate race in a generation.

_**While career politicians scream on cable news, carjackings in Minneapolis are up 74% since 2020.**_

Rural hospitals in Greater Minnesota are closing.

**Illegal immigrants with rap sheets walk free because Walz-Flanagan and Ilhan Omar sued to gut ICE detention.**

My opponent’s loudest moment?

Filing lawsuits against police while businesses burned. I’m bewildered why anyone would put their future in the hands of left-wing lunatics with no real-world experience, yet here we are.

Just this past week, **Bernie Sanders endorsed Peggy Flanagan for U.S. Senate in hopes of adding to his cabal of progressive stalwarts who will never compromise and don’t understand on any level that socialism doesn’t work.**

I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, Minnesotan.

I don’t advertise. I deliver.

The left’s own poll shows a generic Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat Republican.

_**That’s the closest any race for this seat has been in over 17 years.**_

**The national GOP is watching.**

name: Vanessa Saenz
subject: Grateful for you – and for the stories we lift up together
body:
Join us in celebrating and supporting Latino voices this WHCD weekend. | |
---
| | |
### **_Celebrate Journalism.
Empower Future Storytellers._**
---
| As we head into Thanksgiving, we have been thinking a lot about gratitude. The [**Brown & Bougie Brunch**](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=5ee891fc95&e=b8f90417f9) exists because of partners like you who believe that Latino journalists and storytellers deserve to be seen, supported, and celebrated.

Next April, we will gather once again for the Brown & Bougie Brunch on **Saturday, April 25, 2026**, this time at Michael Best Strategies’ rooftop at the DC Wharf. Members of Congress, journalists, advocates, and corporate leaders will come together to connect, collaborate, and spotlight the stories that shape our communities.

body:
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Sunday that Americans can expect an announcement from the Trump administration this week on its plan to [reduce healthcare costs](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu9CAQBeDT2J0tGDC2C4q_cbd_m9KahWEhwrACsivfPnJyhNQzek_f-7jtNwwxpMd_PEg3l_dE7xqpNSq7J4zNGyz0jJhsoVpDerhcdmAwDZwPIHeLIZ677K12RECiJ81nJdZ1WbjqvV45sFlZFOsdhLI0L5yhmpZFGWYEzX3QVxrnIPkkGZ_GZbVSGFDKAcyO3TvJyIaWy_iZQ2qeXDzzi8po8tFH7Vt71k7862DrYHMhYTI0nuhzvj462C5SB9udaqXUhopnHX5tw4UbMKX8lQwd15VPwBlIOY2-HbEv2j7fIcZQ1dxJ9jgwxJ_i9qe1Xhq-AwAA__9hJH4J).

# Monday, November 24, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1971, a man [calling himself D.B. Cooper](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9u6yAUgPGnwVuQOfyJGRjubeUtXTsiYg72aQlYGCXK21fpK3T8lt_wfV78JVCmsn6EG7qeqi_4ODL2js1vGHLfltBwz6HEhsdBZU21eRhBn4Q4gfIxUH56NUSXEAHlgE6cjbR2moQZNqeiDMJIq6W-xngdo7STWXSwyioQkx3IvTQhQAmtRqH5ZKOSCxiTAM5pvDI1YqReG_-qVPqGKT_rHRtf6m3Ibut9P5j8x2BmMGPhD_qmHSMFXtvKYH41g_md-__cv9W6Yxuai_uDcqbDnJka11ug_Ov1P024O_gJAAD__zN8b1E) held passengers ransom on a one-way flight to Seattle, then released the hostages, had the plane take off again, and disappeared into the night—still the only unsolved hijacking of a U.S. commercial airliner. In today's edition, we bring back our annual _Holiday_ section, with [holiday news, tips, and how-to advice](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdEZ4zRmucJGG7tKmRAavYRNjkL06dH8fcfmE1E8zejNfj_HhKFJaPt2GlsM-JjxLRGbM44ou8jq7jEd0yWcshdIS9jxCAzeplIR29I7ia2wrbwMioK7Qqs7o-73vlalW66du1l4HbIwHH5RC1_cOjEfUyhhdkb3alIJW3dpG3er-7ls9gzEBoAvNJNoGPfGe6--dEq8Y4mt_Yq7nfauiXZmPIvSHgEHAcJ5nnS_v_c0FDNcgAcOMEadM_JIXlljYMQoYNpd5dbIwni6z5NWln7LQk9IimY4iPaWEWTJtKD1Of6kqW3-cFCMV04m2WTZH8S3E_3rxaeE3AAD__930iaQ) from now through the end of the year. You can see its debut below, right after _Sports_. **Keep an eye on your inbox.** We’re about to send an important message from our sponsor, [GoldCo](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT_P3CAMhz8N2TiBCblkyFA1ve19pU6VukQcmMQVkAi4i-7bV-mfqer0erTs57H1-_Y2vxkKlJZ3E3GsfpsTHiVgrZjnFU2oqzUZ92CSy1gKpcVveQYBmkvJoZ2dofCa28aNHhFQNTjKa6eGoe9l16yjAiusFSgGp3sN3gyDkNoJL4f2DqJvaDxpUkIrdSukvvSDa5WFrvMAVy_urBXoqG758mOjVFf04bU9MV_sFpswrrXuhalPDG4MbsdxXPa8VbSV0hJfxTwpLYVjNBTODQY3EzGTNanwOy0LlsrrmtFULqXQoE-QutnE1NRrzbtB83YAwaALhalJCMm_nDR--30Hn9CRNRUdg654S46p6Srk11WchY_3758ZdI8aZ2vibmhJ_x2I6OgRmZp-Gf40y_bIFpma_hE2eXT7QSFQ6a6sFcvfL5v6oTCfI_wMAAD__02CsCg), about the financial risks exposed by the recent government shutdown and what Americans can do to protect their retirement savings. If you’re thinking about how to protect your assets and pass on wealth wisely, today's sponsor, [SmartAsset](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb2O2zAQhJ-G6myIK4mWChYBAneXNuWCopYSA_4I5NoHv30g-VKkvvqb-RaD_f2BH8YHn9ZfJpJmlzHRZw3ETAU3MoE3awrtwaSlUK0-rS4XhBaGi5QX6HExPrywbxbtiIC6hrS8qW6axlGqZtMwLHZWVkEP0-DkrOabmrvOzIOaxnYcGq8Pm5TQy6Fv5XAdp6XvLCjlAG6unUXf0uI5l-uf7BNv5MIrP6lcbY5N0BvzXkX3Q8BdwN2n6teN67VGU9jUSnzkBNydiT68LlwelS9mLk_R3R8cseZHsSS6n19aTEGAOog1cTd-TW-G6EywaHNiSoxv3WkLnulf5U2PxsnxDGAlfuzIef-KMZX430U89sPQFL3snz4EX9VN9O0ajQ_nTv7Wc54a_gYAAP__cWOqUg) can connect you with trusted financial advisors who can guide you through whether a family trust is the right move.
|
---
## Trump Readies Healthcare Plan
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Sunday that Americans can expect an announcement from the Trump administration this week on its plan to [reduce healthcare costs](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu9CAQBeDT2J0tGDC2C4q_cbd_m9KahWEhwrACsivfPnJyhNQzek_f-7jtNwwxpMd_PEg3l_dE7xqpNSq7J4zNGyz0jJhsoVpDerhcdmAwDZwPIHeLIZ677K12RECiJ81nJdZ1WbjqvV45sFlZFOsdhLI0L5yhmpZFGWYEzX3QVxrnIPkkGZ_GZbVSGFDKAcyO3TvJyIaWy_iZQ2qeXDzzi8po8tFH7Vt71k7862DrYHMhYTI0nuhzvj462C5SB9udaqXUhopnHX5tw4UbMKX8lQwd15VPwBlIOY2-HbEv2j7fIcZQ1dxJ9jgwxJ_i9qe1Xhq-AwAA__9hJH4J). While details are scarce, President Trump has indicated on several occasions that he wants to send healthcare funds “[directly to you,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFzhCAUhH8NdjrwRNCCIg3dpU3pcPJQMggOcOf47zMmPyHVe8XO7n779Zgfxgcf10-zo6ouzRHPErBWzPOGJtRtMRmPYKLNWIqPq0t5BgpDy1gLfLbGh2vmjVUOEbBvUDEp-mkaRyaaTUmzMMmcGHrhOFKYejoxOw0OwFFHx8ar240x4GzglA3dOFneLyCEA5COPgmnaH1NuftOPtYNXbjSG3O3pL0Jaqv1KKT_IKAJ6PM8u1cxNVlz3QICutSULwJ6TxHve8cR0Izdf09A1_zajzY9zW5u2PaPuy3m7eNaWrMs6RVrIaBHCYOkwCmVBHSTlT1OH4IvQhJO19348Nuq_mvKt4KfAAAA__-J5YUC) the people” rather than insurance companies. Trump has also said a plan should be in place by Jan. 30, with healthcare costs expected to surge in 2026 to their highest levels in 15 years. Payment of healthcare subsidies for insurance was a central point of conflict in the 40-day government shutdown.
## Feds Ask Fliers to Dress Up, Be Nice
The U.S. Department of Transportation has announced a new campaign dubbed ["The Golden Age of Travel Starts with You,"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OpyAUhZ8GO4xc8V9BsY3db9stDcJF2SAYuKPx7SfOK0x3kpOcnO_791k-2gcft7_6QEUuLRHvEpAI87KjDrQbnfEMOtqMpfi4uZQXaKDjQnCQi9U-PIusrHKIgG2FSgx9O03jKPpqV9DY0axDt6LFwXRaSDdZGAcjbGOEhMqrd00IkKKTjejqcbKyNdD3DmBwzcpkg9ZTyvX_5CPt6MKTLsy1SUcV1E50Ftb-YTAzmO_7rs1aXoq3ZzC_kcFMWcdypkyafIrc4qkzHRiJa585ZX1h4MZfPnh6-JaCxcj1hrygjtx-OfcwmKus7Hn7EHzpByab7dA-_ByhX9m7FHwHAAD__5kOhtk) asking air travelers to dress nicely for an airplane trip, among other matters of flying etiquette. The campaign addressed the spike in in-flight altercations and misbehavior over the past five years in a [retro-style TV ad](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGupSAUgOHVaIcB5Mq1oJjG7k47pUE4KBMEczhq3P1kXvfqt4Evf_4_n_ljY4p5_W13MBTKnOGuCYgA5w1sos1ZhCPZ7BFqjXkNBWfJ5YsJwaSavY3pmVXrTQCQ0LdghB76cXy_xdBuZuSLcnrQepHCW6fc6J0cudJKC668aqP5rwkhlXgpLl7de_Sqd3IYgpQ68KVRHHykgt3fEjNtENJTLsDOlb1NZiM6atP_auTUyOm-747Q5noUJEux5G4tVyOnBSOEmFeGpeyNnNaSPGRmV2CE9oLEKlmkyp5yMsJzPyr7DrEKDoEsPqyCzexg_gzhYWe-IKbKMtwtGn_cMaVYB90ovu42pq9O-tHcy8h_AQAA__-rdJMm) mixed with scenes of misbehaving passengers. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy is encouraging Americans to ask five civility questions before flying, including whether you are "dressing with respect," "keeping control of your children," and saying please and thank you. Many travelers are skeptical the campaign will improve travel manners, with some blaming recent behaviors on airlines ["treating people like cattle"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUD2ynSAUXg123JEDghYUaehe2pTOUQ5KhgsOkuu4-4xvC6_7iu__z9f8hTHFvP3GN9kWypzpOhO1RnXeCVPbV6x0JMy-0nnGvIVSZ-hh4EJwULPHmO5Zdd4GIiDZkRVGy2kaR6G73Rq1yMFLOYxyWnQYFjloICEXDUZNGLpoHzchQIlB9WJ4jZNXcgWtA4AJ_cJUTz62Ul9_S8xtp5Du8qH6Wsu7S3Zv7TiZ_MXAMXDXdb3-ndiKx_shMHBnK_Vm4FrFDyUGDmNNMRN_pjJwTzwDJ8Q3ZuB8aXwryVPmuBEvgYd0x7zxFd8Hxi3zSri2WPIjH400qoep7w0D11XrjyumFE9tmOq3N8b03bT96N6Phf8BAAD__19ti-Q) rather than blaming the passengers themselves.
## Chart: Americans' Net Worth by Age
A Federal Reserve survey shows that median and average net worth [vary drastically by age](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOrCAUQL8GO4xcAbWgeI3dvHZLc4WLskGYABkzf7-Z_YWtT3JOcr4e2wNDDOn4jxeZ5vOW6K6RWqOynYSxnRYLPSMmV6jWkA6fywYDKC4EB7k5DPG9yc4ZTwQ0dmTEpMdlmWehu9NYP6OSclZiRIJJD7grWrQYpVsU7KIL5mMTAqRQchCqnxcnRwtae4DJDzuTA7nQcum_c0jtJB_f-UWlt_nqojlbe1Y2_mOwMljv--5t2u0HMlgrRbKNwYoXlWAxVY4vKngQT9T4nUs7-f7meBCDtSvGPe8QY6h6YnI4LgzxN9P-9OZl4CcAAP___d94Lw). Median net worth in America ranges from $39,000 for those under 35 to $409,900 for those 65-74, while average net worth ranges from $183,500 to $1,794,600 for the same age groups, respectively. The survey defines "net worth" as the total of all assets, including home ownership and retirement funds, minus all liabilities, including mortgages and credit card and medical debt. The triennial [_Survey of Consumer Finances_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb7HgGXAYGLp4S9eOFoaHTfViLKC28vdV-gudbruT7usxP1yitK-f7om2xTzveFXC1rDMGzpqm3cFD3J7KFhr2teYywwc1E2IG8g5uESvWXbBRkTAoUMrRj0Yc78L3W1Wh0W6EaTXYLRSC4_GK67BKNQAznTJvm1CgBRKcqH6uwly8KB1BBgjX5jkGFLLpf_OaW8bRnrlE0vv87Mju7V2VDZ8MJgYTNd19REDFkcFK5YT-zWfDKbjZ6HkXUt5rwymmAjfrD7C0B8hdsWG40pEqeqRSb4-XaK_RPvXl9PCbwAAAP__Pal3Bg) showed a 37% increase in overall U.S. median net worth from 2019 to 2022, representing the biggest jump since the survey began in 1983.
* * *

clean_body: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Sunday that Americans can expect an announcement from the Trump administration this week on its plan to . | | | | | | Monday, November 24, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1971, a man held passengers ransom on a one-way flight to Seattle, then released the hostages, had the plane take off again, and disappeared into the night—still the only unsolved hijacking of a U.S. commercial airliner. In today's edition, we bring back our annual Holiday section, with from now through the end of the year. You can see its debut below, right after Sports. Keep an eye on your inbox. We’re about to send an important message from our sponsor, , about the financial risks exposed by the recent government shutdown and what Americans can do to protect their retirement savings. If you’re thinking about how to protect your assets and pass on wealth wisely, today's sponsor, can connect you with trusted financial advisors who can guide you through whether a family trust is the right move. | Trump Readies Healthcare Plan Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Sunday that Americans can expect an announcement from the Trump administration this week on its plan to . While details are scarce, President Trump has indicated on several occasions that he wants to send healthcare funds “ the people” rather than insurance companies. Trump has also said a plan should be in place by Jan. 30, with healthcare costs expected to surge in 2026 to their highest levels in 15 years. Payment of healthcare subsidies for insurance was a central point of conflict in the 40-day government shutdown. Feds Ask Fliers to Dress Up, Be Nice The U.S. Department of Transportation has announced a new campaign dubbed asking air travelers to dress nicely for an airplane trip, among other matters of flying etiquette. The campaign addressed the spike in in-flight altercations and misbehavior over the past five years in a mixed with scenes of misbehaving passengers. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy is encouraging Americans to ask five civility questions before flying, including whether you are "dressing with respect," "keeping control of your children," and saying please and thank you. Many travelers are skeptical the campaign will improve travel manners, with some blaming recent behaviors on airlines rather than blaming the passengers themselves. Chart: Americans' Net Worth by Age A Federal Reserve survey shows that median and average net worth . Median net worth in America ranges from $39,000 for those under 35 to $409,900 for those 65-74, while average net worth ranges from $183,500 to $1,794,600 for the same age groups, respectively. The survey defines "net worth" as the total of all assets, including home ownership and retirement funds, minus all liabilities, including mortgages and credit card and medical debt. The triennial showed a 37% increase in overall U.S. median net worth from 2019 to 2022, representing the biggest jump since the survey began in 1983. clean_body: Peter, I'm not alone in believing you truly deserve this. My colleagues and I at House GOP Headquarters were all in agreement. In fact, we've made a unanimous decision. If there's anyone who has a record worthy of this, it's you. First of all, Congratulations! This is reserved only for top supporters of our movement. But I have to say, you've been so outstanding in your record of support that you've built up a profile that falls within the TOP Tier of GOP Patriots. one of House GOP's most trusted patriots, and you deserve to have the status to reflect that! And before you click, I want to let you know that we'll be leaning on you for your opinion on matters as we move forward. I'm putting this deal on the table because we can't afford to lose our most trusted allies when our majority is as thin as it is right now! You, God Bless You and God Bless America! Sincerely, Mike Johnson56th Speaker of the House On behalf of House GOP HQ (Platinum Committee)| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. We're staring down one of our final end-of-month deadlines of the year. We're staring down one of our final end-of-month deadlines of 2025, and we'll level with you, Peter: _We're falling behind._

With one month left before we kick off one of the most critical midterm election years we've faced to date, every single dollar we raise matters. [**If you're ready to support Wesley, you can chip in ahead of our end-of-month deadline here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119889971/584566843/-1347839382?refcode=em25_251125_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TBFINU_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251125_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TBFINU_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3c1df4a9-4ec9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2MxZGY0YTktNGVjOS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-1YL9tDTgDHOMEHnxtlt8hS6KhDDSy-DiIaSelKMS8o=) If you're still on the fence, here are three reasons why your support matters right now:

2\. **Voters are tired of Trump's economic mess...and they're saying it out loud.** The polling is clear: People want something better, and we need to start making moves now. But if we don't have the resources to show up, we risk losing our advantage.

3\. **What we raise right now sets the tone for 2026.** If campaigns like ours don't show strength this month, national groups will assume we can't compete and take their money elsewhere.

This month will help decide whether Democrats go into the midterms fully armed _or fighting an uphill battle._

We can't take even a single day or district for granted. Wesley has never been one to back down from a tough fight, but winning elections takes resources, and he can't flip the House blue alone. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1417%2E49239%2E7p70AV)

Null, this is a longer email than I usually send. **But before I ask you to[ _chip in $5_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9004?t=3&akid=1417%2E49239%2E7p70AV), I'd like to tell you about my race in Michigan, why I'm running, and why I'm asking for your support.**
I'm running because I'm a lifelong Michigander who has spent my career fighting for our families, our small businesses, and our manufacturing economy. Now, I'm ready to bring this fight to the Senate at this critical moment for Michigan and the country.
**Flipping the Senate blue is Democrats' best chance of keeping the Trump administration in check – and we simply can't do that if we lose here in Michigan.
**
MAGA Republicans know this too, and that's why they're laser-focused on this race. After spending nearly $80 million here last cycle, they're gearing up to spend even more in 2026, **putting this on track to be one of the most competitive – and expensive – races in the country.**
**[_That's why I urgently need your help, null._](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9005?t=4&akid=1417%2E49239%2E7p70AV) My pre-Thanksgiving deadline is coming up in two days, and right now, we're pacing behind where we need to be.**
This is a really important moment for our grassroots campaign. This is our chance to show the strength of our movement to my opponent and his megadonors. **[_I hope I can count on your support._](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9005?t=5&akid=1417%2E49239%2E7p70AV)**
**The bottom line is I can't run the most competitive campaign, win this seat, and take our fight for working families to the Senate if I don't have the resources to keep up with GOP spending and fight back against their attacks.
**
**[_So please, null, I have to ask: Will you rush $5 or more to help us reach our $100,000 pre-Thanksgiving goal before 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9004?t=6&akid=1417%2E49239%2E7p70AV)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9004?t=7&akid=1417%2E49239%2E7p70AV)

| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9005?t=10&akid=1417%2E49239%2E7p70AV)
---
Thanks for reading to the end of this longer email, and thank you in advance for giving what you can. It means everything to have you with me in this fight.

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. Thank you,
Haley

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=2bfcc6c13e6947e280e69e2d56b898bc&_e=H5Curfn2Wkv9j6JsOHIX4oh7uCDENBXTqPvYjcDZGUpmxnvO7xMKuFfFZjMC5yDHGynnpN2oh_N2KIPY7v0WTPlFNFCUtLKWFGuI6-o8sQSwUba9hQ2PS0ZsEudVPEjVTk35BRj5lpxJzLP1HT3Ndc0t9YN8CZMe7YXe9mBZqA-KBOtyfDGiZO1QLQcd897jlKWY1xHpGkQSuP9XTasUcmVe7SVbz7kzGN5-hxaqDlYknk8uMOKjGgSi2zJLcv0AyggLa4hHZ5H0fm69YjTB53IdK3kT1Z1ftYrc7PSBARBcRwxg9wkxqLwpOK87Nm31UX-CmNbAhfTMkHma1UcANnQaEYZoKGaYeZeCd4damAzC-pgMT_BoGFLDqaWl5HNLXM_DFKhLIVQYsA3ZyNhfc9sJuNVq-JDAUBGYxf_aMpPibzngSq1GIYyV1b1skDspmbbcmVJU7qrNPz1V1fjP9xddhRLnyQ2Hrw1s-QSUQW_N2-CLYhrSHCqc6tydAhPNVgfIgc20gzUzCQB4t6O_fP9tMYR6ly-E_a5bPGqyZZUajnfRfqnR48plzPv1KZgX)

**Friend, I’m in.**
I’ve just announced my campaign for Governor of New York.

[ENDORSE ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxOg/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The tide is turning in the Empire State and the numbers show that voters are ready for a change:

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxOg/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

**That’s right.****Recent polling shows me LEADING the worst Governor in America Kathy Hochul, and I am just getting started.**
Fellow patriot, the stakes couldn’t be higher... AOC, Zohran Mamdani, and Kathy Hochul are going to destroy New York **[if we don’t stand and fight to stop them together](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxOg/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**.

**Patriot, that’s where you come in.** I am humbly asking for your Day One Endorsement.

[ENDORSE ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxOg/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I have a reputation in D.C. for winning hard races, from flipping a deep blue Obama district Republican in my very first campaign, to ousting Liz Cheney from GOP Leadership, I have never backed down from the tough fights that truly matter.
So, I’m asking you to stand with me for one more tough fight.
**_[Please join my campaign with your Day One Endorsement today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxOg/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

_In Liberty,_

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: With New Order, Trump Tries to Kill Off Vote By Mail [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112425_1&amount=25]
We're going to keep hammering this home, Team, because the mainstream media continues to ignore this executive order and how it will change our elections forever.
President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order has sent lawmakers, election officials, and voting rights advocates into a frenzy. One provision focuses on a goal that for years has been a borderline obsession for MAGA: Cracking down on voting by mail .
For background: After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day.
So of course, this order directs Attorney General Pam Bondi to “ take all necessary action ” against any states that count absentee or mail-in ballots received after Election Day.
This order makes it clear that the MAGA crew will do anything they can to codify their power permanently and silence the will of the people by suppressing and eliminating the votes we cast.
We've got to keep fighting and work to protect our elections and our fundamental right to vote. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112425_1&amount=25]

We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections . Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.
Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. It's been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.
Our partners at VoteAmerica said it best: “ There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access, reject ballots without postmarks, or refuse to count ballots that arrive after Election Day. If the administration moves forward with these proposals, they will effectively disenfranchise older voters, rural voters, and military voters. ”
Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. name: Andy Kim
subject: Costs are too high
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
As we head into Thanksgiving week, I’ve been thinking a lot about what families across New Jersey are dealing with right now.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119892124/584572963/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzNkMmZhMS00ZmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ZcS4oYwY6cLuXlfzMJoMOvCFx3NtvvxrXQ8wXSdYvQ=&emci=9d2de885-4cc9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ec3d2fa1-4fc9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26261389)
---

| | As we head into Thanksgiving week, I've been thinking a lot about what families across New Jersey are dealing with right now. For so many people, the cost of putting a holiday meal on the table is higher than it's ever been. Groceries, heating, gas, basic necessities — everything feels like it's getting harder to afford. **Costs are too damn high, and after almost a year of Trump's chaotic economic policies, we're all feeling the impact.** These policies haven't brought stability. They haven't made life easier. Instead, they've created uncertainty, driven up costs, and left families stretched thin heading into the holidays when they should be able to focus on time together. Enough is enough. You deserve a government that actually cares about lowering your costs and making everyday life more affordable. That means strengthening the programs that keep food on the table, cracking down on price gouging, protecting access to affordable health care, and building an economy that works for working people. That's the work I'm focused on every single day in the Senate. Making sure families can get through the week, the month, the year without feeling like everything is stacked against them. I'm grateful for the chance to keep you updated, and I hope you have a safe and warm holiday week. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

Peter, Last week, we emailed you about Becca stepping into Republican districts and holding town halls — Stefanik’s backyard, then John James’s turf — **because voters deserve the truth their own representatives refuse to say out loud.** So here’s the update: **Becca hasn’t slowed down...not for one second.** And that’s why we’re reaching out again today. **We’re now 7 days away from the end of the month, and we still have $2,108 left to raise to stay on track. This is one of the tightest goals we’ve faced all year — and if we fall behind now, we won’t have the resources to keep Becca out front where she belongs.** This is the moment when grassroots campaigns either surge ahead or fall behind and Becca is counting on us to make sure we surge. [**If you’re ready to help us turn this around in the final stretch, now’s the moment. Because, while most members of Congress stay in safe territory, Becca is doing the opposite. She’s out there _meeting the moment_ and taking the fight directly to Republicans instead of waiting for it to come to her.
She’s calling out Trump’s attacks on our democracy and violent threats towards elected officials. She’s defending working families squeezed by corporate greed and political cowardice. **And she’s bringing the truth into communities Republicans abandoned long ago.**
When over 400 people showed up to Becca’s town hall in Elise Stefanik’s RED district earlier this year, it wasn’t a fluke — it was a signal. Becca is building something real: a movement that listens, shows up, _**and organizes where others won’t.**_
**This is what it takes to beat Trump’s movement. This is what it takes to retake the House. This is what it takes to stand up for working people everywhere.**
[**If Becca is going to keep leading this fight, we have to meet this moment together. We’re staring down a $2,108 gap with just 7 days left and falling short now would force us to scale back when we should be stepping up. Thank you for everything.
— Team Becca

name: U.S. Senator Ron Wyden
subject: I want to hear from OLCV members, like you, Peter
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/4E0z8mwxE0ahw93hgRTJ2w2?contactdata=66hof/weAoY0dZbYFhzHgU+75O53YXOZmMkhTYP2ZGLVcb7jEti+8vAL1c8khHnVOxREaChUMSLNTc0soU4BTcwDaPsZtL5cKyahzIGALgknt5bx/Z9rFDq1uegJvV8L [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4E0z8mwxE0ahw93hgRTJ2w2?contactdata=66hof/weAoY0dZbYFhzHgU+75O53YXOZmMkhTYP2ZGLVcb7jEti+8vAL1c8khHnVOxREaChUMSLNTc0soU4BTcwDaPsZtL5cKyahzIGALgknt5bx/Z9rFDq1uegJvV8L]
Dear Peter,
As your U.S. senator, I feel it’s important to hear directly from you on issues you care most about. That’s why I am excited to join OLCV’s Town Hall on the Environment as a special guest. I want to hear from you and answer any questions you may have. Will you join OLCV and me on Friday, December 5th? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4E0z8mwxE0ahw93hgRTJ2w2]
OLCV’s Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Ron Wyden
WHEN: Friday, December 5th from 3:00 - 4:15 pm PT
Via Zoom
RSVP and submit your questions here! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4E0z8mwxE0ahw93hgRTJ2w2?contactdata=66hof/weAoY0dZbYFhzHgU+75O53YXOZmMkhTYP2ZGLVcb7jEti+8vAL1c8khHnVOxREaChUMSLNTc0soU4BTcwDaPsZtL5cKyahzIGALgknt5bx/Z9rFDq1uegJvV8L]
During my time as your senator, I’ve been a champion for clean energy tax credits, climate, and public lands. Our natural resources and the environment are issues I care deeply about, as I know you do, Peter. I’ve worked on issues like protecting our rivers, protecting the Owyhee Canyonlands, keeping utilities affordable in peak seasons, and more. I want to hear from you about the environmental issues that are the most critical to you.
There have been constant attacks on our climate by the Trump Administration — so I know there is a lot on everyone’s mind. I’m looking forward to meeting with you next week and answering questions on public lands, clean energy, climate, the Endangerment Finding, federal funding cuts to environmental programs and agencies, and other environmental issues. RSVP today and submit your questions for me! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4E0z8mwxE0ahw93hgRTJ2w2]
I hope I’ll get to hear from you at OLCV’s Town Hall on the Environment!
Yours,
Ron Wyden
U.S. Senator of Oregon
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

name: Marc Elias
subject: What I plan to say directly to the Supreme Court:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, Marc Elias here. After the 2020 election, **I beat Donald Trump 64 times in court -- and now, I'm headed to the Supreme Court to fight for free and fair elections.**

[**Before I explain, I have to ask -- will you chip in $5 to the DSCC to stand up against GOP leaders' blatant disregard for the law and fight for our democracy by flipping the Senate blue? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251124-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251124-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21822%2E9716520%2ECkTz4N)

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251124-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251124-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21822%2E9716520%2ECkTz4N)
---

As we speak, Donald Trump's cronies are trying to _rewrite_ this country's campaign finance laws to suit their own needs. They're ignoring _decades_ of precedent, attacking our country's values, and shredding bedrock legal principles _**to rig the rules for their own benefit.**_

**Here's how we fight back:**

First, we're headed to the Supreme Court -- where I will _**personally**_ deliver arguments to the justices on behalf of the DSCC and Democrats across the nation, urging the Court to reject the GOP's cynical schemes.

I'm planning to expose the Republican case for what it is: A corrupt effort to drown out the voices of everyday Americans by opening the floodgates to _even more_ money in our politics.

But no matter the outcome, our second step is clear: We MUST flip the Senate blue. The DSCC is the _only_ committee dedicated to electing a Democratic Senate, and by supporting their work, we can put a much-needed check on Trump's dangerous agenda.

**So I'm asking for your help as we work to stop Trump's allies, flip the Senate blue, and defend democracy itself:[Please, will you chip in $5 or more today to support the DSCC's efforts to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251124-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251124-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21822%2E9716520%2ECkTz4N)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=8&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251124-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251124-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21822%2E9716520%2ECkTz4N)

Marc

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thank you, Marc Marc Elias | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. Peter,

I want to invite you to something I’m genuinely looking forward to.

On December 2 at 7 PM ET, Senator Bernie Sanders and I will be hosting a
virtual town hall about something that shapes every part of our lives: The
future of healthcare in America.

[ Open ]Open Our Healthcare: Virtual Town Hall with Abdul & Bernie - Dec. 2, 7
PM

You’ve heard me say it before — in the richest, most powerful country in
the world, it shouldn’t be this hard to see a doctor, fill a prescription,
or care for your family.

But the truth is, our healthcare system is built to serve corporate
interests, not people. And unless we change that, everything else becomes
harder too.

Bernie and I will be talking about why our healthcare system is failing
working people, and what it’ll take to finally pass Medicare for All.

name: Massachusetts Democratic Party
subject: Trump Truth: Where is Trump’s Health Care Plan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Hello Peter,
Donald Trump promised that Republicans would “repeal and replace” the Affordable Care Act (ACA) with something “much better.” Fifteen years later, there is still no comprehensive replacement.
The Affordable Care Act is on the Brink
More than 24 million people are currently enrolled in ACA Marketplace plans nationwide, benefitting from enhanced subsidies that make health care accessible for lower-income families.
In Massachusetts alone, over 2 million residents rely on MassHealth or coverage from the Massachusetts Health Connector.
The ACA:
* Provides premium tax credits and subsidies for people who are not eligible for Medicare.
* Makes individuals with household incomes between $15,560 and $71,960 eligible for financial assistance.
* Protects coverage for pre-existing conditions.
For a more detailed discussion of the Affordable Care Act benefits, please read KFF’s October Analysis [https://www.kff.org/affordable-care-act/health-policy-101-the-affordable-care-act/?entry=table-of-contents-what-is-the-affordable-care-act] .
What Happens if Republicans Fail to Act?
If Republicans have not generated an alternative health care plan and refuse to join Democrats in extending the ACA before January 1, 2026:
* ACA enhanced premium tax credits will expire at the end of this year .
* 11.8 million people nationwide will lose health coverage, including over 300,000 in Massachusetts .
* People with incomes below the federal poverty level will lose Advance Premium Tax Credits and ConnectorCare .
* Massachusetts recipients of ACA premium tax credits could see their monthly costs rise by about $1,000 , according to CBS News [https://www.cbsnews.com/boston/news/government-shutdown-health-insurance-cost-massachusetts/] .
Without assistance, out-of-pocket costs rise, and hospitals face higher demand, and care becomes more expensive for everyone.
Trump Complicates Talks
While Democrats sought to extend ACA benefits during the shutdown, Republicans refused to negotiate. As reported by The Hill [https://thehill.com/policy/healthcare/5611836-trump-republicans-aca-subsidies-health-care-plan/] , “Trump told Congress not to 'waste' time on extending the ACA’s enhanced subsidies, taking a hard line just as some lawmakers were exploring a bipartisan compromise.”
On Truth Social, he declared:
“THE ONLY HEALTHCARE I WILL SUPPORT OR APPROVE IS SENDING THE MONEY DIRECTLY BACK TO THE PEOPLE.”
At the bill signing to end the shutdown, he said:
“We’re gonna pay a lot of money to the people. They’re gonna go out and buy their own health care, and we’re gonna forget this Obamacare madness.” NBC News [https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/health-insurance-bills-rise-republicans-seeking-obamcare-alternative-rcna243332] .
The Bottom Line
Donald Trump continues to block ACA subsidies, slash Medicaid, and offer no viable replacement plan , leaving millions of Americans at risk. Democrats are fighting to:
* Protect the Affordable Care Act.
* Prevent premium spikes.
* Preserve Medicaid.
* Ensure families can afford the care they need.
Republicans have promised a replacement for 15 years. There’s still nothing to show for it.
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States
