**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. body:
Leftist mobs couldn’t stop us.| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37a21b556b32452bb85464766ee9cfcb&_e=EhJQT5R1QpjZ1_zPFjrRwED3oB82IhAhuNE-vs20DkEi_kPfF4eWxLN4Tq9Pc10bk3NEfk8DvU_oyxJUI6iUA2c7oeqtxCuTFK6C3Wca5nqQUthn29JVt-cn72ZI_YlkB5nKJQR81SAjVQnUmur0oAhgTwOpPjEfVaks7TCIxVJAhMup3d-gN9Hwz2_PC9RHA6Jp-pGBw3-3nAiWCDT7KAIsRGXEXmSZEFioUmZmwbvp1ayfaiQeMcKAF08bJAVymHgxgUEAag0YmTtzrIKhwKR10j0zZoyNKVQjpLLitlpcSVBY4GnrEuN8oDE6nDmUW-6bxz2IdQ4ENsGISpQ0ZbiNf6UzM96Epv_MF997YYEeyRIiHP_uS91r1av00u4mGjf-YBqxSo3H26Pes_6GH29dEyAr95CR0Ww_dIGHp1ODuXb9xFsQY0M9Lb1QQcWi_q3XhVp72iQXBw9B_keR1J23T-wfSsJEoDA18zom33ucCtbzJDnyMLqSiylEjQEX3LMKd_baUti1SVu5w821Dx74o16m-E8SGch_nGK5TYEqMQxLWnffgGtBaNi2yMwxYsUsiulxWiPQeejkg7jCRVkJ1rz5tJJwIOpVp_PNpKc0op-j5ZTpHdQrIhL3pPy_zm4FyQMJw5QEd_2uF-XB9CER9KtsTmmVT4jR5CJV5xO_aEepUhBGUE-3xM5MC9pE)
---
Friend,They tried to break us. At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: _" F*** Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley."_ And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37a21b556b32452bb85464766ee9cfcb&_e=EhJQT5R1QpjZ1_zPFjrRwED3oB82IhAhuNE-vs20DkEi_kPfF4eWxLN4Tq9Pc10bk3NEfk8DvU_oyxJUI6iUA2c7oeqtxCuTFK6C3Wca5nqQUthn29JVt-cn72ZI_YlkB5nKJQR81SAjVQnUmur0oAhgTwOpPjEfVaks7TCIxVJAhMup3d-gN9Hwz2_PC9RHA6Jp-pGBw3-3nAiWCDT7KAIsRGXEXmSZEFioUmZmwbsaSefm7Y9C-7gYnIDPg4XSAcjTREmw2zy2iXBk3fMP0uCH9Vkp-tzDjDMQT3wqlfAT4tPg4qwQ6Ol8pjgd7q75opmI3mPYij_Xr-FmP_e4d2Qrb0IaAgoco79EVyhQ5sehC6KUlSyDzOFrrgSmvetoDc-oF_e0At3gpazdAsro8QbJUFSLqWzHSXuNmTUMz6VQI1E-auP0wITwoJ53wjn9Ij4I56CkfXmQF4R7W8SKa-v5RqzxWv8xjcRKOcF86-6teWDlbeLO7clR-7mXMgsqn_1fwHbklQdGe5Fkk3i3EsafTtMoer5keGpTPeHgyEJl2HItlDlaP4UZOobOonGPA2Vlv5taalsIsrDxSHMqVlvgS8Vw2rMPX11F3jB6yu1G4Q3GSFz3XecsrVYM6gdwG37WLXPDrAwkieyeqwgYUjEhCOQiPoPl_CHcZ4cBnD2PtF-G3yPzE1-zOvTIt0Uc)
---
ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance. Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located their exit and continued to meet them with violence. The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear a message of faith, family, and freedom. A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall of protesters screaming profanity in her children's faces. Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety after being struck in the chaos outside the event. These out-of-control Leftists weren't satisfied with merely being heard in protest --_They wanted to pick a fight._ Police made multiple arrests. **UC Berkeley, a so-called "bastion" of free speech, turned into a war zone.**
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37a21b556b32452bb85464766ee9cfcb&_e=EhJQT5R1QpjZ1_zPFjrRwED3oB82IhAhuNE-vs20DkEi_kPfF4eWxLN4Tq9Pc10bk3NEfk8DvU_oyxJUI6iUA2c7oeqtxCuTFK6C3Wca5nqQUthn29JVt-cn72ZI_YlkB5nKJQR81SAjVQnUmur0oAhgTwOpPjEfVaks7TCIxVJAhMup3d-gN9Hwz2_PC9RHA6Jp-pGBw3-3nAiWCDT7KAIsRGXEXmSZEFioUmZmwbsw7_0by9iODxW9ngppW6AfjE1WKLIFaH28P_wnsaTmhLPjTyr94voLg9aGnlJlZSaIbBQzHQei5hEHZA4oebjs5aJXuNdddrnIhEjZfXDzJicuzjkmgTNeiuTRT3_sQEdpy-epQDh8WYF4k3Gcau6oAd8AlPonW5ncNWJiLjWRbx4KtNKCRIRaxhfVvj5-3UyPOkhQ3BE0chc6YK90bvlkikEkL-B6Xs86HGXnbEUC-305dl215CRfHDhE3963ITEpk9YdE4myUnEpdtrPiM_TqpTgg7IAybUlWuGSaOJFm262ypWpbSUs5RyfYPbyfDK4oldMfzUnlLS_dQtlYWTFZegIlEC-0Jc_jikk6pMChKwuoFKmCTyHMwDiua-x38VuVd1i2QDgEvzv7nWEzGT4dAVF38bg1XNd78hBtNDGqU7gaYKtV47MTWmZKYXjMe5bgpk0UC0wlLtlwAM7jMLd)
---
But still... The event went on. A packed house. Our students didn't retreat. They stood strong. Even when ANTIFA plotted to register for tickets to leave HUNDREDS of empty seats, our patriotic students filled the room anyways. And they gave Charlie's legacy the tribute it deserved. Rob Schneider took the stage with humility and fire. Dr. Frank Turek brought clarity and conviction. What took place behind those doors was a powerful reminder: **Truth is louder than hate. **
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37a21b556b32452bb85464766ee9cfcb&_e=EhJQT5R1QpjZ1_zPFjrRwED3oB82IhAhuNE-vs20DkEi_kPfF4eWxLN4Tq9Pc10bk3NEfk8DvU_oyxJUI6iUA2c7oeqtxCuTFK6C3Wca5nqQUthn29JVt-cn72ZI_YlkB5nKJQR81SAjVQnUmur0oAhgTwOpPjEfVaks7TCIxVJAhMup3d-gN9Hwz2_PC9RHA6Jp-pGBw3-3nAiWCDT7KAIsRGXEXmSZEFioUmZmwbtk0ggN_YFO0aEu4uPDaHILbvA1sN_AYzVqFz9Pz0v3L7qqoKFVvz9jupQYuFdWuBGykk_VVGZJkrE1vZCnRqqJMYEuE1WwXJJW6P6okbmYfpwdZdhNNbJUeoyZcxcs5Y5XTEYUFrbQyT9hB9mm9yFRN_ig7JnOoa_uFP1YC9XO4_L4DW5jE7KlN-cX82XjBQ8X1Uo8yriVYQHuk7M_cj1DiSRZzcadcFPDY7lj18wmIghZ4OgL9bnPkavKUTj0NWtrRdWwmbpttfAhUCnag9_LXY8BZgs3VwqpHnbEYbr9gwKRLsBsglyj5UaAG2uDSV5KEQm9CuVS53K7skiZG_z0CPvSjb8HtsDptCnPhqZuFNPMItuqhgGRYW1PQRirVfexWdOtN71JLIuVm09ZxP9Yh80gnCRQ0o5pOnVdJ_3yZ_mW_2WcS5L1xztPn_LnGJtrHzDOhEafDFayA34vtFwL)
---
| | **Friend, I need you to hear this next part -- because it's about patriots like you.** This tour? This fight? These students who keep showing up -- even when it's dangerous? They didn't get here on their own. They got here because patriots like YOU believed in them. Because when the mobs swarmed... When the threats came in... When everyone from the fake news media to the so-called political "experts" said Gen Z was lost to the Left... And when they tried to silence this movement that Charlie built... People like you stood up. Stayed in. Kept the mission alive. And showed our young people that they're not alone. That America is still worth fighting for. That free speech still has defenders.That faith, family, and FREEDOM still have a future. So if you've ever wondered if it's working... If it's worth it... **Let me be clear: Patriots like you are why we 're winning the American Culture War.** And now this is your chance to be part of something rare -- a moment in history where patriotic young Americans are reclaiming the culture, one campus at a time. Our students on campus are truly the vanguard for saving this nation, but they need to know we have their backs. **Will you make a gift right now to send backup to the frontlines and stand with these young patriots who refuse to quit? ** **[Every dollar you give today helps us protect our student leaders, send activism kits to chapters, defend free speech, and fuel our reach to change more hearts and minds.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37a21b556b32452bb85464766ee9cfcb&_e=EhJQT5R1QpjZ1_zPFjrRwED3oB82IhAhuNE-vs20DkEi_kPfF4eWxLN4Tq9Pc10bk3NEfk8DvU_oyxJUI6iUA2c7oeqtxCuTFK6C3Wca5nqQUthn29JVt-cn72ZI_YlkB5nKJQR81SAjVQnUmur0oAhgTwOpPjEfVaks7TCIxVJAhMup3d-gN9Hwz2_PC9RHA6Jp-pGBw3-3nAiWCDT7KAIsRGXEXmSZEFioUmZmwbvX25BwYrTYaqfPKB_aIoxpP88i1SEMpGQIjeEwkRjilrrJQ50bPRR45HXgZ1HMKWVaXr3GaO1D5P7jgGYSOmQQmsAyX2BBK8ftDw3yCelFFrisvJAPnzTamIyzytL8aQd-3YEouNw-228D3HfOTaomYTatW33hM-g8H6fpeHCzrEFv5UDzCVNdW1DVbtWkfCs43lL2tLtFEluvG_Jjg3GbuJbLFVoywN7vguVmqgMcUkc8m1PH3MrjqEIv0sY20g6CQ9SuMvcsGWhM7gDgPXcsPAiLEuaUPa6cUbl0q6ec_9L-XCIi7Psq1epkTr4UxGeygNNhM9vvgnwXyf4vdPvau4xeIyxgB7nBVfW1LBtFkRakPllUVIQS-cbNHSMHh2pZ7ZsmeyGtVZhaekXXcA7OgpXh8CazKi_28d3MCmfIgLxh9u7I60mbXo0eNmMw4Ydted9gsRBnhIlOR8CaBAn7)**

clean_body: Leftist mobs couldn’t stop us.| | | Friend,They tried to break us. At UC Berkeley -- one of the most hostile, left-wing campuses in America -- ANTIFA tried to shut down our final campus tour stop of 2025.They showed up hours early. Wearing masks. Lighting flares and smoke bombs. Throwing paint and glass bottles at attendees. Waving Mexican and rainbow flags. They mocked Charlie's assassination... pointing to their own necks where he was shot. They chanted: " F* Charlie Kirk"... "No safe space for fascist scum"... "Fascists out of Berkeley." And they rushed police barricades, hoping to break through and disrupt our final campus tour stop of the semester. ANTIFA surrounded the venue, blocking every entrance. Even after our students and attendees were leaving, ANTIFA located their exit and continued to meet them with violence. The mob swarmed every student, speaker, and parent who came to hear a message of faith, family, and freedom. A mother holding her two daughters was forced to push through a wall of protesters screaming profanity in her children's faces. Another attendee, blood dripping from his brow, was pulled to safety after being struck in the chaos outside the event. These out-of-control Leftists weren't satisfied with merely being heard in protest --They wanted to pick a fight. Police made multiple arrests. UC Berkeley, a so-called "bastion" of free speech, turned into a war zone. | | But still... The event went on. A packed house. Our students didn't retreat. They stood strong. Even when ANTIFA plotted to register for tickets to leave HUNDREDS of empty seats, our patriotic students filled the room anyways. And they gave Charlie's legacy the tribute it deserved. Rob Schneider took the stage with humility and fire. Dr. Frank Turek brought clarity and conviction. What took place behind those doors was a powerful reminder: Truth is louder than hate. | | Friend, I need you to hear this next part -- because it's about patriots like you. This tour? This fight? These students who keep showing up -- even when it's dangerous? They didn't get here on their own. They got here because patriots like YOU believed in them. Because when the mobs swarmed... When the threats came in... When everyone from the fake news media to the so-called political "experts" said Gen Z was lost to the Left... And when they tried to silence this movement that Charlie built... People like you stood up. Stayed in. Kept the mission alive. And showed our young people that they're not alone. That America is still worth fighting for. That free speech still has defenders.That faith, family, and FREEDOM still have a future. So if you've ever wondered if it's working... If it's worth it... Let me be clear: Patriots like you are why we 're winning the American Culture War. And now this is your chance to be part of something rare -- a moment in history where patriotic young Americans are reclaiming the culture, one campus at a time. Our students on campus are truly the vanguard for saving this nation, but they need to know we have their backs. Will you make a gift right now to send backup to the frontlines and stand with these young patriots who refuse to quit? The Left tried to intimidate us. They tried to outnumber us. They tried to drown us out. But we didn't blink. Our students didn't blink. The mob at Berkeley couldn't stop us. Because we didn 't come to Berkeley to be liked... We came to speak truth. We came to finish what Charlie started. That's exactly what happened. And that 's exactly why we're winning. Friend, thank you. Patriots like you helped turn chaos into courage... Hate into hope... And grief into grit. Let's keep going... | | For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.** Friend, when the Left screamed in our students' faces... When they mocked Charlie's murder... Our students held the line. If you believe in what they're doing... If you know this fight is just beginning... Your support means more than you know. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Don Jr.
subject: A special thank you for you,Patriot

body:
My father and I couldn’t do this without patriots like you. Open this note of gratitude. |
Fellow American, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to **express my heartfelt gratitude** for **your unwavering support**. My father and I know that this fight **isn't possible without patriots like you** who are willing to stand up for what's right.

We're honored to have you on our team, **Fellow American.**

**[As a small token of our appreciation, I'd like to share a special message with you. body:
If we lose New Hampshire, we lose any shot at flipping the Senate. Period.
Folks, it’s James Carville.
If I had any hair, I’d be ripping it out right now!!
Democrats’ chances of winning the New Hampshire Senate race have officially been downgraded. **_That means Republicans are in spitting distance of flipping this seat and cutting off ANY chance Democrats have of retaking control of the Senate next year._**
**[Before you read another word, chip in $5 to help Chris Pappas hold the line in New Hampshire.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251124_1_carville.XhSb20&refcode=em20251124-1&t=1&akid=3671%2E582294%2EQxJKZc)**
**[Rush $5 to Chris Pappas Right Now!](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251124_1_carville.j0wB8y&amount=5&refcode=em20251124-1&t=2&akid=3671%2E582294%2EQxJKZc)**
Let me be crystal clear. If Democrats blow it in New Hampshire, we have NO path to taking back the Senate. Not a snowball’s chance in hell.
Any guess who the GOP just recruited into the race? John Sununu. Yes, that same Sununu family. John’s got the famous last name, he’s got Wall Street’s money, and he’s got the full force of the national Republican establishment behind him.
Chris Pappas is the only thing standing in their way. Chris isn’t some lightweight. He’s won one of the toughest Congressional districts in the country four times running. He knows how to fight and win.
**_But — with Sununu in the race — if we don’t rally around Chris Pappas right now, we’re going to get steamrolled!_**
So here’s what I need from you: **[Chip in $5, or more if you can, to help Chris Pappas fight back and hold this seat for the Democrats.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251124_1_carville.XhSb20&refcode=em20251124-1&t=3&akid=3671%2E582294%2EQxJKZc)**
**[Rush $5 to Chris Pappas Right Now!](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251124_1_carville.j0wB8y&amount=5&refcode=em20251124-1&t=4&akid=3671%2E582294%2EQxJKZc)**
_This is the GOP’s dream scenario:_ an open seat in a swing state, a big-name Republican, and a whole lot of dark money to burn. I know from my years of campaigning that this is exactly what they were hoping for.
**It’s time to get off our butts and fight like hell for Chris.** Let’s show these Republican bigshots that they can’t just waltz in and buy New Hampshire. Not on our watch.
**[Give what you can right now. Let’s win this damn thing and flip the Senate.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251124_1_carville.XhSb20&refcode=em20251124-1&t=5&akid=3671%2E582294%2EQxJKZc)**
— James Carville
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251124_1_carville.XhSb20&refcode=em20251124-1&t=6&akid=3671%2E582294%2EQxJKZc)
**[Donate ››](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251124_1_carville.j0wB8y&amount=5&refcode=em20251124-1&t=7&akid=3671%2E582294%2EQxJKZc)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=8&akid=3671%2E582294%2EQxJKZc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=9&akid=3671%2E582294%2EQxJKZc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=3671%2E582294%2EQxJKZc)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

body:
$1 sends a powerful message.
#
[**$1.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1271?c0=mcb-em-20251124-1.GpF_2K&refcode=em20251124-2529&t=1&akid=2529%2E21716%2EJi7JQm)
That’s how much we’re asking you to contribute to support Sarah McBride today.
It might not seem like a lot, but when thousands of people step up with just $1, it turns into organizers on the door, rapid-response ads, and a grassroots operation strong enough to keep Sarah focused on fighting for us.
And with Sarah up for re-election next year, that people-power matters more than ever.
Because here’s the truth: **MAGA bullies and Republican politicians are escalating their hateful anti-trans attacks on Sarah.**
Sarah refuses to let their cruelty derail her work to deliver for Delaware families and working people everywhere — and she’s counting on grassroots supporters, _not billionaires_ , to help her push back and keep doing the work. [**Can you chip in $1 today?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251124-1.rHm-DT&refcode=em20251124-2529&amount=1&t=2&akid=2529%2E21716%2EJi7JQm)

name: Amanda Sherman Baity, EMILYs List
subject: Maine can't afford another Susan Collins term
body:
Janet Mills is ready to take on Susan Collins — are you? |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119903598/584608731/-1510725204?sourceid=1057375&refcode=WUEFEK55_20251124_Collins_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjcyYmEyNS02NWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3np0JVd0W23fDOwg9fr4Es-kS_EJjvJNNZLGiT4D90=) Hi Peter,

**Susan Collins has spent _years_ enabling Donald Trump and hurting the people of Maine.**

In October, she joined Trump at the White House to "celebrate" not extending critical health care tax credits and allowing the government to shut down. While Mainers were reeling from the damage of the government shutdown, Susan Collins was smiling alongside Trump.

If Democrats don't get this right — if we don't choose the strongest possible candidate to take her on — Collins will skate by yet again.

[**We can't afford that. So, Peter, will you chip in to help us flip Maine’s Senate seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119903599/584608732/-1510725204?sourceid=1057375&refcode=WUEFEK55_20251124_Collins_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjcyYmEyNS02NWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3np0JVd0W23fDOwg9fr4Es-kS_EJjvJNNZLGiT4D90=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119903600/584608733/-1403821653?sourceid=1057375&refcode=WUEFEK55_20251124_Collins_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjcyYmEyNS02NWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3np0JVd0W23fDOwg9fr4Es-kS_EJjvJNNZLGiT4D90=)
---
EMILYs List is all in for Janet Mills because she is the _only_ candidate in this race who can defeat Susan Collins. No one else has Janet’s record of delivering for Maine. No one else has her grit. No other Democrat has won statewide in Maine in the past decade. And no one else has stood up to Trump — and won! — when he tried to undermine Maine.

Janet has spent her entire career proving people wrong and winning fights no one thought she could. She shattered expectations as the first woman district attorney in all of New England. She did it again as Maine's first and only woman attorney general. And as Maine's first woman governor, she won with more votes than any governor in state history.

**Beating Susan Collins takes a fighter with a real record of winning tough, high-stakes races.**

Janet Mills isn't afraid of Trump, and she isn't afraid of Collins. She's won before, and she’ll do it again, but only if she has the grassroots power behind her to take on the Republican machine that will support Collins.

[**If we are serious about defeating Susan Collins, then we have to act now. Donate today to support EMILYs List-backed candidates, like Janet Mills, running in the toughest races in 2026:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119903601/584608734/-1510725204?sourceid=1057375&refcode=WUEFEK55_20251124_Collins_ALL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjcyYmEyNS02NWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3np0JVd0W23fDOwg9fr4Es-kS_EJjvJNNZLGiT4D90=)

clean_body: Janet Mills is ready to take on Susan Collins — are you? | = Hi Peter, Susan Collins has spent years enabling Donald Trump and hurting the people of Maine. In October, she joined Trump at the White House to "celebrate" not extending critical health care tax credits and allowing the government to shut down. While Mainers were reeling from the damage of the government shutdown, Susan Collins was smiling alongside Trump. If Democrats don't get this right — if we don't choose the strongest possible candidate to take her on — Collins will skate by yet again. = | = EMILYs List is all in for Janet Mills because she is the only candidate in this race who can defeat Susan Collins. No one else has Janet’s record of delivering for Maine. No one else has her grit. No other Democrat has won statewide in Maine in the past decade. And no one else has stood up to Trump — and won! — when he tried to undermine Maine. Janet has spent her entire career proving people wrong and winning fights no one thought she could. She shattered expectations as the first woman district attorney in all of New England. She did it again as Maine's first and only woman attorney general. And as Maine's first woman governor, she won with more votes than any governor in state history. Beating Susan Collins takes a fighter with a real record of winning tough, high-stakes races. Janet Mills isn't afraid of Trump, and she isn't afraid of Collins. She's won before, and she’ll do it again, but only if she has the grassroots power behind her to take on the Republican machine that will support Collins. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Talk soon, Amanda Sherman Baity (she/her/hers) Chief Communications Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: TPUSA Faith
subject: Stand in faith and freedom this season 🍂
body:
God is expanding the work in beautifully unexpected ways and bringing a renewed hope to our mission. We’re witnessing believers rise up with fresh passion, churches unify, and we’re watching God open doors that only He could open.
| [ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MVStYCS7PnWW5ppj262hkJV1W5DT7xy5GgW-NN8LB06l3hKBlW69sMD-6lZ3ptW6RWNFr25-n9kW68HSxp88drhmW3wgm3K2byZKYW5mNN6m9bTBFhW1MVmTb8hgG4hTGtXY1MLkTjW6qBjnx6b80XNN7M03nZ6lrDdW3Lwdh98h_8w-W3pNGwC42qhWpW8J_9vy6cb3RcW4G65M57FJWPDN6gTS0xMj2fLV1gtFC7jjBNzW15wl4F6LdpX5W6Qpw8k7DGtxMW9kzKpS5zyjnGW3kMJn6160SnGW1DBK6L2szndnW4yltjY1057Tqf1hJNQF04)
---
Dear Peter, As we near the end of this fall season, we’re reminded that God is always at work; He’s bringing renewal, strengthening His people, and guiding His Church with purpose. Though we continue to feel the absence of our friend and founder Charlie, we also feel the momentum of the mission God began through him. His heart for bold faith, biblical truth, and courageous cultural engagement lives on in every life touched and every community awakened. Under the leadership of Erika Kirk, our team remains steadfast in advancing this calling. We are pressing forward by equipping believers, empowering pastors, and rallying the Church to stand firm in truth with grace. This movement is not slowing down. In fact, God is expanding the work in beautifully unexpected ways and bringing a renewed hope to our mission. We’re witnessing believers rise up with fresh passion, churches unify, and we’re watching God open doors that only He could open. Thank you for praying, standing, and running with us. Together, we continue to carry the torch with faith and endurance. So how can we continue the race well? Let our team **pray for you** — we would be honored to stand with you in prayer amidst any challenges that you may be facing. Share your prayer requests with us below so our team can lift you up.
---

clean_body: God is expanding the work in beautifully unexpected ways and bringing a renewed hope to our mission. We’re witnessing believers rise up with fresh passion, churches unify, and we’re watching God open doors that only He could open. | Dear Peter, As we near the end of this fall season, we’re reminded that God is always at work; He’s bringing renewal, strengthening His people, and guiding His Church with purpose. Though we continue to feel the absence of our friend and founder Charlie, we also feel the momentum of the mission God began through him. His heart for bold faith, biblical truth, and courageous cultural engagement lives on in every life touched and every community awakened. Under the leadership of Erika Kirk, our team remains steadfast in advancing this calling. We are pressing forward by equipping believers, empowering pastors, and rallying the Church to stand firm in truth with grace. This movement is not slowing down. In fact, God is expanding the work in beautifully unexpected ways and bringing a renewed hope to our mission. We’re witnessing believers rise up with fresh passion, churches unify, and we’re watching God open doors that only He could open. Thank you for praying, standing, and running with us. Together, we continue to carry the torch with faith and endurance. So how can we continue the race well? Let our team pray for you — we would be honored to stand with you in prayer amidst any challenges that you may be facing. Share your prayer requests with us below so our team can lift you up. Find a biblically based church in your area – whether you’re new to finding a church home or looking to relocate, this is the time to find community. Equip yourself, your friends and family and community with knowledge by taking one of our many courses! – If you would like to host a group and receive some free resources while taking this course, you can email mailto:faith@tpusa.com for further details! If you feel called to join this growing movement of believers taking a stand for truth, we’d love to connect you with a local TPUSA Faith Regional Manager. Click the link below and let us know how you would like to get involved. If you feel led, you can support our mission financially so we can continue spreading God’s Word! | Watch the Charlie Kirk Memorial Livestream If you weren’t able to join us in person for the Building a Legacy - Remembering Charlie Kirk Memorial Service, you can still watch the service livestream below. | Christ and Culture Night Recap TPUSA Faith recently had the honor of partnering with Living Stones Church in Crown Point, Indiana to host a Christ and Culture night. TPUSA Faith recently had the honor of partnering with Living Stones Church in Crown Point, Indiana to host a Christ and Culture night. Through this event, over 850+ community members of Crown Point were able to hear from both Pastor Martin Sedra of Echo Church in Australia and Pastor Ron Johnson, Living Stone Church’s very own bold pastor. This event served as a catalyst for unity among Christians, bringing them together for bold, uncompromising conversations on the growing dangers of Islam. This new initiative helps bring renowned speakers and civic encouragement to your local church. body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1062&refcode=email-20251124_v&akid=9894%2E5885482%2Eky1Xgh ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

The far right has put a target on Our Revolution’s back – and as Trump
doubles down on his war on the “radical left”, the stakes have never been
higher.

This month alone, we’ve seen a huge uptick in attention from MAGA outlets
like Fox News and Breitbart. From segments on talk radio to right-wing
influencers, the message is clear: we’re making a difference. That’s why
they’re coming after us, but the scary truth is this is happening as Trump
and his cronies look for any way possible to crackdown on their political
opponents.

We don’t know yet exactly how they’re going to strike, but we are
marshaling our resources to secure our organization as best we can –
upgrading our software and tech defenses and investing in our legal team
on standby.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1108&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251124nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9894%2E5885482%2Eky1Xgh ]Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help Our Revolution
protect our activists, upgrade our security, and protect our movement from
the far right’s attacks?

Revolution

The threats are no longer theoretical. Senator Ted Cruz doubled down on
his dangerous crusade to crush the peaceful “No Kings” protest movement.
He went on national TV, smeared nonviolent protests as “riots,” and
demanded Congress pass his so-called “Stop FUNDERs Act” – a bill designed
to threaten, prosecute, and silence those who support protest actions like
“No Kings.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34052?source=email-20251124&t=1112&akid=9894%2E5885482%2Eky1Xgh ]Headline: Ted Cruz says his bill will allow DOJ to 'prosecute' those
who fund No Kings protests, which have been overwhelmingly peaceful

Earlier this year, Donald Trump quietly signed a new terrifying National
Security directive – NSPM-7, which singles out left-wing activists,
launching a national strategy to “investigate and disrupt” organizations
like ours. And even scarier, it authorizes a 4,000-strong enforcement arm
of the FBI to ‘prevent’ crimes that haven’t even happened.

The intimidation is real – but we refuse to back down. Which is why we are
urgently upgrading our cyber security, growing our legal defense fund, and
training our volunteers on how to stay safe – no matter what Cruz, Trump,
or the extreme right throws at us. But we need resources, fast.

Every dollar we spend defending ourselves is one less dollar we can use
for grassroots organizing, phone banking, or supporting working-class
candidates running against the far right. We never wanted to devote
precious time and money to defense instead of mobilization. But when the
President of the United States declares all political opponents his
enemies, we have no choice.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1105&amount=22&refcode=email-20251124nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9894%2E5885482%2Eky1Xgh ]We need 500 people to step up today to meet our emergency defense fund
goal to be ready to take on the threats coming at us from the far right.
Can you be one of them?

Our Revolution has always played David against Goliath. Each time
billionaires or politicians try to shut us down, we build back stronger
because grassroots supporters like you have our backs.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Wes Moore
subject: Family
body:
Because Thanksgiving is this week
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=969%2E1086043%2E72zVjl)
Peter, with Thanksgiving this week, I’ve got one thing on my mind:
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251024-1.CagDVv&refcode=em-20251124-1&t=2&akid=969%2E1086043%2E72zVjl)
**Family.** Not just my family – my lovely wife Dawn and our two kids – but families across Maryland and the country.
I’ll be honest: These last few months have been tough. Between the government shutdown, workers missing out on paychecks, or folks’ food assistance being put in limbo, too many households have been put under real strain.
But here’s what gives me hope: **When things get hard, Maryland shows what it means to take care of one another.**
We’ve stepped up – protecting workers through the shutdown, keeping vital services running, and pushing back against policies that make life harder for everyday people.
That’s the work I’m committed to, every single day. I hope you’ll help me continue that work with a contribution today, Peter. So I’m asking:
**[If you’re able, will you chip in $5 to keep Maryland moving forward? Your support fuels this work and will help power our reelection effort.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251024-1.CagDVv&refcode=em-20251124-1&t=3&akid=969%2E1086043%2E72zVjl)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251024-1.CagDVv&amount=5&refcode=em-20251124-1&t=22&akid=969%2E1086043%2E72zVjl)**
Thank you,
Wes

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251124-1&t=23&refcode2=969_1086043_72zVjl&akid=969%2E1086043%2E72zVjl)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=969%2E1086043%2E72zVjl)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=969%2E1086043%2E72zVjl)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

subject: I am starting to get concerned, Peter…
body:

name: The Flyover
subject: America's Biggest Threat Is Here
body:
This feels like one of those **" where were you when Kennedy was shot"** moments. It felt like a moment in time, but that single shot started an avalanche of investigations, accusations, and conspiracy theories.

---
| | |
---
| |
# Monday, November 24, 2025
---
**Good afternoon,_Flyover_ readers,** The dust is still settling from the government shutdown, but one thing is already clear: moments like this expose just how fragile the system has become. What looks like a political standoff can ripple into everyday life: from markets and inflation to the savings Americans count on. That's why today's partner message takes a [hard look at what comes next](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJysUT2PnDAQ_TWm88oeg1kKiiSE7k5KFSkN8toDTGQDss2i-_cRuc1KUYo05_Z9-L0331-GF0OelunVBGzzuA4OHVmT0Q0LHsljzhgHEzCSNelG04Qp5zmiyZRmHEBAxaXkUA797n33VMvCtSMioCqwlbUuhZRCXYu5lQAOHOJY2wbh5pwe1VUrsHWjlShlQe3pKiWUshGqqi7S3ozTtWvGq26cNqwU6Civ8fJzpSXPOPq39Y7xYtdQ-HbOeUtMfWLQM-iP47hscc1oMy1TeEvmTsuUOAZD_lQw6B_9lsQfDfl7RS6lqKA6jVRvF6a6a1Vx3VS8bEAw0CZsTH32ialOCMm_np68f0_Dn2M8iWm05JjqaiG_zeJ8uL_--PLE9xwGa8JmaFr-QwvoaA9Mdb___AtK6x4tMtX9E6SIrdsO8p6Srlkppj8bFPmDj39v4VcAAAD__8VryBg), and what steps people can consider when Washington turns off the lights. -- Cole, CEO
* * *
| | | |
# **Americans Biggest**
---
# **Threat Is Here**
---
|
---
| | This feels like one of those **" where were you when Kennedy was shot"** moments. It felt like a moment in time, but that single shot started an avalanche of investigations, accusations, and conspiracy theories. **That 's what you just witnessed when the Democrats shut down the government.** Because the shutdown proved how fragile things can get: billions could be torched. Troops and their families facing missed paychecks. **Seniors and the vulnerable put at risk.** **But** **this isn 't just political -- it's a spiritual fight for the soul of America.** **When the lights at the Capitol go out, here 's what follows:**

clean_body: This feels like one of those " where were you when Kennedy was shot" moments. It felt like a moment in time, but that single shot started an avalanche of investigations, accusations, and conspiracy theories. | | | | | Monday, November 24, 2025 Good afternoon,Flyover readers, The dust is still settling from the government shutdown, but one thing is already clear: moments like this expose just how fragile the system has become. What looks like a political standoff can ripple into everyday life: from markets and inflation to the savings Americans count on. That's why today's partner message takes a , and what steps people can consider when Washington turns off the lights. -- Cole, CEO | | | | Americans Biggest Threat Is Here | | | This feels like one of those " where were you when Kennedy was shot" moments. It felt like a moment in time, but that single shot started an avalanche of investigations, accusations, and conspiracy theories. That 's what you just witnessed when the Democrats shut down the government. Because the shutdown proved how fragile things can get: billions could be torched. Troops and their families facing missed paychecks. Seniors and the vulnerable put at risk. But this isn 't just political -- it's a spiritual fight for the soul of America. When the lights at the Capitol go out, here 's what follows: | | | Markets can lurch. Inflation risk rises. Everyday necessities get pricier. | | | Markets can lurch. Inflation risk rises. Everyday necessities get pricier. | | We don't have to agree, but we DO have to talk about what comes next. Do nothing. Let erosion chew through your retirement savings, dissolving your buying power. Or set a small, boring, diversified safety-net to help protect your purchasing power and tame those swings. This isn't about fear-mongering, or chasing greedy moonshots. It 's called "being grown-ups." So instead of waiting, hoping, and praying for the best, you should at least consider your options. For example, there's an that can let you use existing retirement savings to get physical gold and silver tax and penalty free** when done correctly. It can be simple, when you know exactly how it works, and what to look for. So to make it easy, Plain-English, step-by-step, with everything spelled out. Plus you'll get direct access to a U.S. based precious metals specialist. No hassle, no pressure. At minimum, you should get informed, and discover options you may not have known before. But of course, the choice is yours. | | Goldco, 24025 Park Sorrento, Suite 210, Calabasas, CA, 91302, United States | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne WY 82001 | ---|---

name: Powered by People
subject: Texas Republicans won’t stop. Neither will we.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Texas Republicans are at it again.

A federal court recently blocked their racially gerrymandered
congressional map that was designed to steal up to five Democratic seats
for Trump. But instead of abiding by the ruling, Greg Abbott has appealed
it to the Supreme Court, dragging this out and creating more chaos for
millions of Texans.

People are confused about who represents them, where they vote, which
district they’re in, and whether their voices matter—all because of this
Republican power grab.

We’re not standing by while they try to rig the system. We’re not waiting
to see what happens. Powered by People is already on the ground across
Texas, registering voters, making sure they’re on the rolls, and
connecting them with the information and support they need to make their
voices heard.

We’re doing the work right now to make sure that we can win these
districts, flip seats from red to blue, and take back the House of
Representatives—no matter which maps Republicans try to use. This fight
isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap, which is why we’re asking:

clean_body: [1]Powered By People Texas Republicans are at it again. A federal court recently blocked their racially gerrymandered congressional map that was designed to steal up to five Democratic seats for Trump. But instead of abiding by the ruling, Greg Abbott has appealed it to the Supreme Court, dragging this out and creating more chaos for millions of Texans. People are confused about who represents them, where they vote, which district they’re in, and whether their voices matter—all because of this Republican power grab. We’re not standing by while they try to rig the system. We’re not waiting to see what happens. Powered by People is already on the ground across Texas, registering voters, making sure they’re on the rolls, and connecting them with the information and support they need to make their voices heard. We’re doing the work right now to make sure that we can win these districts, flip seats from red to blue, and take back the House of Representatives—no matter which maps Republicans try to use. This fight isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap, which is why we’re asking: [ ]Can you chip in $3—or whatever you can afford—today to fight back against this power grab? name: Democratically
subject: Democrats warn premiums could spike
body: Murphy says the shutdown deal put families at risk. (https://democratically.org/) Peter Sen. Chris Murphy isn’t holding back. He says Democrats made a mistake by ending the shutdown without securing the health-care subsidies millions depend on. Without renewed support, premiums could spike, forcing families to pay more for the same coverage. Democrats are moving fast to fix this before protections disappear. The stakes for working families are real, and the window to act is closing. Watch on ABC (https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/democratic-sen-murphy-caving-end-shutdown-mistake/story?id=127568958) Democratically Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Sent by: Democratically.org 712 H St NE Unit #8746 Washington, DC 20002 You are receiving this ad-supported email because you subscribed at the Democratically.org website. President Donald Trump’s latest national security initiative has zeroed in on one of the most controversial Islamic political movements in modern history: the Muslim Brotherhood. In a striking announcement made to Just The News, Trump confirmed that his administration is preparing to formally designate the Muslim Brotherhood as a Foreign Terrorist Organization (FTO) — a [...]

# **[Protestors Stage Demonstration At Hardware Store](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
In the ever-expanding world of performative protest, a recent stunt at Home Depot has managed to do the impossible: unite the internet in eye-rolling disbelief. In what was apparently meant to be a stand against ICE enforcement actions in parking lots, a group of left-wing activists organized a protest that hinged—literally—on hardware.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-syJew)
# **[Allegations Made About NYC Food Drive](http://trk.libertyledger.-syJew)**
---
Thanksgiving is supposed to be a time for generosity, humility, and service to others. That’s why politicians across the country have spent the past several weeks showing up to food drives, volunteering at food banks, and posing for the obligatory “giving back” photos—smiling as they hand a frozen turkey to a struggling parent or crouch [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-syJew)

# **[Sheriff's Speech Stirs Backlash](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
A recent speech by a Minnesota sheriff has ignited a firestorm, not only for what he said—but for how he said it. Delivered not in English, but in Somali, the sheriff’s remarks have sparked a fierce debate about cultural allegiance, law enforcement priorities, and the meaning of public service in a nation built on shared [...]

[](http://trk.libertyledger._w)

Another day, another exercise in selective outrage from CNN’s Jake Tapper — a man who has managed to become a caricature of the very thing he pretends to hold accountable: bias in journalism. This time, Tapper is doing verbal gymnastics to defend a bizarre and dangerous political stunt by Democrats, while predictably criticizing Donald Trump [...]

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119905635/584615349/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTFlY2Y1OS02OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=huwx3MlKqUiLQzS4rUFqRjDFEd4eWzBVOjasuRWfrcg=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: DOJ’s Demand for State Voter Rolls Threatens Fair Elections**
* * *
Friend, Let’s be clear about what’s happening: Trump’s Department of Justice is pressuring states to turn over full voter roll data — not just names, but personal information, history, and eligibility details — and it’s already suing states that refuse. **This is not a routine request.** It’s not about election security. It’s about control. It’s about compiling centralized data to target, intimidate, and ultimately purge voters. This could pave the way for aggressive, baseless voter purges and chilling federal overreach. And it’s happening **right now** , right as 26 Secretary of State races heat up ahead of the 2026 elections. _We can’t afford to wait._ [**The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State is leading the response to this crisis, but we need your help to scale up now. Will you chip in $3 to defend voter data, fight back in court, and protect fair elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119905636/584615350/-248329304?refcode=em-11.24.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTFlY2Y1OS02OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=huwx3MlKqUiLQzS4rUFqRjDFEd4eWzBVOjasuRWfrcg=) | | | **[DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119905637/584615351/-248329304?refcode=em-11.24.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTFlY2Y1OS02OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=huwx3MlKqUiLQzS4rUFqRjDFEd4eWzBVOjasuRWfrcg=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: DOJ’s Demand for State Voter Rolls Threatens Fair Elections Friend, Let’s be clear about what’s happening: Trump’s Department of Justice is pressuring states to turn over full voter roll data — not just names, but personal information, history, and eligibility details — and it’s already suing states that refuse. This is not a routine request. It’s not about election security. It’s about control. It’s about compiling centralized data to target, intimidate, and ultimately purge voters. This could pave the way for aggressive, baseless voter purges and chilling federal overreach. And it’s happening right now , right as 26 Secretary of State races heat up ahead of the 2026 elections. We can’t afford to wait. = | | | = Trump and his allies are working overtime to rig the rules for 2026 and 2028 — and Republican Secretaries of State are already rolling over to hand them the tools. But we still have time to fight back, and stop this takeover in its tracks. Every dollar you give helps elect Secretaries who will refuse to comply, defend state laws, and stand between Trump’s DOJ and your personal data. name: Team Cooper
subject: Priced out of the doctor’s office? 🩺
body:
Trump is trying to make us all sicker.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=65%2E124072%2EXlxX25)
| **YOUR NAME NEEDED ✍️**
**[Peter, we’re asking Roy Cooper supporters in Englewood if they’re in favor of health care coverage we can all afford. Will you stand with Roy for affordable, accessible health care and sign on now?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TrumpACAsubsidies_112425/?t=6&akid=65%2E124072%2EXlxX25)** | [YES, I’M PRO-AFFORDABLE HEALTH INSURANCE](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TrumpACAsubsidies_112425/?t=7&akid=65%2E124072%2EXlxX25)
---
In case you missed it, Donald Trump has decided he will REFUSE to renew Affordable Care Act subsidies that help people stay insured, Peter. **Trump is trying to send your health insurance premiums through the roof — and effectively price you out of your doctor’s office.**
As Governor, Attorney General, and a legislator, Roy Cooper has been a _true_ champion for health care access of all kinds. Roy:
🏥 Signed North Carolina’s Medicaid expansion into law, enabling **more than 675,000 people** — over a third of whom live in rural areas — to enroll in health care coverage
🏥 Drove hospitals to relieve **more than $6.5 billion of existing medical debt** for over 2.5 million eligible North Carolinians — and prevent new debt, too
🏥 Wrote North Carolina’s **first children’s health insurance initiative**
**[Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to _protect and expand_ our access to health care — not tear it away from us. Meanwhile, Roy’s opponent Michael Whatley opposed lowering prescription drug prices and keeping rural hospitals open and put millions of us at risk of losing health care coverage. Peter, show you stand with Roy for health insurance we can all afford by adding your name now >>>](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TrumpACAsubsidies_112425/?t=8&akid=65%2E124072%2EXlxX25)**
[SIGN ON](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_TrumpACAsubsidies_112425/?t=9&akid=65%2E124072%2EXlxX25)
---
For a healthier future,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=65%2E124072%2EXlxX25)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=65%2E124072%2EXlxX25)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=65%2E124072%2EXlxX25)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=65%2E124072%2EXlxX25)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602

The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. name: Robert Garcia
subject: This will not get buried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Release the files. All of them.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119905663/584615491/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjA4Y2FjNi02OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f81fYyRJ_yaANTlCWlBcaEIXBKTBExgtBy_u7eE8g7o=)
Let me get straight to it.
Attorney General Pam Bondi is already working behind the scenes to slow down the release of the Epstein files — the same files that contain years of evidence, testimony, and names tied to one of the most horrific abuse and trafficking operations in modern history.
But our Committee issued a subpoena requiring a **FULL** release of those files. No redactions to protect powerful people. No delays to run out the clock. No excuses.
**Our message is clear: Stop the delays. Release the files.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119905664/584615492/789508428?refcode=251124_RG_releasethemall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjA4Y2FjNi02OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f81fYyRJ_yaANTlCWlBcaEIXBKTBExgtBy_u7eE8g7o=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119905665/584615493/-309737922?refcode=251124_RG_releasethemall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjA4Y2FjNi02OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f81fYyRJ_yaANTlCWlBcaEIXBKTBExgtBy_u7eE8g7o=)
Every survivor who came forward deserves the truth to see daylight. They deserve accountability. They deserve justice — not another round of political games designed to shield the wealthy and well-connected.
**We are not backing down.
We are not negotiating.
We are not letting this get buried. **
_But Bondi and her allies will use every legal tactic they can to stall, block, or weaken our subpoena. They are counting on people tuning out, giving up, or moving on._
That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me.
**[We need the resources to fight this all the way — in committee, in court, and in the public square — and to make sure these files are released in full. Will you chip in today to help us keep the pressure on and demand justice for survivors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119905666/584615494/789508428?refcode=251124_RG_releasethemall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjA4Y2FjNi02OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f81fYyRJ_yaANTlCWlBcaEIXBKTBExgtBy_u7eE8g7o=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119905667/584615495/-309737922?refcode=251124_RG_releasethemall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjA4Y2FjNi02OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f81fYyRJ_yaANTlCWlBcaEIXBKTBExgtBy_u7eE8g7o=)
This is a moment of truth. Either we let the powerful protect each other, or we stand with the survivors who have waited far too long.
_I know which side I’m on. Are you with me? _
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119905668/584615496/-309737922?refcode=251124_RG_releasethemall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjA4Y2FjNi02OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f81fYyRJ_yaANTlCWlBcaEIXBKTBExgtBy_u7eE8g7o=)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: A few things I’m considering today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Will you help me fight for a better country?
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98269?refcode=em20251124-9752&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9752%2E614464%2Eqon2Pl)
I want to tell you about a few things that are important to me, Peter, so I hope you’ll give me just a minute or two of your time today:
**Public education:** My mom was a public school teacher right here in North Carolina, and I attended public schools all the way from first grade through university and law school. Our future leaders are learning in public schools today. I believe _every_ child deserves an excellent public education — no matter where their parents live or what they earn — and I’ll make public education a priority in the Senate.
**Health care access:** Expanding Medicaid was one of our most impactful accomplishments during my service as Governor of North Carolina. America is the richest country in the world, and every one of us deserves the care we need to stay healthy — and bringing Medicaid Expansion to NC helped more than 670,000 people get it. But the entire Medicaid system is now at risk because national Republicans decided to slash Medicaid funding and give a handout to the rich instead. I will fight to save Medicaid for all Americans.
**Voting rights:** North Carolina has been a proving ground for the GOP’s worst efforts to undermine voting rights and access. They’ve enacted ultra-partisan gerrymanders and restrictive anti-voter laws. In the wake of a 2024 election loss, Republicans even launched a lawsuit attempting to throw out tens of thousands of valid ballots and change the result. We must defend and expand voting rights to ensure that every one of us can have our fair say in our democracy — and we have to be prepared for the GOP to try to steal future elections that they lose.
**[Peter, I know we share many of the same values, beliefs and hopes for our nation’s future. I’m ready to do everything in my power to make this country better for all of us, but I need your help to make it to the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to split a $25 donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98269?refcode=em20251124-9752&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9752%2E614464%2Eqon2Pl)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98269?refcode=em20251124-9752&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9752%2E614464%2Eqon2Pl)**
I appreciate all your help in this fight,
Roy Cooper

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=4&akid=9752%2E614464%2Eqon2Pl).

name: Chris Taylor HQ
subject: 3 reasons why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251124-847&t=1&akid=852%2E294397%2EpJfGV2)
Team,
If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to give, here are three reasons why today is the day:
1. **We have a new far-right opponent.** Maria Lazar entered the race last month, and if elected, she would be one of the most extreme members of the Wisconsin Supreme Court.

2. **Dark money is on the way.** Now that right-wing special interests have their handpicked candidate, we’re expecting them to pour millions into Wisconsin to boost Lazar’s campaign and try to buy a seat on our court.

3. **Grassroots power is how we win.** In the last judicial election, Elon Musk and other far-right megadonors spent over $50 million trying to tip the scales in their favor. The only way we can compete is with thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipping in whatever you can to power our campaign.

This is a crucial moment for our campaign. Every contribution today helps us stay ahead of any attacks and build the people-powered campaign it’ll take to win.
[**Can you chip in $10 right now to help elect Judge Chris Taylor and protect Wisconsin’s future?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251124_1_ak.SAtVkO&amount=10&refcode=em20251124-847&t=3&akid=852%2E294397%2EpJfGV2)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251124_1_ak.SAtVkO&amount=10&refcode=em20251124-847&t=22&akid=852%2E294397%2EpJfGV2)**
Thank you for stepping up,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251124-847&t=23&refcode2=852_294397_pJfGV2&akid=852%2E294397%2EpJfGV2)**

name: Voter Action Project Letters
subject: Tell the Senate: Stop the SAVE Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
Donald Trump recently pardoned top MAGA allies who aided his bid to subvert the 2020 election , including Rudy Giuliani, Mark Meadows, and dozens of others. This is another dangerous and embarrassing blow to American democracy from a White House dead set on rigging the 2026 midterms.
Trump has stacked his administration with election deniers who back his claim that the 2020 elections were stolen . These Trump loyalists are overseeing the midterms, and they’re dismantling systems meant to secure voting and striking fear into election officials.
Republicans in Congress are backing Trump’s power grab by pushing the SAVE Act — a devastating voter suppression bill that will make it harder for tens of millions of people to cast their ballots.
Send a message to your U.S. Senators: Stop the SAVE Act! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Trump has tried to make mail-in voting illegal and registering to vote extremely difficult . He so-called election monitors to California and New Jersey who could seize ballot boxes and fix the election for him. Governor Gavin Newsom said, “ Deploying these federal forces appears to be an intimidation tactic meant for one thing: Suppress the vote .”
Fueled by the far-right’s propaganda about so-called “non-citizen voting,” the SAVE Act would require people to prove that they’re citizens in order to vote by providing a birth certificate, passport, or naturalization papers. 21 million eligible voters don’t have these documents readily available.
Opponents of voting rights in the U.S. House already jammed the bill through , so we must stop it in the Senate.
Block Trump’s attempts to steal the 2026 midterms, add your name to oppose the SAVE Act today >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/dont-let-trump-steal-the-midterms-stop-the-save-act/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112425_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112425_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

subject: This isn’t a drill. They’re coming after MAGA.

body:
Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? If you do, I’m BEGGING YOU to read this email...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._odr0d6i1fA)Hey you!
Yes, you, Peter.
No, not your laptop. The person looking at it!
I was really hoping to reach you today.
This is Congressman Troy Downing, and I want to thank you for opening my message. Can I borrow just one more minute of your time?
**President Donald J. Trump and House Republicans have accomplished a historic eleven-month run unlike anything in modern American history.**
_🇺🇸 We secured the border 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We brought back American jobs 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We cut taxes for working Americans 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We reduced government waste 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We eliminated the woke agenda 🇺🇸_ The tide has turned in our favor.
**_BUT!!! BUT!!! BUT!!!_**
**WE CAN’T REST ON OUR LAURELS NOW!!!**
The Democrats are more desperate than ever.
They’ve doubled down on extremism with their unhinged socialist economic policies, woke DEI agenda, and aggressive climate change plan.
They’ve become a dangerous cabal that **CANNOT BE TRUSTED** with America’s future.
If the pro-Trump GOP can hold the majority through 2028 and solidify America’s Golden Age.
But we need the funds to make it happen NOW!
The further we fall behind the Democrats in fundraising, the closer we get to losing our chance.
**_Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? It’s time to prove it._**
I’m not asking you to risk life and limb for your country (though I think you would). I’m just requesting $17 to lock in a Republican House Majority for two more years. [Is it worth it to you?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[CHIP IN $17 RIGHT NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)–Troy| |

Chuck and Mike sit down with music icon and Texas's 15th congressional district candidate Bobby Pulido for a raw, insightful discussion about culture, politics, and the future of South Texas. The platinum-selling Tejano music star breaks down why this heavily Latino district swung from 60% for Beto O'Rourke to 60% for Trump in just eight years, offering an unflinching look at what Democrats got wrong.
Bobby introduces a game-changing perspective: "People down here don't consider themselves poor--they consider themselves _broke_. When you're broke, you say 'tomorrow I'm going to make it.' Democrats treated people like they're poor, not like they're broke." This distinction captures why aspirational Latino voters are shifting right.
From his ranch hall campaign events (complete with barbecue and conjunto music) to challenging both parties on immigration, Bobby represents a new generation of Latino Democratic candidates willing to tell hard truths. He discusses the Republican dominance on social media, why border communities feel abandoned, and his plan to win back Trump voters without compromising Democratic values.

clean_body: Watch now (44 mins) | The Latino Vote Podcast Episode 38 | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | The Latino Vote Podcast Episode 38 | | and | Nov 24 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Chuck and Mike sit down with music icon and Texas's 15th congressional district candidate Bobby Pulido for a raw, insightful discussion about culture, politics, and the future of South Texas. The platinum-selling Tejano music star breaks down why this heavily Latino district swung from 60% for Beto O'Rourke to 60% for Trump in just eight years, offering an unflinching look at what Democrats got wrong. Bobby introduces a game-changing perspective: "People down here don't consider themselves poor--they consider themselves broke. When you're broke, you say 'tomorrow I'm going to make it.' Democrats treated people like they're poor, not like they're broke." This distinction captures why aspirational Latino voters are shifting right. From his ranch hall campaign events (complete with barbecue and conjunto music) to challenging both parties on immigration, Bobby represents a new generation of Latino Democratic candidates willing to tell hard truths. He discusses the Republican dominance on social media, why border communities feel abandoned, and his plan to win back Trump voters without compromising Democratic values. * | A guest post by| political guide to America during the Great Transformation Latino GOP political consultant; Co-Founder The Lincoln Project 🐿 Author: "The Latino Century: How Americas Largest Minority is Transforming Democracy". The Latino Vote Podcast is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell The Latino Vote Podcast that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 The Latino Vote Podcast 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Better pay means a better life and a better economy for all of us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
We’re fighting for jobs that provide workers the pay and respect they deserve.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KAVN5SFKC7YDK5R0FQ6JTWYQ_0)

| | | | Dear Peter, Every working Tennessean deserves a living wage for a hard day’s work. **Yet right now, too many are earning less than they did a decade ago while the cost of living climbs. **

A new report by United Way of Tennessee, in partnership with United For ALICE, reveals a sobering reality: 44% of Tennessee’s 2.85 million households cannot afford the basics - housing, food, child care, transportation, health care, and technology.

We’re fighting to rebuild and strengthen the middle class—raising pay rates to a living wage, ensuring pay equity for women, protecting workers from harassment, and building an economy that creates safe, well paying jobs in every corner of our state.

Will you **chip in today** so we can power Tennessee’s future—**one that lifts up _everyone_?**

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: My least favorite part of the job →
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
I would never ask for even $1 if I couldn’t tell you exactly how your donation would have an outsized impact on our race.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119906457/584618229/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGVjODM5NjctNmNjOS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSs0OHlKiuavvJGJT0xlzRbHb3uLl6YRjGEsGRn5psw=) Friend,

I’ll be honest with you: Asking for your hard earned money every month is my _least favorite part of running for Congress._

**But the reality is that our race here in Oregon’s Fifth District is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, and I can’t win next November without your support.**

In 2024, far-right MAGA Republicans fought hard to keep this seat red – **but we were able to flip it blue thanks to supporters like you.[Now, I’m asking you to step up once again to help us hold this seat. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119906461/584618266/-629675555?refcode=email_112425_RS-051525&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGVjODM5NjctNmNjOS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSs0OHlKiuavvJGJT0xlzRbHb3uLl6YRjGEsGRn5psw=)** You can trust that I would never ask for even $1 if I couldn’t tell you exactly how your donation would have an outsized impact on our race.

On a grassroots campaign like ours, **[$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119906467/584618271/-629675555?refcode=email_112425_RS-051525&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGVjODM5NjctNmNjOS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSs0OHlKiuavvJGJT0xlzRbHb3uLl6YRjGEsGRn5psw=)** from Portland helps us print yard signs;**[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119906471/584618276/-629675555?refcode=email_102925_RS-051525&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGVjODM5NjctNmNjOS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSs0OHlKiuavvJGJT0xlzRbHb3uLl6YRjGEsGRn5psw=)** from Bend helps us reach more voters; and **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119906474/584618281/-629675555?refcode=email_102925_RS-051525&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGVjODM5NjctNmNjOS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSs0OHlKiuavvJGJT0xlzRbHb3uLl6YRjGEsGRn5psw=) **from Happy Valley helps to fight back against any attack Republicans throw our way. **[To ensure our campaign is on track to win this highly competitive race, my team has set a goal of raising $3,500 by midnight on Sunday.
