name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: How $1 becomes an unstoppable force of people power
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251124-1641-foote&t=1001&akid=1641%2E342411%2E-e5526 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

$1.

That’s all we’re asking for today.

One commitment. One spark for change. One step towards the future we’re
determined to build together.

Our movement has never relied on corporate PACs or billionaires. We rely
on supporters like you, chipping in what you can, whenever you can. Every
contribution, no matter the size, fuels the work that keeps our
communities strong, our voices loud, and our fight for justice alive.

Here’s what your $1 can do:

📣 Amplify progressive voices. With just $1, you help us keep our
progressive champions at the table so they can continue showing up to
Congress every day to speak truth to power, hold the line against
authoritarianism, and fight for a government that actually serves the
people.

⛽ Fuel the fights that matter most. Your $1 becomes the spark that pushes
forward policies that uplift working families, from Medicare for All and
the Green New Deal to protecting workers’ rights and expanding affordable
housing.

💪 Show the might of our movement. One single dollar may not seem like a
lot on its own, but when thousands of supporters like you decide to give
together, we become a force that moves campaigns, shapes impactful
legislation, and proves that real power lies with the people, not the
wealthy few.

Squad Victory Fund is committed to building a movement that delivers
justice, opportunity, and dignity for everyone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/20211?c0=svfem-20251124-movement.MqqEB0&refcode=em20251124-1641&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1641%2E342411%2E-e5526 ]So, Peter,
can we count on you to chip in $1 today to keep our movement strong? Your
$1 is a direct challenge to the far-right forces who think they can buy
our future, and a reminder that our strength is in the people who refuse
to back down from this fight.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251124-movement.zDxeU9&refcode=em20251124-1641&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1641%2E342411%2E-e5526 ]Contribute ››

Thank you for standing with us.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1641%2E342411%2E-e5526

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: The Left feared this book
body:
Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost.

| | |
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkbGu2zAMRb9G3hxYpCLZg4eigYEO760dBUpiYuHZkmvJye8XbtMP6EbwXB6AuD8_7AfFJabHJ608-me0e7F15oXv9c60c6hzLC7nLwsdXFspW1BnRjZh9EEjNDxKo1UnEa-ymUeJ4JyUvZHgtboiOm3YDIYp9IOj0MTxNEkJSg4KsLsE7DAMndd3pYJnJ1R3bIEql4vPqfD-pBqfHFPK55TTxee1Wca51q0I_CZgEjAV9sfOF0occj0TAqZ67CmmR7vlmGp7FBIwcX8Fds610gzQKuO6dkCDLd899c5r9BAETiUfu2frc2CBt-8_Ps211yBAH3W1K4d4rAJvvFJc3su_FwJvM-2Bypcl_-uNPK0bxUc6YX7ZF9tXTP9YTpVTFXijZh_D9orLEos2QnWP0_7n2fp_1TxH-B0AAP__Dz-bmQ)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.

clean_body: During the shutdown, my priority was YOU and your families, not raising money. It was the right call – but now, this is what I see in our ActBlue: | Peter, I don’t like writing emails like this, but I have to be honest: We are running far behind our fundraising goals for the month. During the shutdown, my priority was YOU and your families, not raising money. It was the right call – but now, this is what I see in our ActBlue: = We’re doing a lot of ambitious things: hiring political staff, endorsing candidates, adopting a swing district, and more to come. I really don’t want to have to scale back. There’s way, WAY too much at stake. My goal is to raise another $6,172 by the end of the month to get us out of the red.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = I really appreciate your support! 💙 — Emily P.S. Members of Congress shouldn’t have to spend so much time raising money! We really, really need campaign finance reform!! | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team? = Want to maximize your impact?Become a monthly donor to help us flip the House from red to blue! = Follow on: | | | | | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
#

The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25-dod/.t5EZ4X&refcode=em251124-1-1mil&t=1&akid=6254%2E6688874%2EGNExpx)
When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
[**The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25-dod/.t5EZ4X&refcode=em251124-1-1mil&t=2&akid=6254%2E6688874%2EGNExpx)

name: Team Phil
subject: What are your top priorities, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
Checking in with you.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119907662/584622633/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_PET_3Priorities_112425_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTI3MjQzMC03MGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwiNilpaaheYExVFDWKbGdIrjZcZVQ3RiFIG2D6sW6o=&emci=c94c9fc0-69c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=85272430-70c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=51844520) Our next governor will have their hands full, friend. And Phil’s ready for the challenge. Friends and neighbors from Fort Collins to Durango have told us what’s keeping them up at night: A lack of affordable housing. Access to health care. A thriving future for our kids. Protecting our democracy. Defending our air, land, and water. Having Coloradans’ backs by curbing corporate exploitation. Standing up to bullies everywhere — particularly the one currently occupying the White House. **[Look, the to-do list is long, but as this movement grows, we want to know what YOU care about. So we’re asking Coloradans everywhere to share: What are your top 3 biggest issues these days?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119907665/584622636/1663393895?refcode=em_WEI_PET_3Priorities_112425_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTI3MjQzMC03MGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwiNilpaaheYExVFDWKbGdIrjZcZVQ3RiFIG2D6sW6o=&emci=c94c9fc0-69c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=85272430-70c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=51844520)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119907668/584622641/1663393895?refcode=em_WEI_PET_3Priorities_112425_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTI3MjQzMC03MGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwiNilpaaheYExVFDWKbGdIrjZcZVQ3RiFIG2D6sW6o=&emci=c94c9fc0-69c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=85272430-70c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=51844520)

Phil’s running for governor because Colorado deserves a fighter. A true fighter listens deeply to the people about the challenges they’re facing, takes on those challenges, and sees them through.

He’s also returned hundreds of millions of dollars to Colorado renters, workers, and consumers by holding irresponsible corporations accountable for dodging the law.

OHIO: Senator Jon Husted is stepping up to defend conservative

against radical policies.

Attorney General, now in the Senate – fighting for the values
Floridians care about most.

CHIP IN TO EXPAND THE GOP MAJORITY

I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served
in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, AND LAST
NOVEMBER I DEFEATED AN ENTRENCHED CAREER POLITICIAN IN THE #1 SWING
STATE OF THE 2024 ELECTION.

I’ve seen firsthand what great leadership looks like. I’ve seen
that even on our worst days, you have to put the needs of others
first.

That’s why I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with
fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up
Washington, and I’m working to do that every single day.

Whether it’s securing the border, reducing crime in our cities,
ending the fentanyl epidemic, or bringing down the cost of
living–I’M COMMITTED TO DELIVERING CONCRETE SOLUTIONS TO THE
BIGGEST ISSUES WE FACE.

But in order to get the job done, it’s going to take all hands on
deck. I need every freedom-loving American to help me shake up
Washington. I promise I won't let you down.

_Senator Dave McCormick_

clean_body: [] Friend, do you want America to be more like Mamdani’s New York City? If not, we must protect the Republican Senate majority, and that starts with SUPPORTING KEY CONSERVATIVE CANDIDATES [] in battleground states: OHIO: Senator Jon Husted is stepping up to defend conservative leadership, protect your values, and grow an economy that works for everyone NORTH CAROLINA: Michael Whatley is ready to stand strong for North Carolina families and communities, defending freedom and opportunity against radical policies. * FLORIDA: Senator Ashley Moody has a proven record – first as Florida Attorney General, now in the Senate – fighting for the values Floridians care about most. CHIP IN TO EXPAND THE GOP MAJORITY [] The stakes could not be higher. If we fail to support these leaders now, the Senate could swing away from conservatives, leaving Washington in the hands of politicians determined to erode the freedoms and opportunities we hold dear. YOUR CONTRIBUTION TODAY GIVES THESE CANDIDATES THE RESOURCES THEY NEED TO COMPETE, CONNECT WITH VOTERS, AND WIN THEIR RACES. EVERY DOLLAR MAKES A REAL DIFFERENCE. [] CHIP IN $15 [] CHIP IN $25 [] CHIP IN $50 [] CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT [] Grassroots patriots like you are the backbone of victories in critical Senate races. Let’s make sure America doesn’t turn into Mamdani’s New York City and give Jon, Michael, and Ashley the support they need to win in 2026. Thank you for standing strong, Team McCormick [] I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, AND LAST NOVEMBER I DEFEATED AN ENTRENCHED CAREER POLITICIAN IN THE #1 SWING STATE OF THE 2024 ELECTION. I’ve seen firsthand what great leadership looks like. I’ve seen that even on our worst days, you have to put the needs of others first. That’s why I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I’m working to do that every single day. Whether it’s securing the border, reducing crime in our cities, ending the fentanyl epidemic, or bringing down the cost of living–I’M COMMITTED TO DELIVERING CONCRETE SOLUTIONS TO THE BIGGEST ISSUES WE FACE. But in order to get the job done, it’s going to take all hands on deck. I need every freedom-loving American to help me shake up Washington. I promise I won't let you down. name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by One Pennsylvania
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119908383/584625447/-774957750?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20251124_ta_deluzio_surr_xx_act_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4ZmIyNGUwLTcwYzktZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EmZehSzPxCXV_35XmR3lJS7fiWp9rQjwL7Ub7THAN1M=)

Peter, Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest. He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress. Why? Because we spoke a simple truth: no service member is forced to follow an illegal order. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, one that I first swore as a 17-year old at the Naval Academy, and binds us all to the rule of law. I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me. _**[If you’re willing to support a Navy veteran who believes in the rule of law, in the Constitution, in the promise of democracy—then I’m asking you, right now, to step up and help me fight back by splitting a contribution between One PA and me →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119908385/584625449/-774957750?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20251124_ta_deluzio_surr_xx_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4ZmIyNGUwLTcwYzktZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EmZehSzPxCXV_35XmR3lJS7fiWp9rQjwL7Ub7THAN1M=)**_ | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119908386/584625450/-774957750?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20251124_ta_deluzio_surr_xx_act_xx_sbt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4ZmIyNGUwLTcwYzktZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EmZehSzPxCXV_35XmR3lJS7fiWp9rQjwL7Ub7THAN1M=)

I took the oath in the Navy—and I took it again when I was elected to Congress.
That oath doesn’t expire—and I’ll be damned if Donald Trump, a man who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, tells me how to serve this country.
So Trump can threaten me, call for my arrest, and even try to incite violence against me, but he can’t scare me into abandoning my oath.
_**[Peter, I believe in our country and our Constitution. If you do too, chip in anything you can today to help One PA and me defend democracy, protect our freedoms, and stand up to this insurrectionist president →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119908388/584625452/-774957750?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20251124_ta_deluzio_surr_xx_act_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4ZmIyNGUwLTcwYzktZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EmZehSzPxCXV_35XmR3lJS7fiWp9rQjwL7Ub7THAN1M=)**_

clean_body: | = Peter, Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest. He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress. Why? Because we spoke a simple truth: no service member is forced to follow an illegal order. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, one that I first swore as a 17-year old at the Naval Academy, and binds us all to the rule of law. I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me. = | = I took the oath in the Navy—and I took it again when I was elected to Congress. That oath doesn’t expire—and I’ll be damned if Donald Trump, a man who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, tells me how to serve this country. So Trump can threaten me, call for my arrest, and even try to incite violence against me, but he can’t scare me into abandoning my oath. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = DON’T GIVE UP THE SHIP! name: August Pfluger
subject: Without natural gas, America goes DARK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by August Pfluger for Congress
body:
Pipelines mean jobs, lower costs, and energy security. We MUST protect them.

[](https://trk.emails.augustpfluger._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyNF9EWC1aSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTk4NDAtMTQ3NSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjRfRFgtWkguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzU5ODQwLTE0NzUifQ/_4b0kOBXPZxgha-WYVLXzQ)Peter,
There is no path to a reliable grid without natural gas. Period.
Here in the Permian Basin, one of America's largest natural gas-producing regions, we know what it takes to keep this country running.
If we’re going to meet rising energy demand while keeping the lights on, we must modernize and expand our natural gas infrastructure. Pipelines are the safest way to transport energy, and LNG stations are critical to meeting America’s needs.
So why is one of America’s greatest advantages under attack?
Because the radical Left has spent years waging war on American Energy, killing jobs, driving up costs, and making us dependent on foreign adversaries.
In Congress, I’m fighting for energy independence every single day by:
✅ Unleashing American oil, gas, and coal✅ Cutting job-killing regulations✅ Lowering energy costs for families✅ Ending foreign energy dependence✅ Strengthening national security
This is America-First Energy. But the Left will stop at nothing to block our plan and shut down our energy dominance.
[That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me to POWER the Great American Comeback:](https://trk.emails.augustpfluger._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyNF9EWC1aSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTk4NDAtMTQ3NSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjRfRFgtWkguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzU5ODQwLTE0NzUifQ/YHMjmPUBDcRtJWw9V4gHlw)[](https://trk.emails.augustpfluger._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyNF9EWC1aSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTk4NDAtMTQ3NSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjRfRFgtWkguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzU5ODQwLTE0NzUifQ/2x6qgKHo0snsOL5YHwxw6Q)[TAKE BACK OUR POWER
](https://trk.emails.augustpfluger._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTEyNF9EWC1aSC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTk4NDAtMTQ3NSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMjRfRFgtWkguMTEwMTE3X3QxNzU5ODQwLTE0NzUifQ/6FiXzjaWrentFbao0-o1Ew)Together, we can secure America’s energy future, protect jobs here at home, and keep our nation strong. But I can’t do it alone. I NEED your support right now to send a clear message: we will never surrender America’s energy independence to the radical Left.
Thanks for your support in the fight for energy independence.

God bless,
August Pfluger| | |

| Peter,

If you want to make the biggest possible impact in the fight against MAGA extremism, here’s the truth: **Emerge is one of the highest-ROI investments in Democratic politics.** After 20 years of training, recruiting, and electing Democratic women, our 2025 results speak for themselves:

**• 77% — Emerge’s overall win rate.**
Nearly 300 alums were on the ballot in 20 states, and 223 won their races.

**• 63% — Win rate for Emerge’s first-time candidates.**
That’s six times the national average for first-time Democratic candidates!

**• 94% — Win rate for Emerge incumbents.**
Our leaders stay in the fight and keep delivering for their communities.

Emerge alums are shifting power everywhere, but the stakes are only getting higher. If we want to stop Trump’s agenda and rebuild our democracy, we need to train even more women to step up and run.

clean_body: If we want to stop Trump’s agenda and rebuild our democracy, we need to train even more women to step up and run. | = | Peter, If you want to make the biggest possible impact in the fight against MAGA extremism, here’s the truth: Emerge is one of the highest-ROI investments in Democratic politics. After 20 years of training, recruiting, and electing Democratic women, our 2025 results speak for themselves: • 77% — Emerge’s overall win rate. Nearly 300 alums were on the ballot in 20 states, and 223 won their races. • 63% — Win rate for Emerge’s first-time candidates. That’s six times the national average for first-time Democratic candidates! • 94% — Win rate for Emerge incumbents. Our leaders stay in the fight and keep delivering for their communities. Emerge alums are shifting power everywhere, but the stakes are only getting higher. If we want to stop Trump’s agenda and rebuild our democracy, we need to train even more women to step up and run. = | | | = | = | = | = | = — Team Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

## Commonsense Corner:
---
We need to ban stock trading for members of Congress—once and for all. Last week, the House Administration Committee dragged the issue back into the spotlight, but Tim didn’t mince words on [Fox News](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/7M7SJhBU_-0nTGyHYXUZgHHdW6kbwkdFN1xh3QRN7793st8XF2EhMsvV0nCU1ayMtKGkZ4v_ckZMYtGK5odecRQE2drMcwe2Ure-H-TpShsMocY0tZYovQ_rQstsB48-YFTcLnVkwoQ1RUvlqtJ7sLJy5Yhb8whXIz07KFv_pbE9CHXW-y5M4kOQsEbUt5nL7ONdEgERmOoB5l4LYyKJJr-JhBAg_6MCN1w8EM-3_sejDE5nkI85KSEUbvu1bmiCr3_flpTVwIRA7TDFIpdatZo37M8N1HHO4IoA3eP6HhsqxwmflCKFfc-ye63Ml43OjeUhprGtGTYeRf8CkZdgoamOtdSAq6gxKy7bh1R-qG9NaF80eMhiR12D2lahV4enjGD-q6dLzKzMHWcChY2PtsAaTw/KGtW-a8_V1Tn_NjJGJQJPIN25g-w1-_f/15): the chances of Congress passing a real ban are _slim._ Even when the House pretends to move on the topic, the Senate lets it fall into a black hole—or rewrites it into something unrecognizable. Then both sides shrug and say, “Well, we tried.” But Tim’s hip to these [crooked games](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/u2ITj0bC44AGSu-cmXck3rAQlS95bhgvddIyq0lINyTPrZ7hFZ7kgtmArzXEEsMy4-dSF1zffv51ZDJ3kRu10zvBQB_aj0Sz1zEStfQnYcXVdKvb0wpUvLJxVua1tqnh51DNSAj-G4JbqebJVwU-4vQ8BqJID-24FNl8DRwngIJtf60596XKd0n2tP8R8wiDgOaPN9zfdEv9BWFlDMXz9LyjhtXIoShp-alxSPQxLjDcfcp5RkQ7AEm5O7kmV-KeTWpTW2JbxQH_WZ3lxaSJZSFgtMAOtvh8oh2gjaHfAiYttL6PwNDCHsocs9vIuwR3dFIyNqvCz1wCKkCNQ8dmNaDrqKqlnen6XJf-_3lhE2DUQGrXVsqoIqTuqoD1_BX-VAFpj9i27QoUX_xJSHnI9i-3eGuw8P5i8WQfurx05lN8FxQabG_KAkADK8dJHg0oY2n6ofCVKKJK_ervFl5u_Xu72KeRSgy3D5JVEp5mNShHQGh3jBkXqEg/E5wCRkVIGC1QBYBmM4rdjA4kEE3x-sgr/15) in Washington, and he’s not going to let this one go. Americans deserve lawmakers who serve the public—not their own stock portfolios. President Trump supports it. The Department of Treasury supports it. The American people support it. The only folks who don’t? The ones getting rich off it. And let’s be honest, a lot of them are salivating after finding out that Nancy Pelosi is leaving with a cool [$130 million](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/DODyU8L3rkBoppwy3z6IxOZLBnXWLvKqYulvwxD7FTgFimqhZbcpUJ39KtWt8zbY53MMa7X4SqGrPTf0Iri9pLtRkYD0xgjQZdVXBfXbRmTR9b5tg418bbh8mh3ratHmVdtw2WsZGzjJPSf3AOASfM0XARZbEWijkKIWwTXiPFThJhZSVmNg_dwiLJz_0SeCPyJKmhSIUFHKIsYVTQWzmLbjKeVq9cTDdKG_uE3f6vh7RoyimfNFvDiawl9Sywib140I9dKTqATRD-4NMWT_VcOrwAXErJCYa8T5vZWmd3_qAVk9KMS7TsGe-jAx2XkHQxlZlXn5vLDCWjwhwbu09a4eLl5pD-WKU0YmpyONgXs0nqtrG5iuAUYAt0Tj-EvxehUetfvCaQG9vRNVcXvY0ZVkO1TaqbufKPUqRsripJ7Ge-g4jLJqFq2I6A3_AcPqiz3y9WJSEbMKLITqCQV3rALMsXSOV4-hQHtKaRVKkVPb9MuQGWBoCLhRLYpCcni0DZnbZIK8o7JhjZeVFWXkgHGoHwJ8Twc5KQcIRZreHM2QPSNXRNACVddt87q4R4QM9UHYzIJUX-c86mwZZRXk9WZdEK00jHh1YeoI4b6hN2IbfGMFUnwB5teU80tNuAO9S4n1/Py9rQmrfIsrNSLW_BkGBLT6Cxc2PlQwz/15). A return of 16,930 percent is totally normal, right? Righttttt. 🙄 So, the fight goes on—and Tim will be at the forefront.

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: We need to ban stock trading for members of Congress—once and for all. Last week, the House Administration Committee dragged the issue back into the spotlight, but Tim didn’t mince words on : the chances of Congress passing a real ban are slim. Even when the House pretends to move on the topic, the Senate lets it fall into a black hole—or rewrites it into something unrecognizable. Then both sides shrug and say, “Well, we tried.” But Tim’s hip to these in Washington, and he’s not going to let this one go. Americans deserve lawmakers who serve the public—not their own stock portfolios. President Trump supports it. The Department of Treasury supports it. The American people support it. The only folks who don’t? The ones getting rich off it. And let’s be honest, a lot of them are salivating after finding out that Nancy Pelosi is leaving with a cool . A return of 16,930 percent is totally normal, right? Righttttt. 🙄 So, the fight goes on—and Tim will be at the forefront. | Boots on the Ground Poll: Do you support banning members of Congress from trading individual stocks while in office? Last Week’s Poll Results | Kelly's Kitchen Looking to add a new side dish to your Thanksgiving table? You’re in luck! Tim’s wife, Kelly has released the files. Her Shoepeg Corn Casserole is the star of the show every holiday—because let’s be honest, it’s all about the sides, right? Give it a try and tag Tim in your photos of the finished product over on . | Sport Your Support: | | | | | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Kat Abughazaleh
subject: Sunrise Movement is on our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kat for Illinois
body:
Let's pass the Green New Deal!
---
|
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/ITYemA6Zxwpp)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/LDkTQk2hadO2)
---
Friend, I'm incredibly honored to be endorsed by Sunrise Movement. Being involved in politics and practically growing alongside Sunrise, I saw how they helped turn climate change into a national issue and tackle it head-on by proposing a bold plan to save our planet, **the Green New Deal.** **Sunrise Chicago** has been instrumental in the workings of the Green New Deal for Chicago public schools, and their mutual aid work in our community has been indispensable, especially as we've had record heat waves this past summer. **Alongside Sunrise, I'm ready to fight Big Oil, fight for a Green New Deal, and fight to help deliver the better future that past generations have failed to give us.** My opponents, on the other hand, are all a part of the same establishment that has refused to recognize the severity of the climate crisis and won't do anything to help solve it. [**Friend, we're stronger together. Will you join Sunrise in supporting me by donating to my campaign for Congress today?**](https://ka4il.us/l/4sn1MVQ8KAfl) Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/RZtV1eqVvUTv)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/9qaQ9145Z2MS)
---
[ DONATE ](https://ka4il.us/l/G8bBKDhlpyM7)
---
In solidarity, Kat Abughazaleh Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/nugYFZj3mctq)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/29FDFRavKrnX)
---
|
---
Email is a really important way that grassroots campaigns can actually win: **we have power when we use technology to organize a large group of people.** If you were forwarded this email and would like to subscribe **[click here!](https://ka4il.us/l/dHyDaFVwYCqu) **

Our email sending software likes it when we have "clicks", but we don't always ask you to click a donation link. **[If you want to take 5 seconds helping us (for free), please click this link to our website after reading every email to help increase our "clickers".](https://ka4il.us/l/vx5OLIlzK0RH) **

We understand that email can be overwhelming. If you only want to receive the most important emails, click [here](https://ka4il.us/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&t=r6ObM38Uob4j). If you're really just sick of every email, click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/OBkbQYk1R9F2) and you'll be unsubscribed!
---
| **_Democratic leaders are abandoning us._** Our District deserves a fighter in Congress — someone who shows her constituents every day that she is doing everything possible to stop the authoritarian takeover of the United States. Kat has fought fascists before as a citizen, union rep, and independent journalist. Now, she's going to do the same in Congress. **Let's win this together.** **[Chip in!](https://ka4il.us/l/UTRpwtJaNSTf)**

name: Haley Stevens
subject: This race could decide abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I’m not backing down

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1434%2E49239%2EdFuU5_)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9065?t=2&akid=1434%2E49239%2EdFuU5_)
---
null, it’s Haley.

I want to talk to you for a moment, not as a politician running for office, but as a woman from Michigan.
You may have seen the news: **An anti-abortion group just announced they’re going to spend $80 million to help Republicans win the Senate. And they’ve named Michigan a top target.**
They’re launching ads and door-to-door campaigns to support MAGA extremists who back a near-total abortion ban – like my opponent Mike Rogers.

Let me be clear: I’ve spent my career fighting for reproductive freedom. I’ve stood with Planned Parenthood, I’ve defended access to care, and I’ve worked to restore the rights we had under Roe.
And I’m not going to stop now.

This is personal.

**_[If you’re with me, will you rush $5 to help me fight back and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9061?t=3&akid=1434%2E49239%2EdFuU5_)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9063?t=4&akid=1434%2E49239%2EdFuU5_)
---
Here’s the bottom line: This race could decide control of the Senate. It could decide whether abortion rights survive in our country.

Mike Rogers has Trump’s endorsement and the backing of a MAGA Texas billionaire.
But I’ve got you.

So if you believe in reproductive freedom, I’m urgently asking you to **stand with me.[Rush $5 now to help us win this race and keep Michigan blue. ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9061?t=5&akid=1434%2E49239%2EdFuU5_)**
With grit,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9077?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1434%2E49239%2EdFuU5_) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9065?t=7&akid=1434%2E49239%2EdFuU5_)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

We have bad news, Peter.
We’re still behind on our November fundraising goal, and we’re in real danger of falling short.
The truth is, Peter, the timing could not be worse. Republicans and far-right Super PACs have already spent $10 million to defeat Jon and are preparing to spend hundreds of millions more by Election Day to flood Georgia with attacks.
Now, we’re never going to try to fool you with fake goals or beg you to chip in because “the sky is falling” — _it’s not._ But if we don't hit our target for the month, it could spell bad news for our campaign.
Georgia’s Senate race will be the most expensive and competitive election in the midterms because MAGA has made Jon their top target for defeat. They’re going to use every resource at their disposal and every dollar in their war chest to flip this seat red.
That’s why it’s critical that we get back on track ASAP, and your support is our best chance to turn things around.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: This isn't about what I think, friend (re: Climate change)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Colorado can't afford to wait for the GOP to come to grips with the reality of climate change – but let me know if you agree.
| | | _You know what, friend?_
---
Donald Trump and his Republican majority in Congress can deny the climate crisis all they like. **But it's everyday working Coloradans who pay the price.**
This summer, drought conditions gripped Western Colorado. Garfield and Rio Blanco counties hit “exceptional” drought — the most extreme level we track. From the Lee Fire west of Meeker to the Turner Gulch Fire near Gateway, 2025 became our worst wildfire season since 2020, when flames scorched over half a million acres.
And Colorado’s snowpack is off to one of its slowest starts in nearly a decade, while Denver is nearing one of its latest first snowfalls on record.
All of this hurts not just our way of life, but our outdoor economy, which drives jobs, small businesses, and billions in revenue each year.
**Climate change isn't waiting for Washington Republicans to come to grips with reality. And the way I see it, neither can we.** As the threats of climate change only grow more urgent, state leaders must act with the same urgency to ensure every community's capacity to weather these storms – **and that's why I'm running.**
But this campaign isn't about me or what I think. **It's about the people of Colorado, like _you_ , friend, whom I'm running to serve.**
**_[So before I get ahead of myself, I want to know whether you and 4,999 more members of this grassroots team agree. Will you please sound off on my brief climate survey by answering the following question honestly?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119909175/584627739/-240233179?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk981-su-nd&refcode=jtk981-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDg4ZDJhYS03M2M5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IrhyslZD00zXSpD5_fl-_xhh87WVHRyuVDtver6I4_0=&emci=3f2793d9-51c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c488d2aa-73c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1295540)_**
**Do you think Colorado needs strong climate leadership?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119909176/584627740/-240233179?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk981-su-nd&refcode=jtk981-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDg4ZDJhYS03M2M5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IrhyslZD00zXSpD5_fl-_xhh87WVHRyuVDtver6I4_0=&emci=3f2793d9-51c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c488d2aa-73c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1295540)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119909177/584627741/-240233179?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk981-su-nd&refcode=jtk981-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDg4ZDJhYS03M2M5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IrhyslZD00zXSpD5_fl-_xhh87WVHRyuVDtver6I4_0=&emci=3f2793d9-51c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c488d2aa-73c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1295540)

Michael

name: LeftNet
subject: Ground Truth
body:
It’s absolutely crucial that we capture insights from people across all communities ahead of 2026.
#
At LeftNet, we’re committed to supporting organizations that are rethinking how to be involved in all communities, how people are heard, and how trust is built across the country.
**Just last week, Swing Left launched its Ground Truth program, a nationwide initiative focused on improving civic engagement and understanding between elected officials and voters.**
Ground Truth takes a different approach from traditional outreach efforts. Instead of relying solely on data models or narrow targeting, volunteers visit every household in the communities they’re working in. Their goal is simple: to listen. These conversations can help reveal real concerns, everyday challenges, and priorities that aren’t always captured in traditional canvassing methods like surveys, polling, or digital outreach.
This program also combines these conversations with new technology designed to securely capture open-ended insights. Those insights help civic organizations, researchers, and community groups better understand the full range of experiences that shape how people feel about their communities and their future.
**As we look ahead to 2026, it’s absolutely crucial that we capture insights from people across _all_ communities so organizations can better respond to what voters are experiencing.**
**[If you’d like to support the kind of civic engagement work that prioritizes listening, community understanding, and deeper connection, please consider donating to Swing Left so they can have the resources they need to support their Ground Truth program.](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em20251124.SWYR0s&refcode=em20251124-1367&t=1&akid=1367%2E2118727%2E1M3xgZ)**
**[DONATE ››](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em20251124.SWYR0s&refcode=em20251124-1367&t=2&akid=1367%2E2118727%2E1M3xgZ)**
Thank you.
— LeftNet

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=1367%2E2118727%2E1M3xgZ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/update_your_information/?t=4&akid=1367%2E2118727%2E1M3xgZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leftnet.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1367%2E2118727%2E1M3xgZ)

Email us: [team@leftnet.org](mailto:team@leftnet.org)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What I’d tell you over coffee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO

I will never take your sacrifice for granted.

But I want to cut through the noise for a moment.
[I’d like to tell you a quick story.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2b99da60735f4cac80824781a60e3b43&_e=7vOaQj0np14SPUzlR6DIsQhCWr3hf2UMUB4tNruSxCZCh80move8JCh-wd5wbcj571xstffYKKbcQO2zF31SbtpCpOx6GyYYI6zzvBsEmvdPXlv6x1kzwKW1USrw0rSxUSDFFfm-ohb5YZ_DMJ7EMScQYRMIpr3A_Kohshj9OAMBpj3TlddS3aHWjFToWclCxxseKfQhxkEJrfTSwCvdHCuvfH2A7tEM_XdpRb51n-VQZmmK_IPvu843dM6EsMAlq8wAqb3e4XOhr2WY_wCXAgpa0BKWirc3fJXYuV615KunaX9m7zjD6m2Somsxa-nvE5s1zMTwO8ZuMtOFuIe74O8IG_m9yWxK4E9xoybdGDI3eMaZVeXP7we4P1EG0yVanANaUWmnyPCArGDJ7Od33mWshcyo4LsNZo_YTKsWUCKX0lbPQZDkc-FQXz9g-XodTUe77ajDjH3hPNyZpgczyn30CpznihZBKhjoXAn7vnO9MCjft8B7dFKybSTkJYQGPJaquDiTV8ztDqBYboMIrmYXG9tGLQFuF92Ko8tqhne6ZCoSJOm7tBvFGzy_jikbFhR_GwfV_cPP7RSt8nHLsI06FX1NknS-hBm6P2bQvio47ZIR9BYa90CmAuffWhTrn0NgsP91YhfgR3hUF25iVGo1ERqBkIZsUFiE-f0w4e_fmlyOcHgE2JQeyiiPJ2XSzrVOnfjvSucGzaHjuoKiEpVAoq828BV3Ld9RGrByMC2qhexwOi85eL5xpUQRJbnksp74GzGOk0zipeZv6K-cSXTKaOqnvYlHQ0e3bzey1QznK4FQ98h06kleO_djzWEzix5bqQKzmVnFNOt2iIkmHiyuKCFealJ6K4qgxY68Ag6z-9nSIT47CBvHaeWTveCK81ZMjZdxaD-IqTVW6lx1Qhnc68OSPi6wYSAP3Ljmpw0%3D)

It isn't "just money." **
**It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. **
**So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: **
**[THANK YOU, Peter!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2b99da60735f4cac80824781a60e3b43&_e=7vOaQj0np14SPUzlR6DIsQhCWr3hf2UMUB4tNruSxCZCh80move8JCh-wd5wbcj571xstffYKKbcQO2zF31SbtpCpOx6GyYYI6zzvBsEmvdPXlv6x1kzwKW1USrw0rSxUSDFFfm-ohb5YZ_DMJ7EMScQYRMIpr3A_Kohshj9OAMBpj3TlddS3aHWjFToWclCxxseKfQhxkEJrfTSwCvdHCuvfH2A7tEM_XdpRb51n-VQZmmK_IPvu843dM6EsMAlq8wAqb3e4XOhr2WY_wCXAgpa0BKWirc3fJXYuV615KunaX9m7zjD6m2Somsxa-nvE5s1zMTwO8ZuMtOFuIe74O8IG_m9yWxK4E9xoybdGDJbFoaZc1kBB6SiMlfMnwp4VtgyN1sfow-ElvLCnboDE34gsMq0Aj5YD4JNx_L6Y98M-CXxylyWKPlM5uLNflvybcKwTSi57BY9sbXTAA9iQ3iYj_2QKtuwU2tvOgw6KVlvnKrCt_Ekm37AgRSR9YhxDql9cCr1cJrPbIgXdyl-V0RR28Nvsx4pl_2NoPPxyxZoM1AHJupErENONTnV_S16m7QnK3_87fGyucGrSW6hImwLtN_lqriNsFpGmQ4b10ItwTQbYmGHatErJY44YB-Y11AI0Zx4kk6mNiMTLTV4_7eTefb_xG_ngfgxsngkk16mMgTSjsg2JAG2DqUKUpSvV_S5iR3szEQ_AxOir9OwFtAYqavJvokL1mtDA_rxF8B_nJ2HiL-24Ks_-tlIxlPiwvUoFc-mGOIN-dtFxB0a3tfA7FCNIvXiMmmkaQ6wDf4B1UjBaOJD-WG-xxNTbMneER7O9kuuvANJQpGQJiE5atUmoc-ppt4rthFepaV9Pl-6HwHQ_uiHCEqN2MATNJ22ur0o9VjSX-ZoD54HoFWA2Gfx2T0dVjNmAYMiZNAhV4A%3D)**
**We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country.**
**I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were[ ONE ELECTION AWAY](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2b99da60735f4cac80824781a60e3b43&_e=7vOaQj0np14SPUzlR6DIsQhCWr3hf2UMUB4tNruSxCZCh80move8JCh-wd5wbcj571xstffYKKbcQO2zF31SbtpCpOx6GyYYI6zzvBsEmvdPXlv6x1kzwKW1USrw0rSxUSDFFfm-ohb5YZ_DMJ7EMScQYRMIpr3A_Kohshj9OAMBpj3TlddS3aHWjFToWclCxxseKfQhxkEJrfTSwCvdHCuvfH2A7tEM_XdpRb51n-VQZmmK_IPvu843dM6EsMAlq8wAqb3e4XOhr2WY_wCXAgpa0BKWirc3fJXYuV615KunaX9m7zjD6m2Somsxa-nvE5s1zMTwO8ZuMtOFuIe74O8IG_m9yWxK4E9xoybdGDJYyIiNkOa-NHx7WlqjVbMosY5DiVuB2t1TcaSBsHNONW6TV7T55IRlHQaSEI__N3giZMnM8y_H_No9MKGpKnlWs-5xpRCB3AUdtw0I0waEa2BC5bBGAymAvDXrKN2YtLbu_XgvTybdrJ_MEyC-lMG1lW3-b2j-KVD1K6V7o_-lSi4TdqUL6kFJJ57CkJXfbrTGBmgNcjeUJgJh4V-MdknUsOjMYy7-FANSMYCnjq3XXZudByDig7PpRKzTL2NsoZzFt74ZUE-iYIhGaNMO3PPmRBnY883rFegYrrPrgJP7ImVvIF6QlDCpFBaluqEtCnTVekfW5pRbXJvK0UGDl4DBzqOpwrR01aY4hSFGaSjZiR352kycyDqRmP7QaHI81RaSl47m5pHkncFi_leWjIrTxlU_0cmew-W_dTss3vubmGDpkz9lYGrW3fHCNYyShZrF7N1IfHjzxpyFHno4mR04DjVNhRp6Q5CjDb13OUqeB8AnNCCSeQ5MVEf4z0x3_oCmgkbhTziF5x8yh-R4kB8XFveH2zhU8LHd01oC3SJ7ofuPet53UpnT-ST0kM1B-ko%3D) from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore.**
**President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. **
**That 's why this race means so much. **
**So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. **
**And if you haven 't given yet - [and you’re able to spare even $1 today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2b99da60735f4cac80824781a60e3b43&_e=7vOaQj0np14SPUzlR6DIsQhCWr3hf2UMUB4tNruSxCZCh80move8JCh-wd5wbcj571xstffYKKbcQO2zF31SbtpCpOx6GyYYI6zzvBsEmvdPXlv6x1kzwKW1USrw0rSxUSDFFfm-ohb5YZ_DMJ7EMScQYRMIpr3A_Kohshj9OAMBpj3TlddS3aHWjFToWclCxxseKfQhxkEJrfTSwCvdHCuvfH2A7tEM_XdpRb51n-VQZmmK_IPvu843dM6EsMAlq8wAqb3e4XOhr2WY_wCXAgpa0BKWirc3fJXYuV615KunaX9m7zjD6m2Somsxa-nvE5s1zMTwO8ZuMtOFuIe74O8IG_m9yWxK4E9xoybdGDJVeMrGNhqe06j56ga8x4-13L-kVCeCqU6fhAEqH9lmhh9JvJYERrtchKW2fE2Dyp7bP3wRwKdEsYpAhGJCIat1LQlhr3rPJgfdUeuQ4gBmwIRpDS-2txrZ2Nel88_oQYn_S34DE3ftg-2DXk0iPxIATSgR30jVyhuwvPPv4ZCEYR8wmgN0ZbhVMLnZ56kgkwioStS49E_paN_j091bW-B6voWphCKmM_rJAT8dTgZIYC_SXtAhodo2mP3LeHBr8XpjgvefJXvC_gpK73ykyktDynMjRlvfJbUGKnH0pjAKJ6KEQi0vLEvcUPgYEEuCXCd_5q-sxAgcPserWI4KV0yb6-UM5P4n3oB3FrxQ8A1O_-p1LLe96WjP4c1jc6ZrG40Vl1v0XPKc2i8PIl3A1WS_ayO-wKDBW-KrsbFd__gUiFZbP8lHf1klybxRZ_75D92_kCmlx6_5NpxNhLyea0nuqAOMq-3m1Ur0k3SlTCQ00TkaHYzdsDZOcJw0HpWR-5NUVExaf5IPtPg2De0E8mI0HSEXF5l64Tbb7aKjqylsftDpfe8apHvI9F7FIE2mxP8%3D) - I'd be honored to have you on my team.

clean_body: I will never take your sacrifice for granted. today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment. I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice. why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country. I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore. President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. That 's why this race means so much. So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. And if you haven 't given yet - - I'd be honored to have you on my team. Every single gift, no matter the size, fuels this must-win fight. grateful,Vivek Ramaswamy the election were held today, we 'd come up just short.We can't afford to lose this ground -- not now, not after everything we've built.Your support right now makes the difference between a comeback and a collapse.**| | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

The Trump Administration has given us cause for concern. We’ve seen:
• Armed federal forces deployed into American cities
• Persistent spread of election disinformation
• Weakening of federal agencies that normally help keep elections safe
And despite repeated requests, the federal government still will not say the simple sentence that would help calm the nation: **“We would never do anything to interfere with the 2026 elections.”**
We deserve that assurance. We haven’t received it.
**[Every contribution strengthens our ability to counter disinformation, protect voter privacy, and safeguard our elections in 2026. Will you ensure we have the resources to fight back and spread our message by chipping in $5 or more right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119909497/584628783/1047727825?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_251124&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJhNGZlZjEtNzRjOS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BNrW4yLWRJjShEPF28330czENkIMNCxSGgSZMQsVD6g=)**

| | Peter – **I voted last week to release the Jeffrey Epstein files.** And it will prove what we already knew: Trump and Epstein were friends, and they were in regular contact with one another. **Let this be a watershed moment for everyone. To the billionaires: you can't use your wealth to hide. To the survivors: justice is coming.** Trump made draining the swamp such a hallmark of his campaign, but when it comes down to it, he's looking out for himself, and his staunch yes-men like Mike Johnson will do anything to protect him. clean_body: | | | | Peter – I voted last week to release the Jeffrey Epstein files. And it will prove what we already knew: Trump and Epstein were friends, and they were in regular contact with one another. Let this be a watershed moment for everyone. To the billionaires: you can't use your wealth to hide. To the survivors: justice is coming. Trump made draining the swamp such a hallmark of his campaign, but when it comes down to it, he's looking out for himself, and his staunch yes-men like Mike Johnson will do anything to protect him. Americans overwhelmingly want to see the full and unredacted Epstein files and know, once and for all, the facts surrounding these horrific crimes. | | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/ice-filed-we-filed-next-step-bring?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
We have movement -- real movement.
Yesterday, ICE filed their response. On a Sunday.
That tells you everything about the pace we're now in: the court has activated its accelerated emergency schedule, which means filings are due within 36-48 hours, weekends included. When the judiciary signals urgency, even ICE starts scrambling.
And today, just moments ago, we filed Zahid's reply.
I'm writing this to you from the parking lot of the federal courthouse in Tacoma. I told the Clerk "My husband asked me to drop this off," watched as she stamped the top page and accepted it - then stepped outside, took a breath of cold air, and cried for a minute -- not from fear this time, but from the sheer force of hope finally cracking the door open.
From here forward, I'll be refreshing PACER (the court's electronic docket system) like a woman possessed. 😂
**What Happens Next**
Now that both sides have filed, the judge has everything they need.
The best-case scenario -- and a very real possibility -- is that the court decides:
* a hearing isn't necessary,
* the record is complete, and
* Zahid's medical emergency requires immediate action.

And then the judge issues the order:
**" Petitioner is to be released."**
If that happens, here is the plan:
I will print that order.
I will call the press.
I will gather the kids.
And I will go straight to the front doors of the Northwest Detention Center -- paperwork in hand.
We will stand there, peacefully, unwaveringly, until they bring Zahid out to us.
That is the moment we've been fighting toward.
**And when that moment comes, I 'd like you with me.**
Whoever can be there -- physically, spiritually, vocally -- come stand with us. Come bear witness. Come celebrate what justice looks like when community refuses to give up.
This is the plan.
This is the hope.
And this is the moment we're stepping into together.
Who's with me?
-- Melissa

body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
#

The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-mek-em-mar25.qIyu4X&refcode=em251122-1-160&t=1&akid=4040%2E734936%2EtUvbPP)
When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
[**The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to Ruben Gallego and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-mek-em-mar25.qIyu4X&refcode=em251122-1-160&t=2&akid=4040%2E734936%2EtUvbPP)

# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5117%2E35263%2E8FO0z5)
Team, Flipping the Senate **blue** in 2026 is job one for restoring our democracy, and Tammy’s committed to making it happen. Tammy's supporting Dems across the Senate map to help us win back the Senate in 2026 — but **this is an all-hands-on-deck moment.** We've already seen the damage Trump and his MAGA allies in the Senate can do in just a matter of months. Regaining the Senate isn’t going to be easy, but Tammy knows how to win a tough race. Wisconsin is home to some of the most competitive elections in the nation — and last year, **Tammy won her most competitive re-election battle yet in a state that Trump won.** We need to make that happen around the country — in Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire, North Carolina, and Ohio — and Tammy is working hard to make sure it does. **[Can we count on you to have Tammy’s back in this fight? Wisconsin is home to some of the most competitive elections in the nation — and last year, Tammy won her most competitive re-election battle yet in a state that Trump won. We need to make that happen around the country — in Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire, North Carolina, and Ohio — and Tammy is working hard to make sure it does. name: Fred Wellman via Blue Amp Action
subject: I’ve lost everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
Just like so many Americans, I’ve been knocked down and gotten back up.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb899882a-ba45-45c8-91fd-c430064a535f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8bd55ab7-ffec-4cd1-8f7f-c4bb5b308471/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I lost everything in my life too many times to count. I lost my first wife and unborn child in a car crash. I’ve been through bankruptcy and a divorce. I’ve been to war four times and came back with the scars both mentally and physically that come with that. Just like so many Americans, I’ve been knocked down and gotten back up. And now I’m running for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country—against a Congresswoman who’s done nothing other than sell us out. My name is Fred Wellman. I’m a 22-year Army veteran, entrepreneur, and dad running for Congress in Missouri’s Second Congressional District. Ann Wagner hasn’t held a town hall in years, she’s tripled her net worth while in Congress, and she’s been nothing other than a rubber stamp on Trump’s agenda. [But I need your help to take this seat back for the people. Can you chip in $15, $5, or even just $3 to support my campaign? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tedbeb39b-9c96-4212-8b3f-307f77ad1c34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ce1ea6e-8bb0-4904-b0ec-654a497f5a0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em_kelly.i82Xit&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20251124_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=9223%2E5257348%2E9qGd51)
When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
**[The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to Adam Schiff and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q42025_abs_em_kelly.8tQuMC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20251124_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=9223%2E5257348%2E9qGd51)**

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Heidi Hall
subject: The campaign finance system is broken
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251124_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251124_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Friend, I'd love to live in a world where the campaign finance system wasn't so broken and corrupt, but frankly, that's not our reality.
Corporate PACs are influencing elections across the country, and they're bankrolling candidates in this race— right now.
63% of one of our Democratic opponent's campaign funds come from PAC contributions, and over 30% are from large individual donors. Oh, and he's received hundreds of thousands of dollars from groups like AIPAC, the same group funding Kevin Kiley.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251124_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251124_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Friend, candidates that have conspired to switch seats and run against each other want to turn this race for Congress into a bidding war for moneyed interests to try to buy this seat.
From Day 1 back in April, I got in this race to fight against the toxic politics of DC that leaves our communities high and dry.
Here's what's different about me and those who switched seats after redistricting ⬆️, I'm a Nevada County supervisor, not a D.C. insider politician.
That's why your grassroots support is so important and why we need to reach our fundraising goals.
Friend, we're trying to reach our goal before Thanksgiving. Will you please donate what you can today to help our campaign fight the big money in this race, flip this seat, and change the system to work for people like you and me, the wealthy and well-connected? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251124_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20251124_em_fr_b1_HH_big_]

Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251124_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251124_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: Oil and Gas Workers Association endorses David Flippo!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Oil and Gas Workers across the country know that David Flippo will fight for them and energy independence! |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=f1e4795a75&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Peter ,

I proudly announce that the **Oil and Gas Workers Association** has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in **NV-04**. The OGWA is an independent, grassroots organization dedicated to securing, growing, and protecting American oil and gas jobs for American workers. The OGWA is committed to energy security and stands against actions that would threaten the livelihoods of energy workers and national interests in energy.
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=ed91512713&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| [DONATE FOR ENERGY INDEPENDENCE](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=70079c6034&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE FOR ENERGY INDEPENDENCE")
---
| Our campaign is supported by many Nevadans who wholeheartedly support President Trump’s “America First” priority of energy independence! **As a combat veteran and someone who has worked on Alaskan oil fields, I understand the importance of the workers of the OGWA to our national security and economy. In Congress, I will work with President Trump to fight for oil and gas workers nationwide and pursue energy independence.** We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together. **I am matching every single dollar that is being donated, so your donation will have 2X the impact! Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**
---
| [DONATE ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=d509c5aa93&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE ")

I was thrilled to welcome Rep. Jamie Raskin to Grand Rapids for a town hall on the future of our democracy and to visit with small businesses in Muskegon – it was great to show him a little bit of West Michigan!

| I was thrilled to welcome Rep. Jamie Raskin to Grand Rapids for a town hall on the future of our democracy and to visit with small businesses in Muskegon – it was great to show him a little bit of West Michigan!

We talked about how we’re going to retake the House in 2026, expand our Democracy Summer program for young people, and make sure all of it starts right here in Michigan.

name: DJT
subject: You have never let me down!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
