name: James Carville
subject: I’m fuming — and you should be too
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss the Senate majority goodbye.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119911474/584635418/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.24_Chris-Pappas-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBjMTJkNC03OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2NVA9JKgAraUbRAyV3f-UTtVATT4nrjnC9EQNSMlC4=) Folks, it’s James Carville.

I’ve been around the block a few times and worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. So believe me when I tell you: **This ain’t good.**

John Sununu — yeah, _those Sununus_ — just jumped into the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire. And now the political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning there.

[**_💥 Before you read another word, split $10 or whatever you can between Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan to help Chris fight back right now._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119911475/584635419/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.24_Chris-Pappas-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBjMTJkNC03OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2NVA9JKgAraUbRAyV3f-UTtVATT4nrjnC9EQNSMlC4=)

Let me tell you what this means: **If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss our chances of winning back the Senate majority goodbye.**

This isn’t some back-bench, no-name guy we’re up against. **Sununu’s won a Senate seat before.**

He’s got name ID, deep pockets, and Wall Street’s dark money machine ready to drown us in attack ads. This is the far-right’s big play, y’all — they know if they take New Hampshire, Democrats have _no viable path_ to flipping the Senate.

Chris Pappas is the real deal. I mean it. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four damn times, and he knows how to bring folks together. But he cannot — **cannot** — do this alone.

So here’s what I need from you:

[**_Split a contribution between Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare. Because if we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re gonna be stuck with Republican control for years to come._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119911476/584635420/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.24_Chris-Pappas-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBjMTJkNC03OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2NVA9JKgAraUbRAyV3f-UTtVATT4nrjnC9EQNSMlC4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119911477/584635421/1047731393?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.24_Chris-Pappas-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBjMTJkNC03OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2NVA9JKgAraUbRAyV3f-UTtVATT4nrjnC9EQNSMlC4=)

Let’s show these Republican bigshots that we’re not scared — and we sure as hell ain’t backing down.

name: Astronaut Scott Kelly
subject: Why I’m endorsing Trisha's campaign to beat Lauren Boebert
body:
Chip in $25 or more to help Trisha beat Lauren Boebert, win in CO-04 and flip the House blue.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h4zCnwpuutDAZmjXSvNI2RBQclcTSMqcQnyAja967QQybH2jnzCbxU6OfJqhQvcUEZoEoREVFvFvo7sbtNpVUUTmTyj6GMuWZ4TiWKnQvRRaKJiQHvgsZWOYh94m9CR6oMWDefKNEm7Lo3Cjw2dy92xOm_F4Ho-cw-ev04WaMpkMaEfT3J0u7U7I0PzfH-eQLHyb1MPYbkYN1Wq0c4QFyuYSGR9hJn1ypTLRTrclHsA=&c=rGZbhlFcWd0GDIoftCxITAwMLt8ZNGDloAgc8PrXZsOoeOT-3nfU_g==&ch=wcks7gFYZF6PUxSrkt9LXpQ3fKaCLgfq_LIINbClLi0MTZw9-yJ9IA==)
---
| | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h4zCnwpuutDAZmjXSvNI2RBQclcTSMqcQnyAja967QQybH2jnzCbxU6OfJqhQvcUEZoEoREVFvFvo7sbtNpVUUTmTyj6GMuWZ4TiWKnQvRRaKJiQHvgsZWOYh94m9CR6oMWDefKNEm7Lo3Cjw2dy92xOm_F4Ho-cw-ev04WaMpkMaEfT3J0u7U7I0PzfH-eQLHyb1MPYbkYN1Wq0c4QFyn5M5o7wfFXXlJeApKYbjVQ=&c=rGZbhlFcWd0GDIoftCxITAwMLt8ZNGDloAgc8PrXZsOoeOT-3nfU_g==&ch=wcks7gFYZF6PUxSrkt9LXpQ3fKaCLgfq_LIINbClLi0MTZw9-yJ9IA==)
---
| Hi Peter. I'm Scott Kelly - former NASA Astronaut, retired U.S. Navy Captain and resident of CO district 4.
I've been to space 4 times and spent nearly a year on the International Space Station (ISS). I commanded both the Space Shuttle and the ISS and flew with more than 40 people from across the world--scientists, engineers, doctors--men and women of every background, faith, and nationality. We didn't share the same backgrounds, but we shared a mission: work together, stay focused, and deliver.
That's the kind of leadership and focus we need in Congress. That's what Trisha Calvarese brings to the table.
I'm proud to endorse Trisha Calvarese in Colorado's 4th District.
Trisha is running to defeat Lauren Boebert - and I'm proud to endorse her in this critical mission.
Trisha grew up here on the rural Eastern Plains and in Douglas County. She served our country as a civil servant and returned home to care for her sick parents at the end of their lives. She understands the people of this district because she's actually one of us. She's running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in her hometown.
That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means investing again in U.S. science and engineering to create good-paying jobs and opportunities. Trisha's ready to actually show up, listen and deliver for folks in her district.
But while Trisha is advocating for you, Lauren Boebert is spending her time making headlines, avoiding her constituents, and voting to gut the programs Coloradans rely on. That's why I'm counting on you to join me in supporting Trisha's campaign to defeat Boebert.
But grassroots campaigns like this one aren't easy. And right now Trisha is counting on our help to raise the $10,000 she needs to build the early infrastructure it takes to win races like this.

| Hi Peter. I'm Scott Kelly - former NASA Astronaut, retired U.S. Navy Captain and resident of CO district 4.
I've been to space 4 times and spent nearly a year on the International Space Station (ISS). I commanded both the Space Shuttle and the ISS and flew with more than 40 people from across the world--scientists, engineers, doctors--men and women of every background, faith, and nationality. We didn't share the same backgrounds, but we shared a mission: work together, stay focused, and deliver.
That's the kind of leadership and focus we need in Congress. That's what Trisha Calvarese brings to the table.
I'm proud to endorse Trisha Calvarese in Colorado's 4th District.
Trisha is running to defeat Lauren Boebert - and I'm proud to endorse her in this critical mission.
Trisha grew up here on the rural Eastern Plains and in Douglas County. She served our country as a civil servant and returned home to care for her sick parents at the end of their lives. She understands the people of this district because she's actually one of us. She's running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in her hometown.
That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means investing again in U.S. science and engineering to create good-paying jobs and opportunities. Trisha's ready to actually show up, listen and deliver for folks in her district.
But while Trisha is advocating for you, Lauren Boebert is spending her time making headlines, avoiding her constituents, and voting to gut the programs Coloradans rely on. That's why I'm counting on you to join me in supporting Trisha's campaign to defeat Boebert.
But grassroots campaigns like this one aren't easy. And right now Trisha is counting on our help to raise the $10,000 she needs to build the early infrastructure it takes to win races like this.

clean_body: Chip in $25 or more to help Trisha beat Lauren Boebert, win in CO-04 and flip the House blue. | | | | | == | | == | Hi Peter. I'm Scott Kelly - former NASA Astronaut, retired U.S. Navy Captain and resident of CO district 4. I've been to space 4 times and spent nearly a year on the International Space Station (ISS). I commanded both the Space Shuttle and the ISS and flew with more than 40 people from across the world--scientists, engineers, doctors--men and women of every background, faith, and nationality. We didn't share the same backgrounds, but we shared a mission: work together, stay focused, and deliver. That's the kind of leadership and focus we need in Congress. That's what Trisha Calvarese brings to the table. I'm proud to endorse Trisha Calvarese in Colorado's 4th District. Trisha is running to defeat Lauren Boebert - and I'm proud to endorse her in this critical mission. Trisha grew up here on the rural Eastern Plains and in Douglas County. She served our country as a civil servant and returned home to care for her sick parents at the end of their lives. She understands the people of this district because she's actually one of us. She's running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in her hometown. That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means investing again in U.S. science and engineering to create good-paying jobs and opportunities. Trisha's ready to actually show up, listen and deliver for folks in her district. But while Trisha is advocating for you, Lauren Boebert is spending her time making headlines, avoiding her constituents, and voting to gut the programs Coloradans rely on. That's why I'm counting on you to join me in supporting Trisha's campaign to defeat Boebert. But grassroots campaigns like this one aren't easy. And right now Trisha is counting on our help to raise the $10,000 she needs to build the early infrastructure it takes to win races like this. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thanks for backing someone who's in this for the right reasons. \- Scott | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: An update from Team Lindstrom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
Thank you for standing with us.
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
| | Peter,
As we head into Thanksgiving, I’ve been reminded all week of how grateful I am for the people of this district. From conversations with families and local business owners to seeing communities come together, it’s clear how much Nebraskans care about our future. This season is about gratitude, and I’m thankful for the support, the encouragement, and the chance to keep listening and serving.

---
|
---
**Ride to Washington** I’m now 441.26 miles into the Ride to Washington. Every mile is a good reminder of why this campaign matters, staying active, staying disciplined, and staying focused on delivering results for Nebraska. Thank you to everyone who continues to follow along and cheer this effort on. It means more than you know.

|
---
**Last Week Recap** On Tuesday, we hosted a Veterans Roundtable with a group of veterans who are deeply involved in their communities and engaged with the Unicameral. We had an important discussion about the challenges veterans are facing and explored several initiatives—both here in Nebraska and nationally—that can better support those who served.

[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
On Thursday, I was in Lincoln providing insight to the Unicameral on a bill I helped craft to encourage community growth around youth sports. Strengthening opportunities for kids and building strong local communities has always been a priority for me, and it was great to continue that conversation.
The weekend wrapped up with another full slate of kids’ sports—plenty of bleachers, traveling, and cheering, as always.

[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
|
---
| | As we head into Thanksgiving, I’m grateful for the conversations, support, and encouragement we continue to see across the district. Every event, every roundtable, and every stop along the way reinforces why this work matters: Nebraska deserves leadership that listens, shows up, and stays focused on real solutions.
Thank you for being part of this campaign and for believing in what we can accomplish together. I hope you and your family have a safe, joyful, and meaningful Thanksgiving. I’m looking forward to closing out the year strong and continuing the momentum we’ve built.

---
[VOLUNTEER](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
And if you’re able, please consider making a contribution to help us hit our November End-of-Month Goal. Every dollar goes directly toward reaching voters and ensuring our message is heard loud and clear.
[DONATE TODAY](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Thank you for continued support,
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Brett Lindstrom Republican Candidate for NE-02
|
---
**Stay Connected with Team Lindstrom**
| | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.) | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.) | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---|---|---
|
---

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: Books, not bombs.
body:
This is how we tackle the root causes of poor public education.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q5qG1S-GR-QrEDMUyhsSvK7k2j8YBcUqBoPxS5A2GAtJZ8Ays-9wyw8C0oKSru1d8GKk_8NG59wBxHU6B63dCIqo7NJGCHi3q4OSlkinUBYwDxhmOQuHnN3aQnP7ohGWuPeW-ouCdqmVkHt1UAxpc_tXwCuhXWO8ereHpzxqxXFCQyeDEKam0259xz2Kvt3C9r1K5rHhmUthdZJ1wCSSo72rocZBv7HMy5FUDVP8XaQ=&c=TVCZ4E0zzPzjsHCaBRscJMVbVywbFcI0kLRVFflDdC8-qluGZigwhQ==&ch=_CN0Dp__dH_RHiZmoJdQqJfj5ty08XeHPXtK0fi3qzZEUUY8_XwoJQ==)
---
|
Peter,
Right now, the United States spends $850 billion every year on the military-- while our kids' schools are left scrambling for resources. As Trump slashes education funding and pushes to dismantle the Department of Education, states are being forced to hike property taxes just to fill the gap.
Here in Illinois, we have the highest property taxes in the country -- and still, only 1 in 4 fourth graders are meeting reading standards. In wealthier zip codes, students see far better results, while kids in working-class and low-income communities are left behind. A child's zip code shouldn't determine whether they get a good education. But right now, it does.
That's why when I get to Congress, I'll introduce the Books Not Bombs Act.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q5qG1S-GR-QrEDMUyhsSvK7k2j8YBcUqBoPxS5A2GAtJZ8Ays-9wyw8C0oKSru1d8GKk_8NG59wBxHU6B63dCIqo7NJGCHi3q4OSlkinUBYwDxhmOQuHnN3aQnP7ohGWuPeW-ouCdqmVkHt1UAxpc_tXwCuhXWO8ereHpzxqxXFCQyeDEKam0259xz2Kvt3C9r1K5rHhmUthdZJ1wCSSo7OzGM0n0NUvsuHWxO5WsMA=&c=TVCZ4E0zzPzjsHCaBRscJMVbVywbFcI0kLRVFflDdC8-qluGZigwhQ==&ch=_CN0Dp__dH_RHiZmoJdQqJfj5ty08XeHPXtK0fi3qzZEUUY8_XwoJQ==)
---
|
This bill will shift just 1.5% of the Pentagon's budget into public education. That small reallocation would mean a 10% increase in funding for our schools -- enough to ensure every child gets the education they deserve while driving down property taxes and making housing more affordable for homeowners and renters alike.
This is how we tackle the root causes of poor public education while making life more affordable for working people. This is why Congress needs more school board members in the fight -- people like me, who have seen firsthand how broken our system is and who know how to fix it.
[But I can't do it without you. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters -- not billionaires, not defense contractors. If you believe we need to invest in books, not bombs, can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you spare to send someone with public education experience to Congress?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q5qG1S-GR-QrEDMUyhsSvK7k2j8YBcUqBoPxS5A2GAtJZ8Ays-9wyw8C0oKSru1dgqY_NfcBe1co1nz6WedXCpnfBAv0zsOdY9O22iJRip67wm9rhmHDEMaOL5wxIkr08COcw9u0miQ-HrJxOtpcRH5yzXLMYkneGAVa24_oESWbB5Es2ROZkOMsG-aBkXIM-FBDQH7_gUeHmHfA6VXOyn9rioTLZ-eTZYr0PCUafjrPmBEIzcPHWw==&c=TVCZ4E0zzPzjsHCaBRscJMVbVywbFcI0kLRVFflDdC8-qluGZigwhQ==&ch=_CN0Dp__dH_RHiZmoJdQqJfj5ty08XeHPXtK0fi3qzZEUUY8_XwoJQ==)

clean_body: This is how we tackle the root causes of poor public education. | | | | | == | Peter, Right now, the United States spends $850 billion every year on the military-- while our kids' schools are left scrambling for resources. As Trump slashes education funding and pushes to dismantle the Department of Education, states are being forced to hike property taxes just to fill the gap. Here in Illinois, we have the highest property taxes in the country -- and still, only 1 in 4 fourth graders are meeting reading standards. In wealthier zip codes, students see far better results, while kids in working-class and low-income communities are left behind. A child's zip code shouldn't determine whether they get a good education. But right now, it does. That's why when I get to Congress, I'll introduce the Books Not Bombs Act. | | == | This bill will shift just 1.5% of the Pentagon's budget into public education. That small reallocation would mean a 10% increase in funding for our schools -- enough to ensure every child gets the education they deserve while driving down property taxes and making housing more affordable for homeowners and renters alike. This is how we tackle the root causes of poor public education while making life more affordable for working people. This is why Congress needs more school board members in the fight -- people like me, who have seen firsthand how broken our system is and who know how to fix it. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Together, we can invest in books, not bombs. In solidarity, Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-09 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

Shannon Taylor has spent her entire career protecting her community — prosecuting violent criminals, fighting fraud, and standing up for Virginia families.

Meanwhile, her opponent, Republican Rep. Rob Wittman, has spent nearly 20 years in Congress lining his pockets, slashing health care, hiking costs, and putting local hospitals at risk.

Voters in Virginia’s 1st Congressional District deserve a champion who will fight for them, not against them. EMILYs List is proud to endorse Shannon Taylor — and we’re ready to help her flip this seat and take the fight to Congress.

clean_body: Will you split a donation between Shannon Taylor’s campaign and EMILYs List? | = Peter, The Cook Political Report just moved Shannon Taylor's (VA-01) race rating in her favor, and we need to take advantage of this momentum. = | = Shannon Taylor has spent her entire career protecting her community — prosecuting violent criminals, fighting fraud, and standing up for Virginia families. Meanwhile, her opponent, Republican Rep. Rob Wittman, has spent nearly 20 years in Congress lining his pockets, slashing health care, hiking costs, and putting local hospitals at risk. Voters in Virginia’s 1st Congressional District deserve a champion who will fight for them, not against them. EMILYs List is proud to endorse Shannon Taylor — and we’re ready to help her flip this seat and take the fight to Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your split contribution will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Pastor Lucas Miles, TPUSA Faith
subject: The Church is rising. Let’s keep building together.
body:
The Church is rising again across America
This is our moment to build a strong, unshakable Church.

| | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=80bb46ba917e4cbcb67d798b007afb2e&_e=ze9kBRFySH_UxrqABhwVC3GqY5_J1UHKP-gCnZCTVMbgZXF0rNFU16xoATj6mZ8P8mP9y_21sSjc4bV8FHzNtJprrJe_ypL-a3H0jRpp-O3U5ZuqxixaH9zl2woxKJSzkB2FKwL36aQcZNPnIGSc1EyYam6LuAefhvbs-CXeBjwVjaJ4GuoasnvbEdK00pImgypAEQUR8X7Xq_eA_9aw_meakXuwuQ1Zt1oD_lVv7rVzmg8yMrfPr32iCUZVsRzxIIRar6qq_H5PQbQ-iSGQxOozefql8fk6zoaLvi6H2n2zF-ZYKJe5azR_b2w0utnRXI7lmNlm7Xx14eEcw2JhuGLdlT51kJr7FQ-HF9nekXHvDQWjA_tqpieVuzAauvqBZWNCoYHYvUOLPMVy8JU8s3aZ_RWD8fpXnq5f6kPRi1wvtReNZeBOHLahU6m4Z168RWrbBOvkma4WCZ2OWMgRYsDRx12PlOzpfP_LgI4ecu3_OV-UY7c9U5y8TIa1Grr8HXrwp-X2Di1UcnuWmmfit75ODxCqrUr5c0KuQ9kQM7TB4kVziQtNewDcv8taUik_C8tkS0wWUK-XNNC9-pC3m-Cjj-oL1gHrfqZiULCRjk6_1wYhSbWfUW4I6zQbcanB7W5mHWd-DB5NaBROvHBPKf0yXDo17wD4epyt1SMCw3Q5mEfiSZNR_d3H6yKtCiWbJa8tfjSrLlRCJo5cYbo7vuW_-7F7pzsyKQED3sHprje6C3kZDry1XOhP2teNgRVZgfsXlhgGyY4pv-h9tXu1kQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Something remarkable is happening in America right now. People are coming back to church.Pastors are finding their courage again.And young people -- yes, _young people_ -- are opening their Bibles and asking for truth.This is exactly what **Charlie **dreamed of when he launched **TPUSA Faith.** He wanted to see a generation return to God, and a Church unafraid to preach the truth -- no matter the cost.And today, that vision is becoming reality.📈 Our church network has **doubled** , now connecting with more than ** 8,000 congregations** across America. 💥 Our online reach has **surged by 1,000%** , spreading the message of biblical truth and courage farther than ever before.🙌 And over **200,000 new people** -- pastors, parents, and America- loving young believers -- have joined this movement of faith and conviction.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=80bb46ba917e4cbcb67d798b007afb2e&_e=ze9kBRFySH_UxrqABhwVC3GqY5_J1UHKP-gCnZCTVMbgZXF0rNFU16xoATj6mZ8P8mP9y_21sSjc4bV8FHzNtJprrJe_ypL-a3H0jRpp-O3U5ZuqxixaH9zl2woxKJSzkB2FKwL36aQcZNPnIGSc1EyYam6LuAefhvbs-CXeBjwVjaJ4GuoasnvbEdK00pImgypAEQUR8X7Xq_eA_9aw_meakXuwuQ1Zt1oD_lVv7rVzmg8yMrfPr32iCUZVsRzxIIRar6qq_H5PQbQ-iSGQxOozefql8fk6zoaLvi6H2n1bL513MfsSbMJ36t02cbqM06kXdGFlXF7wIIg26gpjt9ke9oVxuD-0GjUVaQlo1uDfKMtgHD8vs-Z3-DZDPbFiSX2vY89LxgXSpimSIZg40zAHsaA-7cYIb1khUWnTzlQPSxxAwNNkLln-VBRRvywudybo47e3G7yESaiugmnWJ-VCvBClbzUu2bsZp97sJt2h6FZ-8KB64Ozhso0p9v_Tlf0hhMu8ozjayUZIw1wwU4jgvEWVd0X5xrl8jnMxlJ3lQicwz7P7oMbUFCWGz5YMtaccjvcHPgc9VipJ3qWo-F5_A6to7oyxwwspt6loXr_94AS1StrrqxjFwA_Wby0A3txy_soqHovAYPU76OF3CRVEKlR-p2C66tCH6bhHCbyQxQBog6YwhkxsOjTG5KPu2h-Iy0kbE1E0DnElEOxZLEWf7wnynqZZ1toLXHzGXZ6SH1-Lhod_60K8QgZ0cNJjddcgeeC5Cgikfv_kSO9FjA%3D%3D)

That's not just growth.That's **revival.** And I'm humbled to witness it. God is at work. And we need your support.
---

I'm **Pastor Lucas Miles** , and I have the honor of serving as the Senior Director of **TPUSA Faith** -- the church outreach arm of **Turning Point USA.** Our mission is simple but urgent: To build a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families in Christ.We train pastors.We unite congregations.We reach the next generation on college campuses.And we remind America that there is still truth worth standing for.You might be seeing the darkness in our culture -- the confusion, the moral drift, the pressure on Christians to stay silent.But here's the good news: **the Church is waking up.** All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down."_This is what **Charlie prayed for.** This is what I've dedicated my life to help lead.And now, I want to invite _you_ to be part of it.More pastors are asking for guidance.More churches are joining every week. More young people are hungry for answers -- for discipleship, for identity, for truth.And we must be ready to meet them.This is our moment, Friend.A once-in-a-generation opportunity to strengthen the Church -- not just for today, but for the decades to come. If you believe America needs a stronger Church -- one that speaks truth in love and refuses to bow to "Woke" ideology -- then I'd be honored to have you stand with us.**[Your gift today will help us:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=80bb46ba917e4cbcb67d798b007afb2e&_e=ze9kBRFySH_UxrqABhwVC3GqY5_J1UHKP-gCnZCTVMbgZXF0rNFU16xoATj6mZ8P8mP9y_21sSjc4bV8FHzNtJprrJe_ypL-a3H0jRpp-O3U5ZuqxixaH9zl2woxKJSzkB2FKwL36aQcZNPnIGSc1EyYam6LuAefhvbs-CXeBjwVjaJ4GuoasnvbEdK00pImgypAEQUR8X7Xq_eA_9aw_meakXuwuQ1Zt1oD_lVv7rVzmg8yMrfPr32iCUZVsRzxIIRar6qq_H5PQbQ-iSGQxOozefql8fk6zoaLvi6H2n3so7kVBCnfcWHXTmPjc23UfDTbUv0Y-iuKWwjsdFnMuZFaEDYGNtcQIxoWJK9PqQxyLEcfMkvUXfnZ4FMP7k-DqwsNFHBJyEYhtSYTO2MzVWL2Zb6zNrH9zXanJuCRUlNo_sACqAnTPTJuLNTuHoVYQGVPaw8gs0zccKjdadACF2dZi5bLfiUnIVQ0OcdmC5FbQ1srz2zpVf0SkvEqnkWnFyRdOI-4HzSnc69n5SDwJeDt0jaD75RvAS-6rEcmc7jVleIV8jkb5ueKOC_kJY74vkf6z9oq3QHNr1DoNLTviGIZiAUsQMfaTAaT81t48lb6epGuZ6hbUgeI6B-Pzfwdr_FdnV84An9XoPskAZyl1w4-9LE_fzga9-Hvt3uPYmGRzNwDAAUW2V-4-vs22q2_SQrBeIRaJ9V7jbMM_GkxlH5r4CX9Corn-qlbsKkikD8lCf6s34SgvTI3h6JV2CjQSuJZFu3wIhDXIY-BW6Nemg%3D%3D)**
---
* **Equip pastors** to lead boldly and biblically.
* **Expand the network** from 8,000 to 10,000+ congregations.
* **Reach more young people** with the Gospel and the truth about liberty.
* **Keep the light of truth shining** in every corner of this nation.

---

**Charlie 's legacy continues** -- And right now, that looks like revival.It looks like churches filling with life.It looks like believers standing together for God's truth.America needs strong churches -- and strong churches need friends like you. Will you take your stand today?**Pressing forward,**
---
**Pastor Lucas Miles**
Senior Director, TPUSA Faith

I'm Pastor Lucas Miles , and I have the honor of serving as the Senior Director of TPUSA Faith -- the church outreach arm of Turning Point USA. Our mission is simple but urgent: To build a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families in Christ.We train pastors.We unite congregations.We reach the next generation on college campuses.And we remind America that there is still truth worth standing for.You might be seeing the darkness in our culture -- the confusion, the moral drift, the pressure on Christians to stay silent.But here's the good news: the Church is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down."This is what Charlie prayed for. This is what I've dedicated my life to help lead.And now, I want to invite you to be part of it.More pastors are asking for guidance.More churches are joining every week. More young people are hungry for answers -- for discipleship, for identity, for truth.And we must be ready to meet them.This is our moment, Friend.A once-in-a-generation opportunity to strengthen the Church -- not just for today, but for the decades to come. If you believe America needs a stronger Church -- one that speaks truth in love and refuses to bow to "Woke" ideology -- then I'd be honored to have you stand with us. Equip pastors to lead boldly and biblically. Expand the network from 8,000 to 10,000+ congregations. Reach more young people with the Gospel and the truth about liberty. Keep the light of truth shining in every corner of this nation. Charlie 's legacy continues -- And right now, that looks like revival.It looks like churches filling with life.It looks like believers standing together for God's truth.America needs strong churches -- and strong churches need friends like you. Will you take your stand today?Pressing forward, Pastor Lucas Miles Senior Director, TPUSA Faith P.S. Since September 10 , more than 4,000 new churches have joined the TPUSA Faith network. Each one represents a pastor choosing courage over comfort -- and believers hungry for truth.Your first gift today will help equip them with resources, training, and connection. $25 helps resource a pastor stepping into this movement. $50 helps reach young people returning to church. $100+ strengthens the growing network of churches uniting for revival.This is a once-in-a-generation moment.Charlie 's vision is alive.Let's build a stronger Church -- together. 4940 East Beverly RoadPhoenix, Arizona 85044

I sent you a survey immediately after our election night losses to help me better understand how we can retain your vote and support in Congress, but I didn't hear back. **_I 'm resending the survey because it's of extreme importance not only to me, but also to the future success of our conservative movement. _** I really need you to fill it out without skipping over any questions. _**_Can you do this as a personal favor to me?

name: Ro Khanna
subject: “The biggest defeat of Trump’s second term”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We achieved a monumental victory with a vote of 427-1 in favor of the Khanna Epstein Transparency Act
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40468%2E3422442%2EJkpt7C)
Peter,
**Last week, we achieved a monumental victory with a vote of 427-1 in favor of the Khanna Epstein Transparency Act.** Isaac Dovere called it “the biggest defeat of Trump’s second term.” And Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene described it having "ripped MAGA apart."
But this vote is more than just a political victory; it's about standing up to the Epstein Class. It’s about tackling corruption head-on. And it’s about advocating for the communities that have been left behind. Together, we are advocating for a new economic patriotism that rebuilds American industry and empowers our workers.
**[Before I explain, will you rush a split $20 donation to my campaign and Katie Porter to help me continue to stand up to corruption and to hold Trump accountable?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251124_1_ak-rk.iHVzMx&refcode=em20251124-40468&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40468%2E3422442%2EJkpt7C)**
Here’s the backstory on how I helped engineer the vote that ‘ripped MAGA apart.’
Up to 40 MAGA Republicans were ready to support my Khanna Epstein Transparency Act, even though Donald Trump publicly told them not to. Some were prepared to lose his endorsement over it. **Then Trump _folded._**
This didn’t happen by accident.
It happened because I’ve spent months:
* going on MAGA-aligned podcasts
* holding town halls in deep-red districts
* building personal relationships with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* treating MAGA voters with respect — not mockery
* making the case for transparency and economic patriotism

Washington didn’t believe this strategy would work. But it’s working.
**For the first time since Trump came down his golden escalator and announced his candidacy for President, we saw a _major_ breach in the MAGA coalition.** And if we can break Trump’s coalition on transparency, we can break it on other issues too and build a broad, durable, cross-partisan governing majority.
But I need your help to keep showing up where Democrats never go.
**[Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help me continue to stand up to corruption and to hold Trump accountable?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251124_1_ak-rk.iHVzMx&refcode=em20251124-40468&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40468%2E3422442%2EJkpt7C)**
[👉 CHIP IN NOW](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251124_1_ak-rk.iHVzMx&refcode=em20251124-40468&t=5&akid=40468%2E3422442%2EJkpt7C)
I don’t take PAC money. I don’t take lobbyist money. I don’t take corporate money.
My campaign is powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution funds:
* **Travel and event logistics** to reach communities that beltway insiders ignore.
* **Promotion and organizing** to bring new people into the movement.
* **Security and operations** so we can keep doing this safely and sustainably.

Together, we can reshape the political landscape in ways Washington still doesn’t understand.
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro Khanna
[DONATE](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251124_1_ak-rk.iHVzMx&refcode=em20251124-40468&t=6&akid=40468%2E3422442%2EJkpt7C)

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251124-40468&amounts=&t=7&refcode2=40468_3422442_Jkpt7C&akid=40468%2E3422442%2EJkpt7C)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40468&t=8&akid=40468%2E3422442%2EJkpt7C)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40468)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40468&t=9&akid=40468%2E3422442%2EJkpt7C)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Demand Congress reverse SNAP cuts now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Republicans’ cuts will impact every single one of the more than 40 million Americans who currently receive SNAP. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWTkGe_X2kehZNvcqr-F2nxBD6I-_edb8uG0KlAvx2wdwU0giIJtsbJwH_kLDnIW9loJBTVG5PjSmjDRKUloT9gXZhzRfj3hzpXQeYJYA8H2CLydV0TvLasGT4BC0GR2hlY5lH9e3z44ANx5v6RQgLXExNs3ce4RzFIXkVKHNQ9l0/4lv/k-xGoaT3SPOigNZibgDiMQ/h0/h001.D3L7Ng8DgYPr9wWjy6CoZG6ogISqB2VwamJhM-lLs50)
---
Friend, **SNAP nutrition benefits are the most effective anti-hunger program in the U.S.,** but they do much more than address hunger. SNAP helps reduce poverty and improve health outcomes with studies showing that SNAP recipients have lower annual medical costs than people with similar means who do not receive SNAP.1 It leads to better education outcomes and self-sufficiency in urban and rural communities alike. And yet, during Trump’s government shutdown, he illegally withheld SNAP funds from tens of millions of beneficiaries, using food insecurity as a weapon against vulnerable families. **Trump’s attacks come just months after Republicans passed their Big Budget Betrayal that cut $187 billion from SNAP over the next decade―the largest cut in the program’s history.** In response, Democrats in the House and Senate have introduced the **_Restoring Food Security for American Families and Farmers Act of 2025_****** to reverse Republicans’ SNAP cuts. [**Add your name to urge the House and Senate to hold a vote on revering the $187 billion in SNAP cuts now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmembDrCA77QiZL64yPijK5S5Xvs4Zca5YLRP-fMBCnT92ToUvQZVYQZKXMvFXymZE2PoDOzd3rVFqCxbVrGipp1vqbp-oQ96JzrbwMnc-sxXrY4W5QiJQ5DE2fMl9wpvFVdOr5QpElfbeAq09m_9ZzzwN-9EcHdVlQzeZKQRtwPtEmw774PyruLf82HNopfW_mUu9VPbzSJQjRDGoca10TbOpevtLCz-ZRaEHvTJUlaYUAOqlcIw6dXO4Zm3jGDA6qcqSTXiOyA9hmn15kU1g8jIpZPBrnYzz2s0lilT88kahBHmbityo-E4z7wKDYvnP792m_g0VPfWItWRyrK98pkeW46sCLAh4tzC_2d1KlBw/4lv/k-xGoaT3SPOigNZibgDiMQ/h1/h001.nhaSz4dnjte_euMtUXEAnMZV2YkqH0UjkCZGzeoKk74) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmembDrCA77QiZL64yPijK5S5Xvs4Zca5YLRP-fMBCnT92ToUvQZVYQZKXMvFXymZE2PoDOzd3rVFqCxbVrGipp1vqbp-oQ96JzrbwMnc-sxV-rQZ6WKcNom1ePKXaPmeUL5rVErnTu1T33qMS3_D-8xGBqcLtc0PCdSP8RCmvwzErRJa8zTqjjX51kMfAfEMndUHEt7xPgukKdNBS-k_fyBg0DCvLqy4oc5Z1K2i4jY6MSmhKzCOhP5QJ1IvpTR-Ltt5i2vMGuzmwJpKCcIR07iL70wlJDw4EEkyOyZmx_tGcrMfRU3ORC2gk5C-ftbsLkbczZWApVQjO8rXaos9bOcH5T2Y9DEqnEmNhhTW7YzQ/4lv/k-xGoaT3SPOigNZibgDiMQ/h2/h001.kZR7g8zVPbrVOd7_MFKKPJGW84MKR2LDjjhmWOOFIe8)

Nutrition assistance used to be a bipartisan issue. But when Republicans passed their Big Budget Betrayal, they not only cut benefits, but shifted some of the cost responsibilities to states. As a result, states will be forced to find money in their state budgets by cutting other services, raising taxes, or cutting or eliminating SNAP altogether.
**These cuts will impact every single one of the more than 40 million Americans who currently receive SNAP, with roughly 4 million expected to lose all or most of their benefits―including children, seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities.**
[**We will not allow Donald Trump and his Republican Party to take food away from children and the most vulnerable. Add your name to demand Congress pass the**** _Restoring Food Security for American Families and Farmers Act_****now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmembDrCA77QiZL64yPijK5S5Xvs4Zca5YLRP-fMBCnT92ToUvQZVYQZKXMvFXymZE2PoDOzd3rVFqCxbVrGipp1vqbp-oQ96JzrbwMnc-sxU0xNWrWL2j-ou77WzTzkKyd31iSaRokLyIv_7N17A9OdSFOGI_F8sVT_li4tk1dpHpp7cPW4h11WG2Rw7oyx-ctqmizCCkyDQO6YInBmIEp9HXJ5LzzmxSZpeNm1KmrCq1qNX_Bd2xh6vPchFFFvf_JID8pM9qcuQrBKNLt6l6qQBE_yo6BuSXgq0SykExlljANRtZqVmwZQwzkNLQJpVOGnldKuyn94VKRdpaBZTEjdELLEb37_Xzoa4RvefBJ-0/4lv/k-xGoaT3SPOigNZibgDiMQ/h3/h001.vrGMdRE6elpJyiBV8YkEl0mCOct66npOH9ZFvI3ozb8)
Together, we’re standing up to Republicans’ cruelty, which is putting tax cuts for billionaires over food for our children.
With you in this fight,
Rashida

body:
| | | | **
**Peter,
Look, I’m not gonna sugarcoat it – we’re barely clinging to our majority in the House and there's a razor-thin line between forward progress, and watching the radical Left torch everything we fought for...

_**CLOSING Biden's open border.
DE-FANGING the Deep State.
PROTECTING girls' sports.
SHRINKING our massive bureaucracy.
CUTTING taxes for ALL Americans.**_

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251124_2_kelly.wze8Ev&refcode=em20251124-2&t=1&akid=3669%2E582294%2E-t0Vhf)

If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

name: NDRC
subject: What the 2026 map could look like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
What could the 2026 midterm map look like if Donald Trump gets his way?
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119912576/584639478/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiOTNmYmRiLTdlYzktZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zBDGDpJKYeEENu7U84f7prvbe7qi8l8PYGpXCV6cAiw=&emci=7474c96b-7ac9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bb93fbdb-7ec9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, There’s been a lot of confusion about the current state of play thanks to Donald Trump’s redistricting crisis. Make no mistake: Our democracy is under attack. The road to saving it requires standing up to what Trump and the GOP are planning in the months ahead. The congressional map we’ll have in 2026 will depend on whether people like us are ready and able to keep fighting this cynical power grab. That’s what the NDRC was built for — but we can’t do much without your support. [**If you can, rush in a donation so we can fight for fair maps in 2026 and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119912577/584639479/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_2026MapTopper_email_20251124-NDRC-Tier1-2026MapTopper_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251124-NDRC-Tier1-2026MapTopper_&utm_campaign=2026MapTopper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiOTNmYmRiLTdlYzktZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zBDGDpJKYeEENu7U84f7prvbe7qi8l8PYGpXCV6cAiw=) — Team NDRC
* * *
Peter, What could the 2026 midterm map look like if Donald Trump gets his way? Let’s recap what’s happened so far:
* The Texas GOP forced through a mid-decade gerrymander that they believe could pick up as many as **five** seats.
* North Carolina pushed through an even more gerrymandered map than it already had, hoping to gain **one** extra seat for Republicans.
* Missouri rushed through a redraw that could allow the GOP to steal **one more** seat.

Meanwhile:
* California voters overwhelmingly approved a map that could help level the playing field following Texas’s gerrymander, which might flip as many as five seats for Democrats.
* A Utah court struck down a GOP-gerrymandered map and approved a new one that could give Democrats a competitive chance at picking up one seat.

This is all theoretical, and the voters still get to weigh in next year, but right now, this redistricting crisis hasn’t led to the outcome the White House wants. That’s why states like Florida are preparing to try to steal more seats for Donald Trump ahead of the 2026 midterms. Just last week, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis tweeted “Stay tuned...” in response to reports about the Florida legislature pushing through a mid-decade map redraw. And many states are watching the Supreme Court closely, hoping they’ll strike down a part of the Voting Rights Act that could give several states a chance to pass racial gerrymanders. **Americans have been rising up against these craven power grabs. Our movement is fighting back against Trump’s bullying and bribing by organizing, advocating, and voting to preserve our democracy. But we know that our opponents are doubling down — and so we can’t afford to let up.** [**Your donation to the NDRC will allow us to fight for maps that truly reflect the voters’ will — not Donald Trump’s whims. Amid the GOP’s cynical power grabs, something else is happening. Voters can see right through their attempts to hoard power.
Their stranglehold in Indiana is starting to crack as Indiana voters rise up to reject map meddling. Donald Trump even threatened to endorse the opponents of any Republican lawmakers who refuse to go along with his redistricting schemes.
And in the Show Me State, where voters overwhelmingly oppose the mid-decade power grab, Missouri voters may have the final say on their gerrymandered congressional map at the ballot box through referendum. Weeks ahead of their deadline, more than 150,000 people signed the petition to send the new map to a vote where it could be vetoed by the people.
**We have to be laser-focused on ensuring that these Republican gerrymandering attempts badly backfire. We have to be ready for whatever they are planning to throw at us next. And with your support, the NDRC won’t let up.**

clean_body: What could the 2026 midterm map look like if Donald Trump gets his way? | Peter, There’s been a lot of confusion about the current state of play thanks to Donald Trump’s redistricting crisis. Make no mistake: Our democracy is under attack. The road to saving it requires standing up to what Trump and the GOP are planning in the months ahead. The congressional map we’ll have in 2026 will depend on whether people like us are ready and able to keep fighting this cynical power grab. That’s what the NDRC was built for — but we can’t do much without your support. = — Team NDRC Peter, What could the 2026 midterm map look like if Donald Trump gets his way? Let’s recap what’s happened so far: The Texas GOP forced through a mid-decade gerrymander that they believe could pick up as many as five seats. North Carolina pushed through an even more gerrymandered map than it already had, hoping to gain one extra seat for Republicans. Missouri rushed through a redraw that could allow the GOP to steal one more seat. Meanwhile: California voters overwhelmingly approved a map that could help level the playing field following Texas’s gerrymander, which might flip as many as five seats for Democrats. A Utah court struck down a GOP-gerrymandered map and approved a new one that could give Democrats a competitive chance at picking up one seat. This is all theoretical, and the voters still get to weigh in next year, but right now, this redistricting crisis hasn’t led to the outcome the White House wants. That’s why states like Florida are preparing to try to steal more seats for Donald Trump ahead of the 2026 midterms. Just last week, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis tweeted “Stay tuned...” in response to reports about the Florida legislature pushing through a mid-decade map redraw. And many states are watching the Supreme Court closely, hoping they’ll strike down a part of the Voting Rights Act that could give several states a chance to pass racial gerrymanders. Americans have been rising up against these craven power grabs. Our movement is fighting back against Trump’s bullying and bribing by organizing, advocating, and voting to preserve our democracy. But we know that our opponents are doubling down — and so we can’t afford to let up. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Amid the GOP’s cynical power grabs, something else is happening. Voters can see right through their attempts to hoard power. Their stranglehold in Indiana is starting to crack as Indiana voters rise up to reject map meddling. Donald Trump even threatened to endorse the opponents of any Republican lawmakers who refuse to go along with his redistricting schemes. And in the Show Me State, where voters overwhelmingly oppose the mid-decade power grab, Missouri voters may have the final say on their gerrymandered congressional map at the ballot box through referendum. Weeks ahead of their deadline, more than 150,000 people signed the petition to send the new map to a vote where it could be vetoed by the people. We have to be laser-focused on ensuring that these Republican gerrymandering attempts badly backfire. We have to be ready for whatever they are planning to throw at us next. And with your support, the NDRC won’t let up. = — Team NDRC = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. _**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/08e85381-7ccd-424f-ab36-6bdbb3c55f83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/08e85381-7ccd-424f-ab36-6bdbb3c55f83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I was as shocked as anybody when Marjorie Taylor Greene announced she was resigning from Congress. For about half a second, I almost gave her credit--finally doing something instead of just running her mouth about opposing MAGA. But the more I thought about it, the more it pissed me off.
She had no problem being deep in the MAGA cult--pushing conspiracy theories, attacking people, doing Trump's bidding--when it served her. When the movement was hot, she was all in. But now? The economy's tanking, Trump's radioactive because of the Epstein files, the corruption, the nonstop scandals--and suddenly she's "out."
This is the most politically convenient thing she could've done. She's quitting Congress just days after her Congressional pension vests. She doesn't have to waste another second in Mike Johnson's do-nothing House. No more voting on legislation that might force her to pick a side. And just when she could actually show up and serve her constituents--the ones she swore to represent for a full term--she bails.
She's not leaving to do anything productive. She's not staying to take real votes or stand up to Trump. What she _is_ going to do is either run for something bigger--Senate, governor, hell, maybe even president--or just cash in. Book deal. Media tour. Podcast. God help us, she'll probably have a Substack before the end of the year. And not a damn bit of that is brave.
There are people like my buddy Joe Walsh who've stood up to Trump and actually paid a price. Left the party. Lost elections. Lost careers. Marjorie Taylor Greene hasn't lost shit. She secured a pension for life. She's lined up multiple income streams just by existing. She'll get more attention, more platforms, a fresh audience. And she's free to run for president whenever she wants.
We've seen how that goes. You don't need me to tell you that running for president has become a grift for a certain breed of political bottom-feeder. It's a money-making scheme. A spotlight grab. And that's exactly what this is. There is nothing noble about it.
* * *
_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/08e85381-7ccd-424f-ab36-6bdbb3c55f83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/08e85381-7ccd-424f-ab36-6bdbb3c55f83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
And here's the thing: **if we don 't demand accountability now, we're basically telling every future politician that the exit ramp is always open.** That you can torch democracy, undermine institutions, rile up mobs, and then--poof--walk away the minute it stops paying dividends. That's the new model. That's the lesson she wants everyone to absorb. And if we shrug while she does it, that's on us.
She's a textbook DC swamp monster. She rode the QAnon conspiracy wave all the way to power, and now, watching the movement she helped build collapse under its own weight, she's jumping ship to reinvent herself.
And we cannot let her get away with it. Same shit Candace Owens is pulling. She carried water for Trump for years, but now that it's no longer good for her brand, she's pivoting. Suddenly she's anti-MAGA, anti-White House--whatever her audience demands. Because it's never been about values--it's always been about the grift. About access. About power. Never about actually helping anyone.
These people aren't offering solutions. They're not here to help you afford groceries, send your kids to college, retire with dignity, or take a damn vacation once in a while. There's no substance--just political theater and theft.
And now Marjorie gets to play the high-road card. She'll lob bombs from the sidelines with zero skin in the game. No votes. No legislation. No pressure. Just cable hits and hot takes. She'll brand herself as an anti-Trump voice--right up until she runs in the GOP primary. Then she'll build her own Frankenstein movement alongside Tucker Carlson and whoever else is reinventing themselves this election cycle.
What she's banking on--what every one of these suddenly "independent" truth-tellers is banking on--is that voters have the attention spans of goldfish. That six months from now, the story won't be "MAGA firebrand who torched American politics," but "principled outsider who bravely broke with her party." She's counting on amnesia. Counting on the chaos. Counting on us to be too exhausted to push back.
And the media? Don't expect them to do a damn thing about it. They're going to help her pull off this rebrand. They'll bring her on the Sunday shows, treat her like some serious thinker with "hard truths" to share. They'll skip right past the damage she did and give her a clean slate because it makes for good TV and clickbait. She knows that. She's counting on it.
So no, Marjorie Taylor Greene resigning is not bold. It's not admirable. It's everything that's broken in American politics. The idea that you can say or do anything, and then flip the script like a pro wrestler. One day the hero, the next the villain. No accountability. No shame.
It's craven, empty bullshit. And I'm not giving her a single ounce of credit for it. Eyes on the ball, folks.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/08e85381-7ccd-424f-ab36-6bdbb3c55f83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

Momentum is building to pass this bill – if we gather enough support, we can push Congress to SAVE and EXPAND Social Security!

_BUT IF we lack sufficient data,_ Trump will think Americans DON’T CARE about Social Security.

**So please, respond by your one-time extended MIDNIGHT deadline:**
[**Should Congress increase Social Security benefits? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251124_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=6&akid=21992%2E878179%2EfMxvGX) | [YES, ABSOLUTELY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251124_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=21992%2E878179%2EfMxvGX)

**_BUT NOW_** Democrats aren’t going down without a fight, they just introduced **a HUGE monthly increase** to Social Security! This changes everything!

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our next big race against AIPAC →
body:
Let’s unseat a morally bankrupt Democrat in the pockets of the AIPAC network.
#
Peter,
Our next major fight against AIPAC — the far-right megadonor-funded, pro-Israel lobby — is happening in New York’s 13th congressional district.
**Out-of-touch, corporate Democrat Rep. Adriano Espaillat currently represents NY-13. His biggest financial backer? AIPAC.**
Since 2011, Espaillat has taken more than $186,000 from AIPAC. In exchange, he has:
❌ Stayed silent on the Israeli government’s genocide in Gaza
❌ Refused to sign on to the only legislation calling for a ceasefire
❌ Refused to sign on to legislation calling for an arms embargo
❌ Voted to send billions of dollars worth of bombs and weapons to Israel
**Darializa Avila Chevalier, on the other hand, was a lead organizer of the pro-Palestine encampment at Columbia University** in 2023-2024, standing in solidarity with Palestinians and urging Columbia to divest its endowment from companies profiting from Israel’s genocide and apartheid system.
And when her friend and fellow organizer Mahmoud Khalil was kidnapped by ICE, their representative, Espaillat, just said he ‘trusts’ Trump to follow the law. Darializa, on the other hand, organized and advocated for his release.
This race is a real chance to replace a genocide-enabling Democrat with a progressive champion for peace, and AIPAC knows it! They will spend as much as possible between now and the June primary to stop us.
**[Let’s prove that the power of the people is stronger than the power of AIPAC. Pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help Darializa and Justice Democrats unseat a morally bankrupt incumbent in the pockets of AIPAC →](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251124-dac.pkhpiR&refcode=em20251124-37219&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=2&akid=37219%2E1203867%2E0w5__v)**

In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

name: Team Moore
subject: A bipartisan commission
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=968%2E1086043%2EiOwer2)
**Gov. Wes Moore is standing on business. 👇🏽**
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251124-2.5clQzB&refcode=em-20251124-2&t=2&akid=968%2E1086043%2EiOwer2)
---
At Trump’s direction, Republicans across the country are trying to overturn maps, gut voting rights, and rewrite the rules anywhere they can.
But Governor Moore is not going to sit on his hands. His priority has and will always be leaving no one behind. That’s why he announced a bipartisan commission to ensure every Marylander has a voice in the upcoming elections.
Peter, building the organizing muscle and public engagement to protect fair maps takes real resources.
**That’s where our grassroots team comes in.** Your support ensures Maryland stays ahead of these national attacks and keeps our democracy strong.
**[Please, chip in $5 today to help power our work and defend Wes from these attacks.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251124-2.5clQzB&refcode=em-20251124-2&t=3&akid=968%2E1086043%2EiOwer2)**

| | Team,** ** Here are two things you can count on: 1\. Republican extremists will keep trying to silence the American people. [**2\. We will keep fighting back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119913932/584643763/1621327833?refcode=emm_ff_20251124_T1_LGWFightBackFund_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTI3NWJmOC04MGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xBG6eMZhoBdJi68yiwHDmY4Fr4_2AJkI26_xOlyEs4Y=#) When they try to suppress the vote, from restricting mail voting to enacting expensive pre-registration requirements (read: poll taxes), we fight back for the freedom to vote. When they try to end free and fair elections by rigging political maps to draw more U.S. House districts in their favor, we fight back for fair maps and fair representation. And when they try to cement autocracy, we fight back for democracy. [**But it’s only possible with this team’s grassroots support. Please make a donation now to support the Fight Back Fund and continue pushing for a democracy where everyone is free to make their voice heard.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119913933/584643764/1621327833?refcode=emm_ff_20251124_T1_LGWFightBackFund_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTI3NWJmOC04MGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xBG6eMZhoBdJi68yiwHDmY4Fr4_2AJkI26_xOlyEs4Y=#) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119913934/584643765/1621327833?refcode=emm_ff_20251124_T1_LGWFightBackFund_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTI3NWJmOC04MGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xBG6eMZhoBdJi68yiwHDmY4Fr4_2AJkI26_xOlyEs4Y=#)****Your donation would go a long way at this moment — because we’re likely about to cross into a new, even more urgent phase of our fight.** The Supreme Court is on the verge of overturning Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, which could unleash a new surge of the GOP’s racially discriminatory redistricting. By gutting representation for Black and brown Americans, **the Republican Party could tilt 19 House seats in their favor. That’s enough to cement one-party rule in the U.S. House for generations.** But it’s not a foregone conclusion. Far from it. Those maps would need to get passed by state legislatures — so we’re ready to fight the MAGA power grab by electing Democracy Champions to those critical state-level positions. This year, we’ve already worked alongside Mississippi partners to help break a Republican supermajority in the State Senate. We’ve got a winning model of targeted, timely outreach and voter protection. But we need to be able to fight for democracy on multiple fronts — and that takes real resources. [**Chip in to the Fight Back Fund now so we can keep pressing forward for free and fair elections, no matter what the far right tries to throw at us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119913935/584643766/1621327833?refcode=emm_ff_20251124_T1_LGWFightBackFund_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTI3NWJmOC04MGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xBG6eMZhoBdJi68yiwHDmY4Fr4_2AJkI26_xOlyEs4Y=#) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119913936/584643767/1621327833?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=emm_ff_20251124_T1_LGWFightBackFund_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTI3NWJmOC04MGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xBG6eMZhoBdJi68yiwHDmY4Fr4_2AJkI26_xOlyEs4Y=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119913937/584643769/1621327833?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=emm_ff_20251124_T1_LGWFightBackFund_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTI3NWJmOC04MGM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xBG6eMZhoBdJi68yiwHDmY4Fr4_2AJkI26_xOlyEs4Y=)

By gutting representation for Black and brown Americans, the Republican Party could tilt 19 House seats in their favor. That’s enough to cement one-party rule in the U.S. House for generations. But it’s not a foregone conclusion. Far from it. Those maps would need to get passed by state legislatures — so we’re ready to fight the MAGA power grab by electing Democracy Champions to those critical state-level positions. This year, we’ve already worked alongside Mississippi partners to help break a Republican supermajority in the State Senate. We’ve got a winning model of targeted, timely outreach and voter protection. But we need to be able to fight for democracy on multiple fronts — and that takes real resources. =# If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you, Lauren Groh-Wargo CEO, Fair Fight * =# | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. name: Raul Ruiz
subject: We can’t get complacent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
I need your help to protect our progress.

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=zOSCqO2WRVGqkFqIpZRsIjy5ty6BSG14e7HXPxPVO6JqNlkHtSY4mqF44J1Yf%2FvkQaTCH%2FP1yK3K0OjENkdVy62Qpc1SrKri29wmnefvfh%2FoGyFNFylTDKAuEYUYdhL1fnd4K1ryfHP1vqh71PLNpdmJPbDopaBPyli3FTUH2Dx6tMHbt6Nr6I6v157OrM1cz477g5J41AZwQINrGz88k0EChgtpurOFezviZpefnnlLDXA4bAA325rgoQGXnrgxmMVa8soj1zkrXgi2OXLK21mrAI6EKOW0berQDWM3AQ7rpDHw3bcSMLb02jw2aGYQ6lr8OZ%2FYDkWSUO%2F0pJjvZbIni0EdvzUg74xl1knmOlh%2BaHd29H0RECu3O%2Bh1%2Fm%2F7ABslgtcfBhP5v%2FnUGe%2FFONJx%2B%2BIt5C4y%2BbAYgfYwWXLRhN7lLiVyeGI6ME%2F52j8d)
---
| |
---
It’s Raul. After seeing the results come in from Election Night earlier this month, I know we all felt a sense of accomplishment that our messages about the importance of health care and affordability are resonating across the country. But as excited as I am about what we accomplished on Election Day, **there are some very concerning signs here in California’s 25th District:**
* Trump __gained__ ground in 2024, with three counties flipping red.
* Support among Latino men dropped, shifting significantly to the right.
* Turnout in the 2025 Prop 50 election in our district was low — _very low._

The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) has taken notice, and they’ve already started hitting me with misleading attacks. [CA-25 is one of Republicans’ top pick-up opportunities here in California, and we’re already getting a taste of what they’re prepared to throw at me to win. That’s why I’m DOUBLING our goal for this month. The NRCC is feeling the pressure to protect Republicans’ slim majority, and they’ll pour everything they have into flipping this seat.
That means more attack ads, more outside money, and more misinformation aimed at dividing us.
I need your help to make sure we’re ready for the fights ahead. Every donation — no matter the size — helps us build the organization, the outreach, and the defense we’ll need to protect this seat and keep fighting for our shared values.
[Will you chip in $10, $25, or even $50 today to help us prepare for 2026 and defend California’s 25th District?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119914075/584644476/1711624946?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_112425_RACEUPDATE_D1_S1_res&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk3NDE2YzgtODFjOS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=50m1yqSnDHDfIwOgCT9KcOLZpgEDK67_OrH6-NDGGEE=)

In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: I need your help to protect our progress. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It’s Raul. After seeing the results come in from Election Night earlier this month, I know we all felt a sense of accomplishment that our messages about the importance of health care and affordability are resonating across the country. But as excited as I am about what we accomplished on Election Day, there are some very concerning signs here in California’s 25th District: Trump gained ground in 2024, with three counties flipping red. Support among Latino men dropped, shifting significantly to the right. Turnout in the 2025 Prop 50 election in our district was low — very low. The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) has taken notice, and they’ve already started hitting me with misleading attacks. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Even with our recent momentum nationwide, we can’t afford to get complacent here in CA-25. This district is truly up for grabs — and Republicans know it. The NRCC is feeling the pressure to protect Republicans’ slim majority, and they’ll pour everything they have into flipping this seat. That means more attack ads, more outside money, and more misinformation aimed at dividing us. I need your help to make sure we’re ready for the fights ahead. Every donation — no matter the size — helps us build the organization, the outreach, and the defense we’ll need to protect this seat and keep fighting for our shared values. = | = Thank you for standing with me — and for believing in what we can achieve together. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

Team: This Thanksgiving, we're grateful for the Obamas, who have continually fought for progress in and outside the White House and been Democratic voices of a generation.

Together, they led the nation with dignity and hope, inspiring unity in these uncertain times and motivating us to fight for progress, even when the fight gets tough.

We're organizing a Thanksgiving card for President and First Lady Obama to thank them for their public service and leadership over the years, and **we've set an ambitious, must-hit goal of _100,000 signatures_ before we can send the card and show our appreciation! | Peter, in case you haven’t heard, I’m throwing a music and arts festival - again!

We’re bringing Madsoul Fest back to Orlando, and I know this year will be even more impactful than last year. **Here’s a few stats from last year’s MadSoul Fest:**
* 🧑⚕️Hundreds of signed petitions to put Medicare expansion on the ballot in 2026
* 🗳️Thousands of new voters engaged
* 🎤And 3,500+ attendees fired up to defeat fascism, inspired by speakers like Rep. AOC, Lin-Manuel Miranda, and David Hogg!

**I started MadSoul because as the first Gen Z member of Congress, I knew the same old organizing tactics _wouldn’t_ deliver a new generation of voters. And now, we’re transforming the way we organize and reach young people.**

So we’re trying to take MadSoul to new heights this year, but that’ll only be possible with the support of grassroots donors. That’s why I’m asking:

I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution. Call this what it is: Political persecution. name: AbdulForSenate.com
subject: “Proud Pro-Israel Democrat”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1360%2E251025%2ETW7nRy ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1360%2E251025%2ETW7nRy ]Abdul for US Senate

Hi friends — important message for you today.

By now, almost everyone has heard of AIPAC. Across multiple campaign arms,
they spent more than $100,000,000 in MAGA billionaire money in 2024 to get
politicians to turn a blind eye to the genocide in Gaza, or worse yet,
support it outright.

But have you heard of their little cousin, DMFI?

In the past three cycles, “Democratic Majority for Israel” spent more than
$21,000,000 on elections to boost democrats who support sending our tax
dollars to Israel:

[ A ]A graphic showing the millions of dollars DMFI has raised and spent
from 2020-2024

DMFI just endorsed our opponent in this primary. In her statement
accepting their backing, she calls herself a “proud pro-Israel Democrat.”

Peter, this is
it. This is the start. The AIPAC folks, the DMFI folks, and the entirety
of their super PAC network are coming with a vengeance to defeat Abdul and
prop up a candidate who would rather send our money abroad to drop bombs
on Gaza than to spend it on our schools here at home. We need to respond
urgently.

Here are three reasons we need your help right this moment:

1. Blank check support for Israel will hurt the Democrats’ chances in
2026. If we nominate a candidate in Michigan who wants to underwrite
genocide, we could seriously harm our chances of getting elected by
alienating the young, multicultural voters who make up the Democratic
base. That could cost us Michigan and the Senate majority.
2. Abdul will be attacked relentlessly. They will spend millions against
him on misleading ads to smear us. And we need the resources to get
the truth out.
3. We are the bellwether. Elsewhere in places like New York City, voters
have shown they’ll support anti-genocide, pro-peace candidates no
matter how much AIPAC or DMFI spends against them. If we show them
their money doesn’t buy them elections in Michigan, we can strike a
decisive blow to their stranglehold over the power in Washington, D.C.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251124-1-ak.z7jyFR&amount=10&refcode=em20251124-1353&t=1004&akid=1360%2E251025%2ETW7nRy ]Now, if we’ve convinced you even a little bit, we are counting on you.
We cannot win this race without significant grassroots contributions from
people like you. Please make a $10 donation — or give as
much as you can — to elect Abdul and defeat AIPAC, DMFI, and the big money
PACs.

The good news is we can beat them. Multiple polls show we’re basically all
tied up.

But that’s only going to happen if friends like you choose to back Abdul
financially by donating what you can right now. That’s why these
fundraising emails are so important to our movement.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251124-1-ak.z7jyFR&amount=10&refcode=em20251124-1353&t=1005&akid=1360%2E251025%2ETW7nRy ]Please donate $10 now to elect Abdul, the only
unapologetically anti-AIPAC, anti-genocide candidate in this race.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251124-1-ak.z7jyFR&amount=10&refcode=em20251124-1353&t=1024&akid=1360%2E251025%2ETW7nRy ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you for hearing us out today. We appreciate your support.

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1025&akid=1360%2E251025%2ETW7nRy
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1026&akid=1360%2E251025%2ETW7nRy

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

Friend, Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest.
He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress.
Why? Because we spoke a simple truth: no service member is forced to follow an illegal order. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, one that I first swore as a 17-year old at the Naval Academy, and binds us all to the rule of law.
I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me.
**[If you’re willing to support a Navy veteran who believes in the rule of law, in the Constitution, in the promise of democracy—then I’m asking you, right now, to step up and help me fight back by splitting a contribution between NV Dems and me →](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqte1AKsO1A6D16A1pGserP-GGYlcYM4hyAi8a7tzSi_n49hVZ4IVNPGj6c_qzVlxRwRENeZBqNSqtg9XBfQt6wKZo7_5vUrx1hy8vh7dDe1fsaoTL1AQxW1Tr2gKMAyMezhf5kn3PA9EkDhZ10F1qa6AOpBsscuP_i94db1WOKnJQbpIoytiPq-La2-r0IjbWZ7-mzNScOiD7xD2uRnqHZP6XmWGmjOEh8N1NjntMNVexXU3jssSaRcOGnfbhT0RHU8yXOrdIYNr_DxBj7CqONEJK8_BbLxcAfUNUU8vMiecQT1cQYX7y1f8W0EDNGu2nA8syZjq_Mh_Lju3Jl1hsnZytmTjnRFye7YNCWcCbOQxrtvUAaVN2Au_zuuXGhJ6nKTf117cjXIQgq_OQf4Nw6oPMgHVWBvyoxfLFxtftg0dg/4lv/rGSALRf4RrKhYnhcy6gAtQ/h1/h001.lz7oi5hkPPLo61CjRkE7C_8RiWtssg7QjTdbUDLmCo4)**

I took the oath in the Navy—and I took it again when I was elected to Congress.
That oath doesn’t expire—and I’ll be damned if Donald Trump, a man who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, tells me how to serve this country.
So Trump can threaten me, call for my arrest, and even try to incite violence against me, but he can’t scare me into abandoning my oath.
