clean_body: Friend, Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest. He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress. Why? | | | | Friend, Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest. He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress. Why? Because we spoke a simple truth: no service member is forced to follow an illegal order. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, one that I first swore as a 17-year old at the Naval Academy, and binds us all to the rule of law. I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me. I took the oath in the Navy—and I took it again when I was elected to Congress. That oath doesn’t expire—and I’ll be damned if Donald Trump, a man who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, tells me how to serve this country. So Trump can threaten me, call for my arrest, and even try to incite violence against me, but he can’t scare me into abandoning my oath. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | DON’T GIVE UP THE SHIP! Chris Deluzio The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: The Media SURPRISED Me Yesterday...
body:
Yesterday at Sheridan.Church, MLB Legend Darryl Strawberry preached a fantastic sermon about his journey of redemption which included his recent pardo
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13694.1.af657da059f66010fa456b1d3dd70ef2) |
---
Yesterday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13695.1.f94ceac416159fab4d2e327121e93f48), **MLB Legend Darryl Strawberry** preached a _fantastic sermon_ about his journey of redemption which included his recent pardon from **President Donald Trump**. The media (**FoxNews** , **Politico** , **ABC** , **AP** and many others) covered the service yesterday and it was overwhelming **POSITIVE**... The goodness of God, seen through the _rise_ and _fall_ as well as the _redemption_ of Darryl Strawberry, was presented through all of these outlets which **I think is amazing**! If you missed **Darryl's sermon** you can watch it here: [https://youtube.com/live/5uRHSgSRwEI?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13696.1.4b8de2a8d25c3588d46695e34228519d)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13697.1.f8519933e084801bfa3fcf717dddf594)
---
I also sat down with **Darryl** for an episode of my podcast **UNFILTERED**.
We went in-depth about his **pardon** , his **MLB career** , his **redemption** and his **new book**.
Watch the full episode here: [https://youtu.be/bg0oLwi0b9g](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13698.1.6e1c3fa6dba21ac10cadfab7e184ab20)
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Watch: Darryl Strawberry on UNFILTERED ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13699.1.8d7c2f9ecdd9eda72a4f6b797a98ea3c)
---

---

Watch it here: [https://youtube.com/live/sZzMJf3nt9I?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13702.1.4c8fed5e6451e40c844810639058cfc3)

Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13704.1.4f690b46dc8dc0cbfbc719970a05451e) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13705.1.26efbbb3ed9e738dda7a60962229db25)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13706.1.8a151836bd8ad803f1a73d64adb38a2b)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13707.1.75165a742a79870a7ef7a0f0dcfb0e98). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13708.1.7ff6aa3c69572b734b11f954c1fae0bf) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13709.1.c2bf118097e2f383c8a78b68d4476e3f) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26539065.13710.1.a615af51e677bcfeb634de7e0433679f) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

name: Mike Rounds
subject: Dangerous momentum from the Left.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rounds for Senate**
body:
As we approach the end of the year, I’ve been reflecting on everything we’ve already accomplished together with President Trump back in the White House and a Republican Congress fighting alongside him. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

As we approach the end of the year, I've been reflecting on everything we've already accomplished together with President Trump back in the White House and a Republican Congress fighting alongside him.

**South Dakota's values of hard work, faith, and love of country guide everything I do in Washington.** Because of that, we confirmed President Trump's cabinet, passed the One Big, Beautiful Bill Act, and delivered the largest tax cut for working families in American history.

[**_This is just the start._**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eb737690cca54a7aaab1aeeb1a4ef387&_e=jXsZx-JMqeaGq-A47MDgGztl4kN4ikJOj1D52ZZolnMAJHMvcfJ5pcMYQCXkpQ3kU6A5vw2afoZQHjoFxSP93t7XIyl3_uqNJcBXCj4oZthBMt8-SzG6JClSIwmg0s9BUID0ieiQrvSS8oimvC1QNQfMQ7SU_rrQtldKuG52PTwvbeaoSPY5U16biJ1XPC0aEIs6nYpuzVeclVsLPlfn2RqJHhfmh7iSAebxcJwzdTs574sNtP8oslaom-mFHWLq_4b4clurocrB3ExqHgDBL5-CZf5Xkv0l__4v8p5HWryhLKS6ij2xHu21A0_yc9BomZmik6dr6O0QMomEZqtB7vsxlD18O5RhjFFfvLubpecM7sr9_fJ0x6rwJRrjxZf_QY660pVj5xki6O4Rhq3cK4lLmUvMBaQwr0HCvoERpUiwgs06hAvYi5tJwahVcU-L9R8btRINT7bedNHIYYqPWH-ISvAz4eD_Cj7BZhYzfHwPS143oOobCUwu9gOTYH9AqzcPEC-w7Rm57uk_mHpBti_dVY6jxFfnOld4__01ksg8Vmdak3eeCBCZXJWVrEXgbWcgrr5YmeBnt07T1rFQGWl9H6JYp7d-RbZ7Emxjm2rSc7TWUDQInD09kPlCM3JzCVK9TBSJ7f2bsGZhUnDLC5qUsDHzDRYMvAFsIioxRGOHEGnP4EKoORnAwtodjg2h)

But the Democrats and the radical Left want nothing more than to drag us back to the failed Biden-Harris years. The recent elections showed they're gaining dangerous momentum, and they truly believe they can flip the Senate and the House in the midterms.

We can't let that happen.

[**First and foremost, we have to keep South Dakota the land of the free, and that means keeping Republicans in the majority.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eb737690cca54a7aaab1aeeb1a4ef387&_e=jXsZx-JMqeaGq-A47MDgGztl4kN4ikJOj1D52ZZolnMAJHMvcfJ5pcMYQCXkpQ3kU6A5vw2afoZQHjoFxSP93t7XIyl3_uqNJcBXCj4oZthBMt8-SzG6JClSIwmg0s9BUID0ieiQrvSS8oimvC1QNQfMQ7SU_rrQtldKuG52PTwvbeaoSPY5U16biJ1XPC0aEIs6nYpuzVeclVsLPlfn2RqJHhfmh7iSAebxcJwzdTsEqipmZQdm7q9S4SnlIskjq6LZKe9JV-4eAosBm1av6kOr0SAa4pM10JTF2TIIJpZkaUsr16pzBEo-AIxeeMS98dKOXRq-8DgRj1pmdi0qyz0FN3lfhYF6vedCi5vwwGcQpynvP8lchFlnAuO6yE-5FjGZuBhSdU5qMJYume3FjnZgqFty5L-qC2d-yNrQnelpsK2vHwqFQVJZy5-zkdShM68uFTeXZivlzjiOtjK-HZyG-3peQ_SPURHwA0BH8Bfqo8U90appr_d-9xSbNEc5YnHnf0EIzKKo_HNx9I5ARtKUawB7iVbR_fEa9ac1KnGQvccQfzTD9cXzEIx9ySn9JGz19gg7TFmlS3CAl_T0ltMlKQOGoeTPF2uEGbKgNo4wwZt0HPqeC5072XO8pBT0wjsYU5JvgbObi5G53XgNxOsKmSvXUADTr_ERvxxYaQ0qPxOoPHo3po1yAlznsI2u)

| [**SOUTH DAKOTA
LAND OF THE FREE **
](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eb737690cca54a7aaab1aeeb1a4ef387&_e=jXsZx-JMqeaGq-A47MDgGztl4kN4ikJOj1D52ZZolnMAJHMvcfJ5pcMYQCXkpQ3kU6A5vw2afoZQHjoFxSP93t7XIyl3_uqNJcBXCj4oZthBMt8-SzG6JClSIwmg0s9BUID0ieiQrvSS8oimvC1QNQfMQ7SU_rrQtldKuG52PTwvbeaoSPY5U16biJ1XPC0aEIs6nYpuzVeclVsLPlfn2WMzw6qvS_uOvU-C4fh-OnG7AETsFc5Ysyt5wBllgDRudSslooIYH9PqqF1pW51uWQN-jfqtCRUhT_3qIgMqiwvwUZIp3g8RDm2_RBHaeKaOxl3Dw5z1SPQZ9ZPNaFiUn90J1T0p5a5v2Y-tA40thCXBBmbt4aRf-HGoQBE9SfzOcK9HsjrVSVkg1pTbEOjppHjMUXFDu02IgkoreBaUuV9KtnectAryYr25qQC8MxIZics93ZjlOAFjCcrmWT6L7VQFY9gwzXjAA-sWfZSUD30zakTJcyqpJzQtORX81Oin4NjRcn_BpQCnwHvQ6V2O3_DnO1mpUN2sNH48AdRjuTwf2s6VFNnpJHKRX25iPsRT0gzKQ4-Zwh2TJTrspQDAZXXE6QKe_-2uONEf4FgrjWyfN7RRzig8C-EHk6r7zYw0H1C3uFVZNOBZA2gEqxNB8m_0BIcK_lqkonHT5Q5zIi9xjwqm8hDT6DhSPPiQfzs82xLfbl-wn3JL5IWoN8HZyQ%3D%3D)
---

Our fight is far from over. If we're going to protect everything we've built and finish what we started, we have to work even harder right now.

Will you stand with me today? clean_body: As we approach the end of the year, I’ve been reflecting on everything we’ve already accomplished together with President Trump back in the White House and a Republican Congress fighting alongside him. | Fellow Conservative, As we approach the end of the year, I've been reflecting on everything we've already accomplished together with President Trump back in the White House and a Republican Congress fighting alongside him. South Dakota's values of hard work, faith, and love of country guide everything I do in Washington. Because of that, we confirmed President Trump's cabinet, passed the One Big, Beautiful Bill Act, and delivered the largest tax cut for working families in American history. But the Democrats and the radical Left want nothing more than to drag us back to the failed Biden-Harris years. The recent elections showed they're gaining dangerous momentum, and they truly believe they can flip the Senate and the House in the midterms. We can't let that happen. | Our fight is far from over. If we're going to protect everything we've built and finish what we started, we have to work even harder right now. Will you stand with me today? Every single dollar makes a real difference in this battle to preserve our way of life. Thank you for having my back. Together, we'll keep South Dakota strong. Sincerely, Mike Rounds Trump -endorsed Senator working for South Dakota FOLLOW MIKE ON SOCIAL MEDIA: | | Paid for by Rounds for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We'd hate to see you go, but you can .

clean_body: | | | November has flown by, Peter! We only have 6 days left in the month, and we are falling short of our end-of-month fundraising goal. It’s completely understandable as we approach the holiday season – this is a busy and expensive time of year for so many. The Colorado State Treasurer race is highly competitive and we can’t afford for our voter outreach to slow down. Every conversation we fund now helps us build the momentum we need heading into 2026. Thank you for believing in our campaign. Let’s finish November strong. — Team Titone Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. **** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

This won’t come as news to you, Peter, but the pace and scale of Donald Trump’s corruption is mind-blowing. It’s unprecedented. And just because it is open and notorious does not make it any better. In the first half of 2025 — just _the first six months_ — the Trump Organization’s income soared to $864 million from $51 million in 2024. That’s a 17-fold increase in the family fortune – and it’s all built on Trump’s corrupt abuse of power for his own financial benefits. Trump is using a White House dinner as a reward for top investors in his crypto company, and he is pardoning criminals who help him grift, as well. **Even former Trump officials are sounding the alarm on the most corrupt administration we've ever seen in the United States. Meanwhile, House Republicans are still bending the knee to him in Congress.** We need to win back the House for Democrats and elect leaders who will stand up to this corrupt administration. We can’t do it without a Democratic Congress. name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for the People PAC ([fightforthepeoplepac
body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-mek?refcode=em251124&refcode2=804_2563979_grPx-c&akid=804%2E2563979%2EgrPx-c)
When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
**[The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to Kamala Harris' Fight for the People PAC and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-mek?refcode=em251124&refcode2=804_2563979_grPx-c&akid=804%2E2563979%2EgrPx-c)**

body:
Only days left to claim your spot in my inner circle.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e114110/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3Yva3lESDJYRDdQSg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTExMjQ/LbmNsamtZdXZZUA/qP2hpZHM9bmMzRUt1Tm5ydThFdzBscw/gaSThwg/s0gea2f17e2)
| | | |
# **Out of millions, you were hand-picked.**
# ****

# **I’m opening my Inner Circle to only 150,000 Americans total – ever.**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e114110/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtaW5uZXItY2lyY2xlLXY0LXNiLw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTExMjQ/LbmNsamtZdXZZUA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE5NDhfZnRkMQ/gaSThwg/sflb9110616)
[JOIN MY INNER CIRCLE](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e114110/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtaW5uZXItY2lyY2xlLXY0LXNiLw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTExMjQ/LbmNsamtZdXZZUA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE5NDhfZnRkMQ/gaSThwg/sflb9110616)
This is the last call before we close the doors for good on Thanksgiving.
Once you’re in, you’ll get intel the media will never report, briefings straight from the Oval Office, and things I can only share with only the most die-hard MAGA Patriots.
Trust me, you will not want to miss out on these exclusive strategy updates from HQ.

subject: The Department of War is coming after me

body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

_Peter, this is Mazie. Below is a message from my colleague Sen. Mark Kelly, who is facing attacks from Donald Trump. Please read his message below._
* * *
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119915677/584649740/-752791550?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20251124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDMxMjUxZC04OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=elQMM832Q9PojA17NUS3Jqak__LRLsny0fwk3V1oM9A=) When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. # **[Protect Your Home from Title Theft and Fraud](https://substack.com/redirect/b14a54f7-1d5b-4f6e-bb8a-c8fe60ed2cdc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b14a54f7-1d5b-4f6e-bb8a-c8fe60ed2cdc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The FBI warns of **a rise in title fraud,** a crime where scammers use forged documents to steal a homeowner's ownership on records, often leaving victims unaware until it is too late.
**Criminals file fraudulent deeds, manipulate public records, and may even impersonate owners to gain control of a home.** If the stolen property is mortgaged or sold, it can create serious financial and legal consequences, including displacement, loss of property, emotional distress, and lengthy battles to reclaim it.
**Title fraud can affect anyone,** regardless of location, property type, or ownership duration. To protect your home and preventing irreversible damage, Homeowners are urged to monitor their records, check local filings, and watch for unexpected correspondence.
**[Beyond monitoring, Home Title Lock provides a comprehensive solution.](https://substack.com/redirect/dc7961c7-0b37-49db-b58e-47e332a0f816?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Subscribers receive 24/7 monitoring of their title records, urgent alerts of any activity, access to a dedicated team of legal experts who act on their behalf, and full restoration services for properties that fall victim to fraud.
Backed by up to $1 million in restoration protection, Home Title Lock offers homeowners more than just awareness--they gain active protection, legal support, and the resources needed to reclaim and secure their property if title fraud occurs.
[Protect your home today](https://substack.com/redirect/dc7961c7-0b37-49db-b58e-47e332a0f816?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Pentagon launches probe into Sen. Mark Kelly after Trump sedition accusations**
The Pentagon has opened an investigation into **["serious allegations of misconduct"](https://substack.com/redirect/b7d467b8-f099-4f50-8798-e757d464ab8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/b7d467b8-f099-4f50-8798-e757d464ab8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)against Sen. Mark Kelly following President Trump's public accusations that the Arizona Democrat committed sedition.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0c0bcb55-9d73-43a3-9034-eaf3af989088?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump publicly accused Kelly of seditious behavior** , prompting the Defense Department to launch a probe into the former Navy captain and astronaut who remains a member of the military reserves. The president's accusations came amid ongoing tensions between the administration and Democratic lawmakers who have challenged his policies.
* **The investigation marks a significant escalation** in the conflict between the administration and Kelly, who has been a vocal critic of Trump's policies and military leadership decisions. Kelly has emerged as one of the Senate's most prominent voices opposing the president's approach to national security matters.
* **Kelly could face potential military justice** proceedings depending on the outcome of the Pentagon's misconduct review, though specific details of the allegations have not been publicly disclosed. The consequences could be severe if the investigation finds evidence supporting the sedition claims.
* **The senator served as a Navy combat pilot** before becoming a NASA astronaut and maintains his military status despite his current role in Congress. Defense Department officials confirmed the investigation is underway but declined to provide additional information about the nature against Kelly.

* * *
# First Lady receives official White House Christmas tree
First lady Melania Trump welcomed the official White House Christmas tree Monday, telling reporters **["it will be beautiful"](https://substack.com/redirect/61250c4c-36dd-408d-b244-4ea614aca1c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as she greeted the enormous evergreen from central Michigan on the north driveway while wearing a white coat, red gloves and plaid Manolo Blahnik heels.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1464ba47-718f-4739-a935-e38c36513d52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **President Trump did not attend** the annual tree arrival ceremony, spending his morning on a phone call with Chinese President Xi Jinping as his foreign policy team worked to secure a Russia-Ukraine peace deal by a self-imposed Thanksgiving deadline.
* **The Trumps are expected to spend Thanksgiving** at Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach after hosting the annual turkey pardon ceremony Tuesday at the White House.

# Federal judge tosses Comey case
A federal judge threw out criminal charges against former FBI Director James Comey and New York Attorney General Letitia James on Monday, determining that interim US Attorney Lindsey Halligan[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/d89346a7-822b-4dbf-a6f1-32d4e05b6383?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[lacked legal authority](https://substack.com/redirect/d89346a7-822b-4dbf-a6f1-32d4e05b6383?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to bring indictments against the Trump critics.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d89346a7-822b-4dbf-a6f1-32d4e05b6383?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Senior US District Judge Cameron Currie** ruled that Attorney General Pam Bondi used up her single 120-day window for interim appointments on Erik Siebert, who stepped down in September following presidential criticism, meaning district judges rather than the administration should have chosen his replacement.
* **Comey cannot be recharged** due to the five-year statute of limitations running out, while prosecutors could potentially pursue new charges against James since her case deadline has not passed, though both cases were dismissed without prejudice.
* **White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt** dismissed the rulings as procedural technicalities and announced plans to appeal, while the decision may impact three other acting US attorneys who have exceeded 120 days in office without Senate approval.
* **Comey faced charges** of lying to Congress and obstruction of justice over statements made during a 2020 Senate hearing about FBI leaks, while James was accused of bank fraud for allegedly misrepresenting that she would occupy a Virginia home she purchased when her grandniece actually lived there and paid rent.

* * *
# **White House calls Trump healthcare subsidy extension reports "speculation"**
The White House dismissed reports that President Trump plans to propose an extension of **[enhanced pandemic-era health insurance subsidies](https://substack.com/redirect/8221684a-1d1e-4431-92bd-7eb582550e9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as "mere speculation," despite media outlets indicating the president would unveil a proposal to prevent premium increases for millions of Americans.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8221684a-1d1e-4431-92bd-7eb582550e9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **White House spokesman** Kush Desai said any reporting about the administration's healthcare positions amounts to speculation until Trump makes an official announcement himself. The statement came after MS Now and Politico reported the president was preparing a framework calling for a two-year extension of subsidies for individuals earning up to $109,550 and families of three making up to $186,550.
* **Without congressional action,** a pre-pandemic cutoff eliminating subsidies for people earning more than 400 percent of the poverty level will take effect on December 31, stripping benefits from approximately 22 million people who purchased insurance through Affordable Care Act exchanges. The lower limit would remove subsidies from individuals earning more than $62,600, married couples making over $84,600, and families of three taking home more than $106,600.
* **Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer** forced a 43-day government shutdown that ended November 12 with extending the expiring health insurance subsidies as Democrats' primary demand.
* **A House bill sponsored or cosponsored** by 15 Republicans would extend the sunsetting subsidies by one year and could likely pass with Democratic support, though it remains unclear whether enough Senate Republicans would vote in favor to clear the 60-vote threshold required for most legislation.

name: Jason Crow
subject: Trump just called me a traitor.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Derek — it’s Jason Crow. I served this country as an Army Ranger in Iraq and Afghanistan. I took an oath to defend the Constitution, and I still live by that oath today in Congress. Now, the President of the United States, Donald Trump, is calling for me and other veterans to be _imprisoned and murdered:_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119916059/584650900/-719142343?refcode=email_112425_crow-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjQyODI1NC04OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5urzl6AWa2DiVzASbpliVtqtSOPP9Aq2EHEtjxbTTB0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119916062/584650901/-719142343?refcode=email_112425_crow-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjQyODI1NC04OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5urzl6AWa2DiVzASbpliVtqtSOPP9Aq2EHEtjxbTTB0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119916064/584650904/-719142343?refcode=email_112425_crow-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjQyODI1NC04OWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5urzl6AWa2DiVzASbpliVtqtSOPP9Aq2EHEtjxbTTB0=) I won’t be intimidated. subject: Healthcare costs are rising, and we’re fighting back

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119916541/584652346/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20251124_FR_Affordabilityhealthcare_0_6MD_Jimmy_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjZlYTQ3NS04YWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-mOOxnQ8SUiDLuE-Ny4nlcMlAZTSpAiz7nlnsqr4dHw=&emci=9d3d9638-88c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab6ea475-8ac9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Everywhere I go in California’s 19th Congressional District, I hear the same thing. Families are stretched thin with groceries getting more expensive, rent climbing, and healthcare becoming harder and harder to afford.

When this administration and Speaker Johnson refused to extend ACA tax credits that keep premiums down for millions of Americans, it wasn’t just a policy decision. **It was a direct hit to working families, seniors on fixed incomes, young people just starting out, and anyone who depends on affordable care to stay healthy and safe.**

This fight is bigger than one bill or one bad decision. It’s about whether leaders in Washington stand with people who are struggling, or with special interests who benefit from chaos and higher costs.

I will always stand with our community, no matter what, and I need you with me.

[If we’re going to keep pushing back against attacks on affordable healthcare, it’s going to take all of us, Peter, so chip in anything you can today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119916546/584652352/636563605?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20251124_FR_Affordabilityhealthcare_0_6MD_Jimmy_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjZlYTQ3NS04YWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-mOOxnQ8SUiDLuE-Ny4nlcMlAZTSpAiz7nlnsqr4dHw=)

Thank you for always standing up for what’s right.

— Jimmy

Hey there, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: [**Can you split a donation of $10 to my reelection campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119916875/584653287/1967428710?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.24_Ossoff-Nov-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjI0YjE2Yy04YmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8p3e-1NKCEmNs-JUmSHb71cyavLdzTPDjvffVFm2Ik=)

Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule.

And I am the _only_ Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won.

That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me.

**_There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021._**

So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, for all of us.

[**If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119916878/584653290/1967428710?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.24_Ossoff-Nov-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjI0YjE2Yy04YmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8p3e-1NKCEmNs-JUmSHb71cyavLdzTPDjvffVFm2Ik=)

The campaign will be brutal.

But this team wins the hardest battles.

We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible.

Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority.

And we will win again — with your help.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: A crushing defeat for the Epstein Class
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We achieved a monumental victory with a vote of 427-1 in favor of the Khanna Epstein Transparency Act
**Last week, we achieved a monumental victory with a vote of 427-1 in favor of the Khanna Epstein Transparency Act.** Isaac Dovere called it “the biggest defeat of Trump’s second term.” And Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene described it having "ripped MAGA apart."
But this vote is more than just a political victory; it's about standing up to the Epstein Class. It’s about tackling corruption head-on. And it’s about advocating for the communities that have been left behind. Together, we are advocating for a new economic patriotism that rebuilds American industry and empowers our workers.
[**Before I explain how I beat Trump, will you rush a split $20 donation to my campaign and Deb Haaland to help us defeat extremism?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1096?c0=em_ms_dh_20251124_1_rk.UYis6i&refcode=em20251124-5880&t=1&akid=5880%2E400544%2EO-LyM4)
Here’s the backstory on how I helped engineer the vote that ‘ripped MAGA apart.’
Up to 40 MAGA Republicans were ready to support my Khanna Epstein Transparency Act, even though Donald Trump publicly told them not to. Some were prepared to lose his endorsement over it. **Then Trump _folded_.**
This didn’t happen by accident.
It happened because I’ve spent months:
* going on MAGA-aligned podcasts
* holding town halls in deep-red districts
* building personal relationships with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* treating MAGA voters with respect — not mockery
* making the case for transparency and economic patriotism

Washington didn’t believe this strategy would work. But it’s working.
**For the first time since Trump came down his golden escalator and announced his candidacy for President, we saw a _major_ breach in the MAGA coalition.** And if we can break Trump’s coalition on transparency, we can break it on other issues too and build a broad, durable, cross-partisan governing majority.

But I need your help to keep showing up where Democrats never go.
[**Will you split a $10, $25, or whatever donation so you can to help us defeat extremism?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1056?c0=em_ms_dh_20251124_1_rk.0lTcFK&refcode=em20251124-5880&t=2&akid=5880%2E400544%2EO-LyM4)
**[👉 CHIP IN NOW](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/895?c0=em_ms_dh_20251124_1_rk.8hYYkB&refcode=em20251124-5880&t=21&akid=5880%2E400544%2EO-LyM4)**
I don’t take PAC money. I don’t take lobbyist money. I don’t take corporate money.
My campaign is powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution funds:
* **Travel and event logistics** to reach communities that beltway insiders ignore.
* **Promotion and organizing** to bring new people into the movement.
* **Security and operations** so we can keep doing this safely and sustainably.

Together, we can reshape the political landscape in ways Washington still doesn’t understand.
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro Khanna
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251124-1&t=22&refcode2=5880_400544_O-LyM4&akid=5880%2E400544%2EO-LyM4)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=23&akid=5880%2E400544%2EO-LyM4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=24&akid=5880%2E400544%2EO-LyM4)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2712%2E4032634%2Eie7xSs)
---
The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say. |
---
When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.
If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.
I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.
Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
[**The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to Elizabeth Warren and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3238?t=8&akid=2712%2E4032634%2Eie7xSs)

name: Candace Owens
subject: Truth is costly. Life is priceless.
body:
I don't write this to sensationalize or politicize anything, but the horrific events unfolding around us compel me — urgently — to speak to you about truth. | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/00LJ2-hgZSj_eO-LdK8A1f6f6ELgRoIZGEkpVHh0_w22oe8P2sxfHHkLsosF04-rAbr2kbsIBB6Y797NTrxVab9HxYhQCPaR9oA1g_yo9Lob5PGHdcdjUHqrEa_Ntf-3KiCgCW1FLwZPQ0rBhVwsY11sT51ry283E_b59rzq4Bso7zxo5fb69Bx6/b02x1LldP5c-2z2UejxCGUSRb_2FmucI/15)_
---
| | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/GiVi9OJwFHDBdwHRWbipSW_YVXO5wd_kJNLNkqC_VJX7Z_EFF8zQXDoIguSghTCjNFwLPDTiuPgBvwIFBdQQUki8jQiHZnVzN8nBcTVzlUJ3mjqBZbJI3LtMcBBGniiXJUs6Cj9Tn2ojJ-OjBTRfaJ8lKQvPcSW0leuU62KqXPR1oL8YWoliWDRNH5JqLBa4E4JdWSI99NEG-dPvnF1ap7GuIBEFb4rhQ4MaVDkgxOYc8VHMEsh0Rg_jjVNNDsogNnQfkawil4ra6V4BzQTRGPVkYYcNkqdLbhci8O5dc4xwjuP6GDw5iWNjgwMFs25IZ_jfIVkBiHRcb0Y9wB3vbgMe4yiQQhNyp4y-v-DKJCcesbodS69SBtAagGxbxhMAfZ_367Zsv5yGi87naH6kfhMc5TxI8V5kiiSK4wvk85Sl9PT_H0C_QyAlTGqrjvWGT1uLmWHJkS95mYJ--UcM6Gr5ge0mvODUBZqkR93GT5aqHnjIV2ZFr885bPTHHQIs6uCZtOXFQfJyue9U9Ln0meuiiWhbpCl9brTZ2b8iyi7wb0tdhhBuNZ0SXls2Y_CoJHsGKh92yBw8BfyOUwkr57m8PcGMk2P2KP9c-_AlfozvNg1NH6Ef5isw8M_h_NfqdM5zP2M3_QtKoa7vyOxUvPb83HEm6oFJ8GXf_SVK01co/ubfdGLicyMb1XTQv1xmSy2tAf139FVEJ/15)
---
Dear Friend, I don't write this to sensationalize or politicize anything, but the horrific events unfolding around us compel me -- urgently -- to speak to you about truth. Because my friend, the cost of staying silent kills and it's imperative now, more than ever, to individually draw a moral line. We are living in a time when lies are easy, and truth is costly. That's not just a political issue -- it's a spiritual one. And there is no arena where the consequences are more devastating than in the battle for life. **[I’m talking about the children — the preborn — the ones we never see but who carry the full weight of human dignity.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/SgCxtO6IIYdTeUTR91ogYLVoGgwSIqYqfpB5GwVXx1bex2seIHaGOZhSvy5-ShxlC1sZQvI-xqhe4Um_GoyjXR8vYNdHVvHOh8u2E0k2RJYzHuhE4-5v4xVn2YqaU1X7StQv6t7PjbgQhToQMKvWA_MHuM29Aw2Tll8gAX3e_AvtuX9yBSetBKa_Seol_yjixXLZJlRhbI5HfcchHiPzsE-Qh4GiwtxIJ2P8P5iYMR9Nv_KqZIWxLOMr5rihyxokR4OLrIeTdnK2DUyeSFT0EDRfUlX7xK5BqiRrO_lfVpH2YjWlawKn5mBy8bcX97DW_3QJPMjxUSMPZahDxm9m26Y-kzYmybK5RC4p0aLM9zYaw9MJy3So-3LbwwtHX2OJAOz1N3UhQKrJJvpnMBDbXrVi-twhPafUUC21VtHJoFQ5mqB90U7i6qCPMxdNwkyN_fhQafXuZp5YZs8e961XxDOSA_CZfFR5gNKpV6N1mLyDR9zwYSIGgWvt8MKYQk4t-FVnfxOIwm-Uwyzl1U-rRbuHCTb9yNVFKp6_O7HnTHDr1wOdM7KEhp1h1h9mjq9D4j9GvynErTKDX8GvdriGU_qxrMnRu-lVUsT_MkwQZY_sknlBz3cxFSUDy2BtVRAM-pa5i9AkneSSFFKJS6JgUaj4j13DQx_E-bmsuDzaNjid/YWJURkICt-9pqYyJsOhU2x8hCERn4GqD/15)** Too many have accepted the lie that speaking up is "dangerous." That it's "not your place." That someone else will do it. But if not you, then who? That's why I'm asking you today to join me in supporting PreBorn! -- an organization that isn't afraid to speak truth, stand up for the voiceless, and offer real, life-affirming help to women in crisis. Their work is not flashy. It's not about headlines. It's about life.
---
* **Life saved** through free ultrasounds.

* **Mothers supported** when they're told abortion is their only option.

* **Truth told** in a culture drowning in confusion.

---
This isn't about singling out an individual platform or party line This is about the courage we each must have to live with boldness in our culture today. Because life and death is at stake. If you feel the weight of what's happening in this country... if you're tired of watching truth be trampled... then let this be the moment you act. [**Give boldly. Speak clearly. clean_body: I don't write this to sensationalize or politicize anything, but the horrific events unfolding around us compel me — urgently — to speak to you about truth. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Friend, I don't write this to sensationalize or politicize anything, but the horrific events unfolding around us compel me -- urgently -- to speak to you about truth. Because my friend, the cost of staying silent kills and it's imperative now, more than ever, to individually draw a moral line. We are living in a time when lies are easy, and truth is costly. That's not just a political issue -- it's a spiritual one. And there is no arena where the consequences are more devastating than in the battle for life. Too many have accepted the lie that speaking up is "dangerous." That it's "not your place." That someone else will do it. But if not you, then who? That's why I'm asking you today to join me in supporting PreBorn! -- an organization that isn't afraid to speak truth, stand up for the voiceless, and offer real, life-affirming help to women in crisis. Their work is not flashy. It's not about headlines. It's about life. Life saved through free ultrasounds. Mothers supported when they're told abortion is their only option. Truth told in a culture drowning in confusion. This isn't about singling out an individual platform or party line This is about the courage we each must have to live with boldness in our culture today. Because life and death is at stake. If you feel the weight of what's happening in this country... if you're tired of watching truth be trampled... then let this be the moment you act. We don't need more influencers. We need more people of action. With unwavering resolve, Candace Owens** Partner of PreBorn!

body:
First and foremost, Elissa would like to thank you for the support since President Trump threatened to arrest, prosecute and hang her.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2381%2E135344%2Eho-Gnc)

First and foremost, Elissa would like to thank you for the support since President Trump threatened to arrest, prosecute and hang her.
But let's be clear: This story is about President Trump's use of fear to silence those who he disagrees with. It's no secret that he is weaponizing the Justice Department, something we've seen him do with many people already.
But Elissa has been through dangerous situations before and it's not going to change her feelings about speaking her mind. She's going to continue to stand up, speak out, and she'll be working hard to support candidates in Michigan and across the country who will do the same.
But she can't do it alone:

Election night proved what's possible when grassroots power takes on Big Oil's billions.
We flipped seats Republicans thought they owned. We made history in places like Virginia, Georgia, and Pennsylvania. We showed that when we roll up our sleeves, come together, and invest in brave and bold candidates, we can beat corporate polluters every single time.
Now we have a chance to replicate this success in communities across the country, not next year, but _right now._ We have runoffs to win and a special election for Tennessee’s 7th Congressional District — **our last chance to flip a Republican seat for Congress in 2025.**
But we also need to be ready for what's coming in 2026.
Trump and his fossil fuel allies are mobilizing fast. They’re plotting to expand their majorities in Congress, rewrite the rules in their favor, and keep Trump’s authoritarian agenda unchecked. So we’re not taking a moment to rest.
**The truth is, early money and momentum decide who can hire staff, open offices, and talk to voters first. Every race in front of us — and the hundreds still ahead — is being shaped in these quiet weeks when only the most determined among us keep showing up.**
**[So I'm asking for your help today. Not for me, for all of us. Will you represent Cresco and chip in to help us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal? Only by standing together will we succeed in beating the forces that want to keep us down.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119917262/584654328/2105508926?refcode=ea.a2fc751e-8dc9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a2fc751e-8dc9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyZmM3NTFlLThkYzktZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S5l0A4l-qUrqOQOhZbC2HM2CB8tHLk1OEElmdnxsntM=)**

clean_body: This can’t wait. | = I know your time is precious, but I need just two minutes for something that can't wait. = | = | = ---|--- Election night proved what's possible when grassroots power takes on Big Oil's billions. We flipped seats Republicans thought they owned. We made history in places like Virginia, Georgia, and Pennsylvania. We showed that when we roll up our sleeves, come together, and invest in brave and bold candidates, we can beat corporate polluters every single time. Now we have a chance to replicate this success in communities across the country, not next year, but right now. We have runoffs to win and a special election for Tennessee’s 7th Congressional District — our last chance to flip a Republican seat for Congress in 2025. But we also need to be ready for what's coming in 2026. Trump and his fossil fuel allies are mobilizing fast. They’re plotting to expand their majorities in Congress, rewrite the rules in their favor, and keep Trump’s authoritarian agenda unchecked. So we’re not taking a moment to rest. The truth is, early money and momentum decide who can hire staff, open offices, and talk to voters first. Every race in front of us — and the hundreds still ahead — is being shaped in these quiet weeks when only the most determined among us keep showing up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, Jane Fonda | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Emily, Team Saikat
subject: WATCH: Saikat on the I’ve Had It Podcast
body:
A new generation of leadership vs. a MAGA future — here’s what Saikat told the I’ve Had It Podcast

| | | | | [|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=0f406a1ea1&e=bf17056ae8)
| | | | | |

Friends -

Did you see or hear Saikat on [**I’ve Had It Podcast News**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=acd5b44054&e=bf17056ae8) recently?
On with Jennifer Welch, Saikat broke down how we don’t have another decade to wait for a new generation of leaders. We need people who will confront MAGA head-on _right now_ , break the grip of corporate and lobbyist money (including AIPAC), and finally fight for an America where ordinary people can afford a decent life.
He explained that Congress is dominated by members who spend their days begging corporate donors for money — which is why they can’t imagine bold solutions to the affordability crisis. Saikat has spent a decade working with Bernie, AOC, and on policies like the Green New Deal.
---
[|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=3eeb2c63b9&e=bf17056ae8)
| |
He also warned that we’re “sleepwalking into dystopia” while MAGA forces use power aggressively, and too many Democrats go quiet or cave. And he called out the performative Democrats who talk a big game but never deliver. If we’re going to beat back authoritarianism and rebuild the American Dream, we need fighters who actually know how to use power.
That’s what this campaign is about: a new generation of leadership stepping up with honesty, courage, and a clear vision for a country where people can afford rent, healthcare, childcare, food — and where our democracy belongs to voters, not corporations.
**And that vision only becomes real if we build it together.**

[**So if you’re able, chip in $1, 5, or $25 dollars — it all helps fuel a campaign powered by people, not corporations.**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=a446db251f&e=bf17056ae8)
---
| [Chip in now »](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=d1177c198e&e=bf17056ae8)
---
| | | | | |
Thank you for being part of this. This is how we win — and this is how we build the future we deserve.
Let’s do this,

EmilyCommunications DirectorSaikat for Congress

---
| | | | |

---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/about?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&e=bf17056ae8&c=068229319f) [unsubscribe from this list](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&t=b&e=bf17056ae8&c=068229319f) [update subscription preferences](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&e=bf17056ae8&c=068229319f)
Saikat for Congress * 1388 Haight St PMB 1124 * San Francisco, CA 94117-2909 * USA

---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23668%2E4449941%2EuFbopb) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23668%2E4449941%2EuFbopb) [The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70304?t=4&akid=23668%2E4449941%2EuFbopb) When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.

If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.

I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.

Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**

You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point. [**The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to Fight For Reform and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70304?t=5&akid=23668%2E4449941%2EuFbopb) | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70305?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=6&akid=23668%2E4449941%2EuFbopb)

body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119917988/584656793/-185804085?refcode=em-11.24.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjk5OTA5ZC04ZmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y_RTMifSWY5BHwvEFzJBYwGTqAws9MKXzENmYcLCsns=) Friend, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**contribute $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119917989/584656794/-185804085?refcode=em-11.24.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjk5OTA5ZC04ZmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y_RTMifSWY5BHwvEFzJBYwGTqAws9MKXzENmYcLCsns=)** ** to my campaign, but first let me explain why your support is so important. MI-08 has officially been calculated the “tipping-point” seat for 2026. Simply put, this district will determine who controls the House. If we want to win back the majority, keeping MI-08 blue is essential. That’s exactly why national Republicans are already flooding this district with nearly $1 million in misleading attack ads. They’re trying to distort my record and define this race before most voters are even paying attention. **I’m not backing down.** Since day one, my focus has been the same: lowering healthcare costs, making life more affordable for working families, and building stronger, safer communities across mid-Michigan. That’s the work I came here to do. But holding this seat will take all of us. When you chip in, you’re helping us reach more voters, respond to false attacks, and build the kind of campaign that can withstand whatever comes our way. [**So friend, if you’re able, will you pitch in $3 today? Hey Peter, it’s Charlie. Republicans have always talked a big game about helping working folks when facing cameras or on the campaign trail, but time and again, they've protected big-money interests over the people. This past election, Georgians saw through it and sent a clear message. **It’s time for leadership that puts voters, not corporations, first.** We flipped two seats on the all-Republican Public Service Commission — a huge win alongside a wave of many other Democratic victories across the country. People are tired of the constant struggle to afford healthcare, groceries, and other basic necessities, and they’re demanding change. _We’re on a mission to deliver it._ But Peter, this is only the beginning, and we can’t slow down now. We need to carry this momentum all the way through to the 2026 elections. With a razor-thin majority, Republicans are ready to pull out all the stops to maintain power. And while they may out-raise us and out-spend us, with enough early preparation, we can win this fight together. [The fate of our democracy rests on the Georgia Senate race, and we're not taking any chances. Will you chip in $10 to strengthen our war chest now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918058/584657039/-2004472022?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112425_EOM1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjU1YmNjZi04ZmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=39ZKVjeAUsHLV88CmHMS6Nv2Ddh7Rf2Xh84TlLFJLr4=) | | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918059/584657040/-2004472022?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112425_EOM1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjU1YmNjZi04ZmM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=39ZKVjeAUsHLV88CmHMS6Nv2Ddh7Rf2Xh84TlLFJLr4=)**

Dear Reader, In 1944, an experiment was done in [this Nazi medical center](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e27263971/VaHR0cHM6Ly9wcm8ubmhzLW5ld3MuY29tL20vMjQ5NTk4MQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjQ/LbmNsNnZ3U1lXbw/gaSTv7A/san2c9b386a)... A medical experiment commissioned by Adolf Hitler was done here in 1944. Our own U.S. government has ignored the important scientific results of this experiment. Now, decades later, the results are finally being revealed to the public. And you will NOT believe what they expose. [Click here now to see them while they’re still available](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e27263971/VaHR0cHM6Ly9wcm8ubmhzLW5ld3MuY29tL20vMjQ5NTk4MQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjQ/LbmNsNnZ3U1lXbw/gaSTv7A/san2c9b386a). name: Roy Cooper
subject: a few things that are important to me
body:
Will you help me fight for a better country? | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918255/584657831/1573338254?refcode=ea.8e6c2b29-91c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8e6c2b29-91c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZjMmIyOS05MWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KmAKzEXYO8M7jhUeQ_E8J13C6Bcg4RnBWPEQdnEldY=) I want to tell you about a few things that are important to me, Peter, so I hope you’ll give me just a minute or two of your time today: **Public education:** My mom was a public school teacher right here in North Carolina, and I attended public schools all the way from first grade through university and law school. Our future leaders are learning in public schools today. I believe _every_ child deserves an excellent public education — no matter where their parents live or what they earn — and I’ll make public education a priority in the Senate. **Health care access:** Expanding Medicaid was one of our most impactful accomplishments during my service as Governor of North Carolina. America is the richest country in the world, and every one of us deserves the care we need to stay healthy — and bringing Medicaid Expansion to NC helped more than 670,000 people get it. But the entire Medicaid system is now at risk because national Republicans decided to slash Medicaid funding and give a handout to the rich instead. I will fight to save Medicaid for all Americans. **Voting rights:** North Carolina has been a proving ground for the GOP’s worst efforts to undermine voting rights and access. They’ve enacted ultra-partisan gerrymanders and restrictive anti-voter laws. In the wake of a 2024 election loss, Republicans even launched a lawsuit attempting to throw out tens of thousands of valid ballots and change the result. We must defend and expand voting rights to ensure that every one of us can have our fair say in our democracy — and we have to be prepared for the GOP to try to steal future elections that they lose. **[Peter, I know we share many of the same values, beliefs and hopes for our nation’s future. I’m ready to do everything in my power to make this country better for all of us, but I need your help to make it to the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to donate $5 or more right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918256/584657832/1573338254?amount=5&refcode=ea.8e6c2b29-91c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8e6c2b29-91c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZjMmIyOS05MWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KmAKzEXYO8M7jhUeQ_E8J13C6Bcg4RnBWPEQdnEldY=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918257/584657833/1573338254?refcode=ea.8e6c2b29-91c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8e6c2b29-91c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZjMmIyOS05MWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KmAKzEXYO8M7jhUeQ_E8J13C6Bcg4RnBWPEQdnEldY=)
---
I appreciate all your help in this fight,
Roy Cooper
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918258/584657834/1573338254?refcode=ea.8e6c2b29-91c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8e6c2b29-91c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZjMmIyOS05MWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KmAKzEXYO8M7jhUeQ_E8J13C6Bcg4RnBWPEQdnEldY=)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119918259/584657835/1573338254?refcode=ea.8e6c2b29-91c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8e6c2b29-91c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZjMmIyOS05MWM5LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KmAKzEXYO8M7jhUeQ_E8J13C6Bcg4RnBWPEQdnEldY=)**

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. clean_body: Will you help me fight for a better country? | = I want to tell you about a few things that are important to me, Peter, so I hope you’ll give me just a minute or two of your time today: Public education: My mom was a public school teacher right here in North Carolina, and I attended public schools all the way from first grade through university and law school. Our future leaders are learning in public schools today. I believe every child deserves an excellent public education — no matter where their parents live or what they earn — and I’ll make public education a priority in the Senate. Health care access: Expanding Medicaid was one of our most impactful accomplishments during my service as Governor of North Carolina. America is the richest country in the world, and every one of us deserves the care we need to stay healthy — and bringing Medicaid Expansion to NC helped more than 670,000 people get it. But the entire Medicaid system is now at risk because national Republicans decided to slash Medicaid funding and give a handout to the rich instead. I will fight to save Medicaid for all Americans. Voting rights: North Carolina has been a proving ground for the GOP’s worst efforts to undermine voting rights and access. They’ve enacted ultra-partisan gerrymanders and restrictive anti-voter laws. In the wake of a 2024 election loss, Republicans even launched a lawsuit attempting to throw out tens of thousands of valid ballots and change the result. We must defend and expand voting rights to ensure that every one of us can have our fair say in our democracy — and we have to be prepared for the GOP to try to steal future elections that they lose. = | = I appreciate all your help in this fight, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper Victory Fund PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal. Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund.
